[{"Name":"Phyllis Rostykus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMKubRpAHIQHcRvxQ1_vqNCcQHIPe5eJtkRzokD2nsqXBSAJTwbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is streamlined to be fast. Much of the original menu is ceviche, raw seafood in various forms, the aguachilies are big bowls of raw seafood with onions, cucumbers, and spicy tart sauce to chemically cook the raw seafood.

Most of the original tacos have cooked seafood: octopus, Marlin, bacon wrapped shrimp were the ones we got. The tacos are enormous and super tasty, but if you are sensitive to spice, ask for the sauces to be served on the side. My sister is very sensitive, and she was grateful she got it on the side, so she was really able to enjoy her food.

We want to go back sometime to try out the birria. There is a drive thru! And they were doing a booming business through the evening so you know everything is fresh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8rxrS3zzRiqvt4U2V1CX6&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Dawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCWLTBFiXcJVuoU_JZpUWFTzylTcpSDmvcthmw9mJ0WW3ZmHCm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Holy Smokes, I love their Chips & Salsa.  It's the best I've had in a long time!  And I love the Carne Asada Taco.  It's my favorite thing so far.  The Fish Taco was really fresh and so good too.

Their Caesar Salad has Cilantro Caesar dressing!  I love the unique taste, and I like getting the Revolcados to put on top.

The Revolcados (spicy fried shrimp) were delicious but pretty spicy.  If you like spice, you might love them.  If not, I wouldn't try to be a hero, unless you like crying in public.  😁

Their food seems less processed, or more natural, so some people might miss that salty taste.  But, I think a lot of people will appreciate the difference.  Their food might not be the best you've ever had, but I really enjoyed it many times.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-xF4ryVYI3sVy7Vn3sEsc&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"Hassina Noury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqmlIUoIYsi5mR25iX6TIuDrHrL0ceTBPAL1fHvevQMtIblUW_lw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a gem! Best micheladas I’ve had in a while…loved the fish taco, tecu taco, and birria quesotaco. Been twice this week so far…honorable mention to the esquites, not to be missed. Great patio, so nice on a sunny day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvy6p7o8rCz3vbYZX85F11&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"땡이샤랑","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX57Ta4oVdpf9nw492xSi2E6FiWrl1NzpNuYGrWRk7AfwWs5-AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Im surprised at this place cause it only has 4.7 stars and 111 reviews as of the time im writing this. I ordered a bowl of ceviche pescado the portions are huge. The fish was fresh the salsa was fresh. I would drive from IE to just get food here. I would be back to try the rest of the menu","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_qYf7DcEZU-1ZOVSuIZ7R&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"michael chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjrgv2hBMGvoi0lW7hJSzfwM_yYsny3eHW-cuvB7DE4G8AOrgj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Are you kidding me?  Shrimp ceviche so refreshing and avocado balances it out.  Grilled fish on cheesy tortilla was smooth and yummy.  Octopus taco, octopus was tender, but was a bit too spicy… suggest to tone down the spice and let customers add spicy salsa if needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teck Boon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhhjSvd8WvJhcPJ0N_s5uXl9BwSoDYFYdYkSjIFzqcBjIwg3BhqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The octopus taco is really good and definitely something to order. Had the fried fish taco too and that’s pretty tasty too. Portions are quite large and 2 tacos were enough for 1 adult. Enough parking available around the building and good amount of seating space both inside and outside the restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo08vsHw&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-4-28"},{"Name":"Dave R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTdG3cZ1dUSUMFaQCnYCgtDhBnO4BZiS1ejxDN0zD7JkKEghw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decided to try this place during a week night and wasn’t disappointed at all. Despite noting as a Seafood place, they do other items as well which is great.  Ordered the birria, carne asada and fish tacos that were all really enjoyable. The tacos themselves are on the larger size, so one or two tacos is probably a better order size in the future unless you want to take some home for later.  Will definitely be back to try more items from their menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg4daDNA&fid=0x0:0xb1caecc91b1b6b60"],"When":"2025-2-18"},{"Name":"Don Stephenson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZbMyVSNuzZ5OoO7dE_DzPXtcbsQiqMLbxNgrU1cTwFGUFv8CE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was delicious. We had the chili rellenos and seafood fajitas. Quick service and the people were friendly and efficient. Not a lot of room to eat inside but the outdoor dining is great.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sasquatch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVa0HiPCDmydCvp5hyuoYiF4BqbvOKjaf_x8RVROT5Ax49UBYmb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Menya Ultra in Mira Mesa didn’t just serve a great bowl of ramen it genuinely brought us back to living in Japan. From the moment you walk in, the atmosphere feels authentic without trying too hard. It’s focused, no-nonsense, and centered on doing ramen the right way.

The tonkotsu broth is the star. Rich, creamy, and deeply flavorful without being overwhelming, it tastes like it’s been simmered with care and patience. You can tell this isn’t rushed food. The noodles have that perfect bite firm, springy, and clearly chosen to match the broth instead of just filling the bowl. Every component feels intentional.

The pork is tender and well-seasoned, not overly fatty, and it melts the way good chashu should. The soft-boiled egg is spot on, with a jammy center that adds depth instead of just decoration. Even the green onions and toppings feel balanced, enhancing the bowl rather than distracting from it.

What really stands out is how consistent and respectful the food feels. This is ramen made by people who understand the culture behind it, not just the recipe. It reminded us of late nights in Japan, ducking into small ramen shops, ordering quickly, and being blown away by how much flavor could fit into one bowl.

Service is fast & efficient and friendly, exactly what you want in a ramen spot. Menya Ultra isn’t trying to reinvent ramen they’re honoring it and that’s what makes it exceptional. If you’re looking for ramen that feels authentic, comforting, and genuinely memorable, this place delivers every time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBN1qDGFoWSqb9wukEjQrZ0&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Bonnie Ye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPMma_MhhRbmmk_eCLt_9ZhOaoAMUkmiW9IaBXVwXz64s3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I don’t go to ramen restaurants often because the broth is too salty for my taste. This one is no exception. We ordered a kids meal, #3 Tonkotsu Chashu and spicy Miso. The noodle texture was good but the broth was salty and spicy (spicy level was ok but too salty). The kids meal came with chicken katsu and fries. We had to send them back in because they were cold and looked like have been sitting there for a while. They brought us fresh ones later after i asked.

We waited for 20-30 min to get in and then waited just to get some drinking water to start. The check came pretty quickly though! Unfortunately this is not the Michelin restaurant standard that I expected.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxf9eWlERRkyqpAas3IcLC&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Pualani Whitney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXExWxTx2hn8uUhzvNubCA5EHdqQHWUJnnPXiWLGqUOyHw8_dU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"12/17/2025 - I love that Menya Ultra has a live-waitlist. We planned on going to an early dinner at 6:30pm wait list was 55-63 min wait. No problem so we decided to drive around Poway to check out Christmas lights. We arrived at Menya Ultra 8:30pm no wait we got sat right away. Ordered, fast service I love ramen especially Tonkotsu it has lot's of flavors delicious and were out by 9:03pm.  Leftovers was great for breakfast :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGPPRnK6vm_ywsJZJPP7Vj&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"KakuBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWutlKZi6Y01z2Y5IREHHTIWtcCCIaHmbgvMr5DtNejgeQXtjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Japanese ramen noodle shop specializing in serving fresh, homemade wheat noodles. Their ramen noodles are made at a local San Diego offsite location and they are thin with a delicate / smooth texture. Accompanying the noodles are three excellent variations of Menya’s pork broth (e.g., tonkotsu, miso, and tantan). Friendly service.

The tonkotsu ramen had a rich and creamy broth. It was accompanied by a soft boiled egg, sliced green onions, a nice taste of chashu pork, and thinly sliced mushrooms. The standard serving size was quite filling.

The tantan men also had a rich pork broth with miso, sesame paste, chili oil, and other ingredients. The chili oil brought a nice heat that would be perfect for cooler winter weather. The sesame flavor throughout the dish was a nice touch. Enjoyed the noodles and broth with minced pork, an optional order of three chashu slices, green onions, mushrooms, and other goodies.

The fried chicken and pork gyoza was a nice appetizer. The outer wrapper was slightly crisp and chewy. The ponzu sauce had a medium body / thickness and a slight sweetness.

Menya offered a nice Japanese beer selection. The Sapporo and Orion beers were crisp and refreshing as we enjoyed the ramen dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBr7YyAmyXcj2ZIO3JwqEqA&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Iman Hamidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw_O0ZbwASYF4pfDDYnJgxN41COWsZ6KVjU5IhPiH6NifoUR8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Wow, this place is NOT good. The portions are tiny and the value is awful. The spicy miso ramen came with literally one super thin slice of meat. I paid $2 extra for an egg, and honestly, if I hadn’t, this wouldn’t even qualify as a meal. That’s how little food you get for a $21 bowl of ramen.

I’m seriously disappointed after wanting to try this place for weeks. The taste is fine, maybe a 7/10, but nothing special at all. Barely a step above packaged ramen. How this place is rated so highly is beyond me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jayson Chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjvs3vDtevVy4LamJcupz1HPA_u4SkA1w9GMwqgPNjOM_8vJCe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Checked out this ramen spot recently only vegan option on the menu is the miso, which is… decent. Not life-changing, but solid enough to scratch the ramen itch without feeling like a sad salad substitute.

Noodles are legit though nice and chewy, exactly how they should be. Texture on point. Would love to see more plant-based options in the future, just to mix things up a bit.

Now, if you’re not vegan? You’re in luck. My friends went all in on the tantan and were raving about it. Also heard people around me hyping up the chashu like it was a concert headliner.

So yeah if you eat meat, you’ll probably love this place. If you don’t, it’s still worth a visit… just maybe not your new go-to.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKHjqMC8kb2rpQE&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2025-5-13"},{"Name":"Braylien Siy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQI9rpWo2MtI6nsAKw6o5KdtyyKQ4s2HTUThhFK7vZLk4murGixw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A good place to satisfy ramen cravings! We tried their miso ajitama and tantanmen and both were delicious! May not be at the same with the taste of ramen in Japan but it comes close. The noodles are absolutely perfect in texture! They have generous servings as well and with excellent customer service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWmf3jeQAQFiEe05g9zcPs&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband loves ramen and we came here to have lunch on a Sunday. It had a line but we joined waitlist so we didn’t need to wait. The ramen itself is fine, I couldn’t tell the difference between it and other restaurants. It’s not bad, but not amazing either. The fried chicken is nice, pretty juicy. The dumplings are skinny, not my favorite. Overall, my husband enjoyed it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzh_mVQw&fid=0x0:0x5b5cb6f7188c6532"],"When":"2024-6-12"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jen Chon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKIrjK0PbO_fL4XXJTCZYmp5rVny1XT9s1M9zhb2dLLCK32oJI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best pizza I've ever had, IN MY LIFE!

Gluten Free crust isn't that much more expensive than same size medium pizza.
Curry sauce is vegan.
Many vegetable options, cauliflower is the best!
Bathrooms are closed off to patrons; they give you key to go upstairs.
Lighting inside is way too bright and uncomfortable, besides that the seating and tables are clean and well-placed.
Service was very helpful about allergens list.
Music not loud so it's a pleasant dining experience.

Please add tamarind and spicy green cilantro mint chutneys as side dipping for crusts.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDe2dBdyGrEzs7X4iA04how&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We tried a couple of times Indian flavor pizzas before and we loved it! I’m so happy to find this new spot in Mira Mesa with my parents in law who come to visit from Phoenix. Even though my father in law is very conservative eater, he enjoyed his sausage red sauce and lemon pepper wings very much. While my husband and I tried a Chili paneer pizza which is very delicious, highly recommend! We also tried a chilly Indian flavor wings called Achari Wings, a nice little spicy, we loved it. Everyone even including my baby loves this place, because they made some fresh plain pizza breads for him. The waitress Sadya is very patient and friendly. We will definitely come back! Plus they have nice beers on tap!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgeIYJiWfSMDtMbziW15Ez&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"siri gowtham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpSfR4CAcufM3lZdva_V07T4Xs9ctg1XIklspkiZMc9oSqWmbm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stumbled upon this new spot by chance—the sign is a bit tucked away, so you might miss it unless you’re specifically looking for it or walking through the complex. We visited when it had been open for less than a month, and the staff was outstanding—extremely friendly and welcoming.

We ordered pizzas and beers, and the buy-one-get-one beer deal was a nice bonus. I had the paneer pizza, and my friend ordered the chicken pizza; both were delicious with generous portion sizes. The space is very roomy, parking was easy, and it’s definitely a place we’d come back to again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbreVE8TdMw6zpC_RNVMLv&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Siddartha Donthula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMSCro94SEWShYUKiGH9wXGy6y3QkuI05wDa8FXZvWQQt8hPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a rare find in San Diego offering custom pizzas with Indian flavors. We enjoyed the onion samosa, curly fries, pizza with two separate toppings on each half - achari cauliflower and paneer tikka. The fresh brew beer was a nice addition to the delightful flavors from the food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBrYfvTmFQFT1ns12Smrfkm&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"James Camacho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD_N5JWPdc2XsiswhnVLqu2vOBU1LvLpoV8nzkaTP_RN6ehHZd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pizza and food here is amazing! I finally was able to visit Curry Pizza House and it exceeded my expectations. First, the restaurrant is very clean, modern, and inviting. We ordered wings, half curry and half tandoori, great seasoning and great tender chicken. Then we had the XL pizza.  Half of it was curry chicken masala, and half was lamb kabob. The pizza was packed with flavor and every bite was delicious! Raj S was our server and was very helpful. I can't wait to come back and try some different options. If you want to to try something differen and love pizza, you MUST come here.
Eat up!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGpp3cgxUCnwGVsgQ9vyya&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Qc Yong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsPiq9Ry9WYP98L1XwJ_SrULwtaI4tlx-NFfKOj1cXzaMOdOI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great find here in Mira Mesa. Pizza is notu favorite. But this Indian flavored pizzas and wings definitely surprised me in a great way. Spicy with great flavor. Happy hour promotions are great too. $3 for 16oz beer, and $5 appetizer. Can't complain","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKZXrpzA_doM1fuXtucjjl&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Santosh Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1Ix9DUcEPbYz9m7KSAs3gCVmz0Y3EZaJXJxdwLt-oHK63m3I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Heaven for Indian Style Pizza - A Must-Try Fusion

I recently tried this Indian-style pizza spot and was seriously impressed. I ordered a half-and-half pizza — one side Tandoori Chicken, the other Shahi Paneer — and both were absolutely amazing!
The Tandoori Chicken side had that classic smoky flavor with just the right amount of heat, while the Shahi Paneer was rich, creamy, and full of that buttery. Both halves were loaded with generous toppings and cheese, making every bite a treat.
I also had the spiced potato fries on the side — they were crispy, tangy, and perfectly coated with masala. Honestly, some of the best fries I’ve had with an Indian twist.
This place nails the desi fusion concept, and I’d happily eat their pizza any day. Highly recommend for anyone who loves bold flavors and creative twists on classic favorites!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDSTQrnGCkFZc_1luN7-78E&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Michael DeLeon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-NlC06WBQrSOj_nRk6gfAWsxsUDEp5vG2GFEROWcd4oqOj50=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here and the food was amazing! We first tried the Achari and tandoori wings and they tasted phenomenal and we're so tender.

We got a half and half Aloo Gohbi and Achari Gohbi pizza, a half and half Butter Chicken and Palak Paneer Pizza, and a small Achari chicken pizza.

The Aloo Gohbi pizza was great and super filling and the curry flavor blended really well with the pizza. I'm not even a big Cauliflower fan, but really liked it! I also enjoyed the Palak paneer pizza a lot as well and thought the paneer was cooked perfectly.

The Butter chicken pizza was also good, just wish it had more of the creamy curry flavor I was expecting.

A lot of my friends were originally skeptical of mixing curry and pizza together, but by the end, we all thought it was great and will definitely be back. The value was great too, especially with the 25% off deal they have until Oct 5th so now is definitely a good time to go try it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQzF8Yiyrhxoz2PrdtDLfV&fid=0x0:0x89a92b7450a7570c"],"When":"2025-10-4"}]

[{"Name":"Krystal L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9AGIM57yexf1B0i2EyiOe9nc9rgM1TqQWILFqvaCVzckHM5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly superior banh mi. The sandwich is fairly large for a solid price - I can usually eat it in 2 servings. The bread itself is perfectly baked that it doesn’t tear apart the roof of your mouth but still has that nice crunch to it. Meat to pate to pickles ratio is perfect.

There’s also plenty of deli snacks that you can get as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpWPdwVKdGlhBJKk7GkygZ&fid=0x0:0xbb53b6e02b190902"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"KakuBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWutlKZi6Y01z2Y5IREHHTIWtcCCIaHmbgvMr5DtNejgeQXtjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Paris Sandwiches is a humble takeout eatery in Mira Mesa. This local gem specializes in banh mi, and it is one of my favorite places to grab a Grilled Chicken Banh Mi!

THE FOOD
The baguette is the star. The thin bread combines pillowy softness inside with a crisp, flaky outer shell. The moist grilled chicken is complemented by sweet/sour pickled vegetables, a kick of heat from sliced jalapeños, and creamy mayo. At $7.05, the value is high.

SERVICE
The service is pleasant and no-nonsense. The order taker demonstrated excellent throughput efficiency, managing the queue and getting customers processed and fed rapidly.

OVERALL
A local favorite for grabbing a high-quality, budget-friendly banh mi for lunch or a snack.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCNYuw-j34dhYQRkQa53Ivs&fid=0x0:0xbb53b6e02b190902"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Daniel H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLr5VJq66sM95gF0Ow5m1SedgwID55KTVedpuAfqj_WFZlO4_7K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The bread shines here.  Very crunchy outside and soft.  House special banh mi is a bit different with soy sauce.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8j-zC7XBrUSaEDByBDC4a&fid=0x0:0xbb53b6e02b190902"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Arsalon Badri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcikGnronaEvWPcKZaq52pYu_P2L_TjOZlLZaG9evSwfDZBzSd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best banh mi sandwiches I've had anywhere. I had the chicken BBQ banh mi and Thai tea plus egg rolls. Everything was phenomenal and at an amazing price point. You can't beat it. You have to try Paris Sandwiches.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chelsea s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJawLQgZGWh9THUl6K6RctCa2hnIbxE0TObDEOT_bsvwWbzuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yum! I have no experience with banh mi sandwiches, but it sounded good today. I got the grilled chicken with extra veggies, and a coconut smoothie. Both items exceeded my expectations. I ordered online and it was ready when I got there. Will be a repeat customer! When I was leaving, a line out the door formed behind me! Popular spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT8KWLrgE&fid=0x0:0xbb53b6e02b190902"],"When":"2024-5-21"},{"Name":"Kirstin Mueller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIh7JePH8sEQytnjMyNRi1Zb23p-UR1dsWLwP0v5RGZOVxDkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place! The sandwiches here are delicious, with pretty large portions, extremely reasonable prices, and very fast service. I go out of my way to stop here whenever I’m anywhere near Mira Mesa. I’ve had the grilled pork and house special, which are both superb- I look forward to trying more of what they offer!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sinh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrtf1dsjm06cEhkQs0bKFWtjb-xJxIwditkSqQtjoHla1XDE9P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is great. Same owners of Paris Bakery on El Cajon Blvd. They got great Sandwiches, ‘modern Decorations, and clean seats indoors and outdoors. Besides that, they had an organized self full of loaves and drinks.
Wonderful can't complain about anything.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBl9ffhAE&fid=0x0:0xbb53b6e02b190902"],"When":"2023-1-31"},{"Name":"osirys rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4mUxu-2PPd5rsGlU00OARt71u2esYaZdmIankXrrLy2755PDP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited for the first time and was really pleased with the service and quickness! I got the grilled chicken sandwich and it was really tasty! It was recommended by the cashier.. I’m glad I listened to her recommendation. I’ll definitely be returning next time I’m craving a sandwich and Vietnamese coffee 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sue Duong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTU-8Riyfeaa46Yl_IZyAW2P3po_F4-fknk8W6SDtLmUXKoPBsgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10-27-25
Loved the background music, very upbeat! It made the meal more enjoyable. As for the food, I liked it (tried it at PB location) so much that I was the one who suggested to my friend to eat here. Not only I recommended it, but I also enjoyed it even though it was fried food, very surprising. First time being at this location; our experience was chicken licking good!

Service:
Staff welcomed us with a greeting once we entered the door. They also kept the restroom and dining area clean.

Ordered:
-Dave’s #2 $14.99
S- mild
S- lite mild","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBpq_uNijlVf2eEhqogbWWq&fid=0x0:0x36a52158cb9e87c2"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Angel Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQt65H4-diZKw5_0in1zS9RkWbnNukG8dGby1EQHqrmrjJYwPaAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Passed by the Mira Mesa 📍 location of Dave’s Hot Chicken and thought to myself, fine, I’ll give it a try.
Oh, bruh!! Dave took the idea of a chicken sandwich 🐣 and turned it into an experience everyone should try at least once in their lifetime.
A rainbow of flavors.
Hope 🙏 all of you get to experience it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTOiVYWuKAhh9dZonGBAqc&fid=0x0:0x36a52158cb9e87c2"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Viktor Lyashev","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOlH2XJcQIIXphw9nH3YnjNX4AmR-9Td5CDZIS0Wlrrte7jhrcvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is amazing spot right next to where I live! I’m usually here and line is telling for themselves for their air quality! I tried sliders and it’s just unforgettable! So far this is the best quality of chicken that I ever tried. I’m recommending to anyone.and their design is super cool.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXBbJ7xe3lpVmYQuoXgY6G&fid=0x0:0x36a52158cb9e87c2"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Pascal Henri Bisaillon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLa2aTtbAzU7ohgsZJhIB7hv8xszZu3E_L_R2v8c_SWm5wkYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greeted immediately after walking in, the person taking my order was very helpful and nice, and the service was really fast, only about 5 min wait time when I was expecting 15 mins or so. As for the food itself, I went with Dave's number 2 with medium spice, and the chicken was hot and crispy and the fries were really gooey with cheese, and it was delightful. Would definitely reccomend and will be coming back soon!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9t5MZZS8NLiVh8VrWp5b1&fid=0x0:0x36a52158cb9e87c2"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Taylor Walton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxB9sJCsg09CtTFq6KyY51mmcihq2hGjTAxQCsT54O8LP142q7tA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend Dave’s! It’s so fresh and yummy. I got a slider (mild) and cheese fries and the guy recommended I put honey on it which I did and the flavors just mixed so perfectly! I loved it. The slider isn’t typical slider size.. it’s more like a regular sandwhich! Kris was so kind when taking my order. They also kept the place clean.. I seen another lady coming out periodically wiping tables and picking things up. The only thing I would say is a downfall is it was warm and there’s no fans or anything but there’s also outside seating! Highly recommend giving it a try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBe0FawcTuYRaoHEwo90oxl&fid=0x0:0x36a52158cb9e87c2"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Zachary Azlin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1agK31_YzXOpIrg_ZUUZ_mxVVTvgHx1lFjEo2PUyvuqlHT6GJmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time, won't be the last. Great flavored chicken, awesome Fallout collab, good sides, didn't try the shakes but they look awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB05Qmq-DvQ22UFCBNF789u&fid=0x0:0x36a52158cb9e87c2"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Hunter Raymond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrR_Ljm408L6jKShv-Y1VG1aZReZ0qOi1juz_ZSStgyDcISw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ordered online thinking it would be faster and still took 20 minutes. Food was very bland and had no flavor. If I am going to pay for a meal I expect it to taste like it was made with effort. At this rate you are better off going to Chick-fil-A, Raising Canes 5 minutes going west towards the 805 on Mira Mesa by Target and Vons to get your order faster, better tasting and cheaper. Stay away","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucas Delattre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1kepu7Y1fNtUXzGRCY8SrrIYKuQ2O5oUSetiMrcymRdFqRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kris took my order today and she always has a positive attitude, big smile and makes my experience at Dave’s so much better every time. Good service will always make or break a place for me, regardless of how good the food is. I hope she gets recognized for her excellence.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"G Mena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJtiducWMtEErl6XZ3KgQ9mNuepyC58Ne_LzxJnN9uXHGcqkdbrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I dined in on a Saturday evening, no wait (we definitely beat the rush)! Waiter sat us down and we enjoyed a refreshing iced tea (so tasty)! I wanted to try EVERYTHING but decided on ordering the tastiest pork rice, delicious noodles, and a most flavorful dumpling soup (8 dumplings). They’re packed w flavor and that broth was absolutely exceptional and fresh! I also ordered the Xiao Long Bao and it was steamy deliciousness without the 2-3 hour wait hype. All tables were occupied and they became extremely busy but my drink remained full and our waiter was attentive and polite answering all of my menu questions. I appreciate cleanliness and great food! This place has both! This is definitely my new fave spot! ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAj94ICZD0Ubx3v9KMAgOKK&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Emily Riley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUedOl0oSaSx11Zr-rPJ3tkOLcUO4_VJZ2PzhngMtWmNl2eBzXr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family went to this cozy place a lot, they serve really good food, especially the chicken , tender and tasty. My second favorite dish is fry rice noodles with shrimp, it’s absolutely delicious. The young waiter constantly provides warm , outstanding service and makes every visit even better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDY336uOHpSwI5vUh6AEVfe&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Shen Xu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKk3D4exOali-vC_PI91tCruEex92F6edRlm2oRJm_DOJutYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The service was terrible, and they even forced us to give a very high tip. One of the waitresses completely ignored us when we tried to get her attention to ask for more water.  Overall, the food was mediocre, and it took a long time for the dishes to arrive. The service was truly awful. If you're really considering eating here, please think twice! My advice is to reconsider because the service is truly terrible, practically non-existent, and yet they still demand a tip. We ended up giving an 18% tip. It was absolutely not worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBnO2a12goIBm5JS1wj9AuF&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Pei Nichols","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7R12DnwBok2En0KVu4MkNbZHtQejay88LEJQjkcG_yY47BHY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The seating was nice but nothing else. Paying 20 dollars for a Hainan chicken set. Just because I didn’t notice the chicken hair at first and ate it doesn’t mean I actually enjoyed the food. The young lady right away asked me if I speak Chinese. I said I don’t. Then I heard her saying that she offered me 3 pieces of chicken because I FOUND it? 🤮🤮🤮She asked me where do I find it first to validate first if I was lying. I didn’t say I picked the chicken hair out from the other pieces. Most of the restaurant would apologize right away and ask to replace. No she didn’t, she made sure I wasn’t lying and didn’t apologize. She went “it happens”. Imao. What kind of service is that?? And said she doesn’t want to talk to me to her manager/owner. Just because I said I don’t speak Chinese doesn’t mean I don’t understand. lol Worst customer experience ever. Don’t talk shit about your customer in a different language in front them. Extremely disrespectful. It’s discrimination. And yeah, check out the picture. I actually counted it mini 10+ hair to start with + not sure how much I ate in without paying attention. You don’t want to come here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7DiLfx8NopDNQTzUlIe1V&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Hailey Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhJuxtNI-lmIsrwq32azG3tBiuKT56JoGKlunpHlVjDC8ovTYE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I came on Friday night at 7pm, put my name on the waitlist that had 3 parties ahead and it took 35-40mins to get seated which is fine. There’s boba shop next door while waiting.

I ordered the crispy roasted duck but after waiting 20 mins, the server came to tell me they’re out no more duck and asked to wait so that she need to check with the kitchen what they have before reorder anything else.  She never came back or brought menu to order something else! Wasted 1 hour!

The Hainanese rice chicken combo:  the chicken and rice are so oily, LOTS OF OIL. It tasted bland no flavor at all, a ginger garlic sauce is also not anything special, the red sauce is sriracha. 1/10

Mom kitchen egg fried rice is decent, still oily. I like they have seaweed mix with it. The texture is good but the seasoning is bland. 5/10

Garlic water spinach is fresh and crunch, the garlic is mild. 7/10

The service is terrible, no customer service at all.

The price is high in my opinion for the quality and service.

Will I come back? Probably not during dinner time because it’s not worth the wait for just basic food. I might come back during off peak hour to try the roasted duck and sausage.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwJzVNDf5pyq9quLXopHKE&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"P P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo6Cu-owH69pfSp6Eok-G1sCA5rWtzKzx9zjTSM4zgDmbGgws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Service is real bad! I guess on this point this is an authentic Hongkong eatery.
The waiter took our plates while we were still working on the food just because they were about to close around 2:30pm. But it was not even 2:30pm. Respect your customers please!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjL0dzo_FOsIOvx7tV0p6k&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Ryan E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7XvOOFtWQgQtJOz7RcfDC2roTx6pmmqnfi2Tri8_MLoA9sAbINw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came during the weekend and it was busy. We ordered the mix roast platter (with honey glazed bbq and Hainanese chicken), malay water spinach and the beef chow fun. The food was amazing. We will definitely be coming back to try more. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDs4oWjK6MVVLg7vYy25cAc&fid=0x0:0x4e710a36d079c776"],"When":"2025-8-22"},{"Name":"Brendan Vannie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIld01BJs3tXKLRvhI1gbv8zlUWN9IKkjo6W1GzNtKDuBTpdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been here twice and it was great both times. We ate in and brought our daughters, 1 and 4 years old. The place is clean and inviting and the service is good. They were gracious about the chaos that two yound children bring to the dining experience. It filled up with other diners and people getting take out orders as our meal progessed which signals to me that the food here is well known for being good. Also it seems they are opening another location in the Clairemont Mesa area which is also an encouraging sign. The food is spectacular and everything on thr menu looks appetizing. The night of our second visit my wife had suggested trying a new place but I wanted to return to this reataurant to try more of their food. I was glad we did because everything tasted great. My only negative thing was the icedbtea I ordered was as sweet as candy and I didn't expect that; was expecting an unsweetened iced tea or something much less sugary than what I got, but I'll just remember that for next time. Glad that this location is close to where I live so we can return easily.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7gEezdaiA3NwZ0oE8Q4PVLcRE9kjqdqm_WI__52mXISw94Pu4yw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is literally a hidden gem and seriously blew my mind. When you walk into the grocery store it feels unassuming and laid back, a nicely well-stocked local low key store. You wouldn’t think there’s a Vietnamese restaurant that serves flavor-packed Vietnamese cuisine! (Because food court or restaurants in grocery stores aren’t usually good).

We got a grilled pork bahn mi and grilled cuttlefish mango salad with june plum. Bahm mi was good, but it’s the salad that blew me away.

The mango was perfectly riped and still retained some firmness and tanginess. The june plum tasted like it was pickled or that’s what it tastes like, but I loved the combination of sour and sweet and the texture. The cuttlefish was grilled to PERFECTION then sliced very thinly. The grilled flavor and chewiness added so much flavor. I loved the toasted sesame seeds along with fried shallots. They added so much crispiness making the flavors even more complex. I hadn’t seen this dish else where and I loved that they carried some unique dishes. Their menu was focused (not all over the place) and every single one sounded good.

The complimentary dessert had very smooth and creamy yet chewy texture with combination of black-eyed peas, rice and coconut milk and it was a perfect way to finish the meal - nutty, creamy and sweet just enough.

Service was minimal and very good the same time. They were quietly attentive which I appreciated and felt comfortable with.

I also appreciate that they use actual plates, bowls and utensils instead of disposables. It contributes a lot to the food experience.

Lastly, the pricing couldn’t have been more reasonable.

Can’t wait to go back!!! Hope they will retain their quality of food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQl_z-WA&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2025-3-15"},{"Name":"Emily Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoiDtEzLLZw2h2WA3_90lStEJ0qj2eXvTqEy0j1RpQyEl2dHcQ9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is delicious, flavorful, and authentic. This place offers simple sit down dining in addition to to-go ordering.

Our waiter brought us water, bowls for sharing (we didn't even have to ask!), and a small dessert at the end of the meal. For a place with to-go in the name, this kind of service was unexpected and very welcome.

I didn't see any incentives for leaving a good review, so the 4.9 stars that this restaurant has is well-earned through great food, great prices, and great service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAioiWbN-jgiLHusaH_RNsp&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Michael Lucero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBqSAXIACDiQy5l8ZON24gl3MvKWqTqYIvqjUjCD0KsRYtrFP4VA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've never been able to find Bun Cha in San Diego, was told Ngon Ngon To Go serves a good Ha Noi version. This place has very authentic Vietnamese food, inside a Vietnamese market. Friendly service, I'll definitely be coming","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw0JXHYg&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"길성재","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXowWx1C9t0jsfqS27u4vymUYIwLPlDNfz3scrg2IHPGkcampjBfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Seriously tasty, and I need to try other menu soon. I had rice noodle with grilled  beef which is knd of vegetable mixed bowl. No 32.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqQdAoTNZl8_4Vuy7hqqxy&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2025-7-26"},{"Name":"Tony Vu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlaC2OZycFAwc3I3pcFL8gIVrkfN59froHHn1tOD5S8A12hq2Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the Bun Dau Mam Tom ! Perfect portion, good price and especially tasteful dishes. Highly recommended, the lady always smile and gives us deserts most of the time we eat here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC167Kf8wE&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2024-1-3"},{"Name":"Bau&Hoa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFRgPSuUyTcd_dpb7xNU5qQsfsyisYGevMwINL1iIRZN-465Fe7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"wow! this is really good viet food!!! had their roasted chicken with sweet rice ( only wed and thurs) and the sizzling fish on hot plate. sauce is serve with a strong fish sauce (so good but if you are not use to that sauce ask for diluted fish sauce) highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLno2v7wE&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2024-6-27"},{"Name":"Justin Fan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSW7AloYFq75g_4ANOhsDza1o5zNZCzrJrsMJrAfVchGGz1pbk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food: 4.5/5
Service and Setting: 4.5/5
Value: 3/5

During a visit to Hong Kong BBQ and Dim Sum located inside of Vinh Hung Supermarket, they rudely said that they do not have chopsticks. I meandered the market and found Ngon Ngon To Go and they graciously gave me a pair to eat with and simply asked me to come back to try their food. If that is not a start to a love story, I don’t know what is.

The restaurant itself is very clean and maybe slightly warm. The lady that was helping me in the front was very nice and even though her English was not the best, she made sure that I was well taken care of. You can tell that people really love their business as they have regulars come by and chat up the owners. She saw me taking pictures and offered to plate everything up, but the freshness and care in their food speaks for itself! This type of kind and genuine service is very rare to see in these types of restaurants, frankly speaking. Ngon ngon in Vietnamese means delicious, thank you Google Translate, and it certainly was!

Bun Cha Ha Noi: 4.5/5
Whenever I get this dish, I was always expect it to be cold because I see the pickles floating in it. Their bun cha comes out steamily hot with 2 grilled meatballs and a healthy portion of grilled pork. The pickles and meat are then put into a broth of diluted fish sauce that is fragrant, sweet, and savory. Though there is a touch of funk, it is not nearly as strong as fish sauce you normally dip egg rolls in. The meats themselves are perfectly grilled with more than a kiss of char, lending a delicious barbecued flavor. The meatballs taste very similar to a dumpling filling with strong notes of onion and other aromatics. They also brought out a plate of greens that included green leaf lettuce, perilla leaves, and Vietnamese mint. I just tore some up and added it to the fish sauce soup and it did add a new layer of crisp freshness. The noodles they gave were well cooked and not soggy at all. The very nice lady also offered me some more noodles, but she just might have been very nice to me this day haha. The ingredients used here are all extremely fresh and delicious and I can tell it was made with care. Sometimes, even with famous Vietnamese restaurants, the grilled meats taste like they’ve been chilling for a little too long, but not here! The lady was very nice and even tried to teach me how to eat the dish. Very tasty and highly recommend as this is a hard dish to find in San Diego!

Thai Tea: 3/5
This is a very standard Thai tea, but again, tasted fresh though it is pre-made and chilling in their display fridge. Sometimes you get that one tea that you know they saved from last week, but this one was fresh! They add ice and some more dairy I believe right before they serve it to you. It was a little flat in the flavor department and lacked that sort of rich vanilla flavor I’ve had in Thai restaurants, but it is a great way to end a meal and cleanse your palate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOiO2fEw&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2022-6-26"},{"Name":"Ailene Chow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsi90qZT3NQhLECoB0kE-80uB3Kxnf0ahaD3n91xynPj93-vQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is delish you cannot go wrong . If you can’t decide which dish then go with those with thumbs up 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIv00RdrJZfW3JcXqQFNcO&fid=0x0:0x8bad6f4db84d87bd"],"When":"2025-8-15"}]

[{"Name":"Jason S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE1nOuVntqxq5vPGxG2isc_WKyzacwP7lylH-bC7FtGq7nPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Attention heat lovers: order the "Thai hot" spiciness and enjoy not only the flavors but a wonderful afterglow as well. My sample was just enough to cause some heat sniffles as a highly tolerant spiciness enthusiast. Perfect. No more disappointment at ordering something for a kick and getting a gentle pat instead. Siam Nara is my new highwater mark for Thai options.  Excellent and personable service, enjoyable atmosphere with nicely appointed motif.  Large booths offer comfort and a nice sense of seclusion. Lots of free parking. I'll definitely be back. Just wish it was closer to home. (!)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-I3XdttLg9uoIWBL6MKAY&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"patrick cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbbrW9zXug_7Y_JgSvvM28IB_Ct3FrqwzZIy9RPrgxfqh1Bg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience at Siam Nara Thai Cuisine! From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel welcome with warm smiles and attentive service. They checked in often, made sure our drinks were always full, and were quick to answer any questions about the menu.

It wasn’t just about being polite—it felt genuine. The team really went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect throughout the meal. The service was smooth, professional, and thoughtful without ever feeling rushed.

On top of the delicious food, the excellent customer service truly made the experience stand out. I’ll definitely be coming back and recommending Siam Nara to friends and family!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAkXuungEf4_HrI6uITPKwr&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Nirmish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKVY58-br1PZt1KHOaYMF3GsepfZ2j7QMSKxHROyEOFx24SSmspw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was okay. Service was okay, we wanted chilli sauce but not body came to check on us after serving food. We need to get up n ask for check.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBms7zKI1BX2JChTbmH1gZP&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Ankita Aparajita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIe9dtc_m_Pr4PMNR4e2gsnXPACIDKSRxIx3PapjbGvBq44iJKcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Felt stepping into real Thailand... everyone greeted traditionally,the ambience is 💯, the decor and even dishes were authentic thai style. Much recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKhSoIwaqa49JPEdJm06h0&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Ana Belly Dancer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaRf8G7qdReZhsBlQ8Ma30O4yghDKg-uyKBVOjfAJhFfgMSkVZ2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went there to Celebrate a birthday. The food is served beautifully, on Gold Charger plates (and it was lunch-time!).  We had a variety of plates--all delicious. When it came time for the birthday cake, a "Robot Server" brought it out with the Birthday song playing! ;) 😉  The restaurant is decorated so beautiful! We took many photos ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Moniel Aguirre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW190uvDjubQtwSFpf3ZynpmF8u7LiqFaVEBpLDcd4n36xmHgqNTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Accidentally stumbled upon this place in search of some sticky rice and mango which was delicious . We ended up having a shared plate which was so tasty and allowed us to try a few different things. the atmosphere of this restaurant is so cute and the service was so wonderful! will be returning to have a full meal next time :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByLcw5Z7xpJ5ttvFZljOJi&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2025-7-10"},{"Name":"Z T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPtyX4CcrFFYhzzevmG8ADKNvEw0XMCHKdRyYOkCYWjPkFr-4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Visited a party of four. Ordered Tom Yum, Fried Rice, Red curry, drunken noodles and mango sticky rice. The restaurant has a very traditional and aesthetic ambiance. Definitely something different. Food quantity was less compared to other restaurants for the same price. Food quality was average at best. Food presentation definitely earned it a star. However, there are plenty of other restaurants that offer better thai food. Even with the slow crowd, you would constantly need to look for a server. Definitely could use a proactive approach.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID39MzJ4wE&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2024-11-12"},{"Name":"B Howe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0FJ-DJgHHv9nk4eRXy8e0ByJ1DMHTE1B77-7adF-rtm4srQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely in every way. Not super cheap, but comparable to other Thai places. The food is fabulous here.

The decor, dinnerware, and food presentation is aesthetically pleasing, and the service was great.

Had noodles. Satay, some cool unusual teas and we were full

Great experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw46fymAE&fid=0x0:0xf29feaa605eb53dd"],"When":"2025-3-28"}]

[{"Name":"K K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZnT5b5z-sslWV-8ydYX4X5TlRTLjrcIMb7CFYaeEZ5_hpOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We’ve been coming here for years.  Quick service and the pho is good.  Price however has gone up like everywhere else.
We the chicken vermicelli this time instead of shrimp.  I still like the shrimp better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvlW8IRLsqGXZrUh0Ale-y&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Vadym Shapran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqVRTHwXS3fb-T0FUdnU85HiChRKAVW59JeQK-g9zMNy9KjtFJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decent place with a sweet vibe. It can get packed, but it’s generally worth the wait since it’s one of the best pho spots in the area. The chicken pho and beef pho (Filet Mignon) really hit the spot, delicious balance of the meat and broth. Overall, great food, good service, and a welcoming atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD__eH-ptFmalXNv8PP1uAM&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Auntie next door","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-LaJSrrcPZYk7vNcucG5wEhQjfPptwsXKROvtEWcL-TmO3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"filet mignon no soup noodle my fav. generous  meat portion, no fat, slightly chewy, but its fine to me, ~$14 before tax. soup noodle was ok, similar to other viet restaurant. the viet coffee with condensated milk was very rich in flavor, be aware if u are sensitive to caffeine bc i stayed awake until 3am after that, still it was good coffee. i love coffee. ststaffwere very efficient and cooperated vy well, they drove the F1 cleansing cart to t
table immediately after customers leaving. expect ~15 mins waiting time during weekend lunch hour","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2SebnUzj3Rcb5mpsC5I6N&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Vietnamese cuisine at Pho Cow Cali in Mira Mesa! We enjoyed the house special pho filet mignon and #3 Rare steak, flank, brisket, tendon & tripe pho. The service was friendly and the food came out quickly. We went at 11am and did not have to wait but when we left there was a line outside. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnMBY7rB8h7zZLW1-xSVA0&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"sham kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdi0gVdVq8oT67qTrkQXovSVa_Ffy6rmAh3Qr2iYYXQDV5p9I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pho Cow Cali is absolutely worth the hype.

While they’re known for their pho (and the prices are amazing), I almost always go for the grilled rice plates—especially the chicken—and they never disappoint. The food is fresh, flavorful, and super satisfying without leaving you feeling heavy or gross afterward. I’ve waited in line for 25–35 minutes—even in the rain—and honestly, it’s always worth it.

The service is incredibly fast once you’re seated, and the inside of the restaurant is surprisingly nice and clean for how busy it gets.

One heads-up: they have a unique reservation system. You don’t just line up—you have to walk up, write your name on a waitlist, and then wait to be called. If you didn’t know that, you might be standing around for nothing. A small inconvenience, but worth mentioning so others don’t miss out.

This spot has easily become one of my go-to places for comfort food that actually feels good to eat. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw9PrMuwE&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-3-24"},{"Name":"Henry J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI96i1uwj2jOqWS3dXS6cZX07own7u1iUmbO8x-DwKJ9MTm9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For just around $12.50, you can get a huge bowl of Pho with so much meat inside. Definitely the best Pho I ever had! Even their broken rice dishes were so delicious, try one of them for takeout like I did. It's very much worth the wait. I'll be coming back next time for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQAPlMIDpEDXD9_J1jZX42&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"RCS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9pceXPDQPKbbJv8g9mxGtzTEisLjv8CIOSKw9pCH55023Tqj9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pho, super fast service, like 2 min fast.   Could use a little more meat but the flavors were awesome.  Rich, little fish saucy, but hits the spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUaxBHokiMO70ZgxFdDV7A&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The weather’s been chilly lately, so I took my mom for a comforting bowl of hot noodle soup to warm up. This Vietnamese spot is always packed, even mid-afternoon on a weekday. We had the beef noodle soup and shrimp-pork rice roll, and both were fantastic. The broth was perfectly balanced, the portions generous, and the flavors authentic. At just $12.50 for a hearty bowl, it’s a steal! Plus, the service is amazing—friendly and attentive. If you’re into Vietnamese pho, this place is a must-try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_q7bj2AE&fid=0x0:0xd212b54d20550bd0"],"When":"2025-1-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is truly unique — it’s a Korean + Japanese fusion–style shabu shabu, and quite different from typical Japanese shabu shabu or hot pot. They offer a soy-marinated crab (ganjang gejang)–inspired broth, which already sets them apart, and it comes with a bowl of their signature rice. The plating and tableware feel very Korean, so the moment you sit down, it really feels like you’re having a Korean-style hot pot. At the same time, the ingredients and overall balance lean more Japanese, and the fusion feels very natural rather than forced.

This is an à la carte restaurant, not all-you-can-eat. Three of us spent about $170 total (around $56 per person), and we were extremely full by the end. 🥩 The meat selection is extensive and high quality. We ordered a small plate of wagyu, a large 32-piece beef platter, and lamb — all were fresh and well-cut. Vegetables are included, which is a nice bonus. We also ordered Japanese skewers, including beef tongue, chicken heart, and pork belly. Everything was cooked perfectly with great seasoning, especially the beef tongue and pork belly — definitely not an afterthought.

🍤 For the appetizer, we chose the garlic shrimp, which was incredibly fragrant. The shrimp were large, juicy, and loaded with garlic flavor, especially good when dipped in sauce.

Each person gets two dipping sauces: a sesame sauce and a soy-based sauce. I personally preferred the sesame one — slightly sweet, very smooth, and perfect with the meat. Service also deserves a shout-out: the staff constantly checked in to see if we needed anything, whether we wanted more broth, and how the food was. Since it was a holiday, they even complimented us with an extra bowl of meatballs, and to finish, they thoughtfully served ice cream for dessert. Overall, the dining experience was excellent 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7ijXQvXvA3t7M6jgKtRAR&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Becky Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV97e1nMZAtmvGjInP68oa9Ln9idmYV60CTjuUxLdc4jkL5Hx1l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came for the lunch special and honestly, it's not that great of a deal. It's only ~$4 cheaper and comes with green tea (which I don't drink, so it was wasted on me). I will say that the service was truly exceptional - everyone was so nice,personable, attentive, and explained everything so clearly. The meat was also noticably high quality. Their portions are also generous. (With free rice/veggies refills.) Would recommend coming with a group so you can mix and match different meat options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz7ev58qeshbFOg2ZADxGh&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Jeana Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrJXqYcdEzcXmBqaHYGJLc82mnuDRVetCHrMeFd1BKv0taXR5-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food, fast service.
We are usually seated right away.
Food comes out fast and they always check in on us.

The appetizers are really good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1wNqzrPdcPpPX8EQPNJr_&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Angela Zapanta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdXaCg-KxZ7QFIrKYqAhEWfRszmGfRwwWxHfXUR_H2MzOKeGMP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had such an amazing experience at Mokkoji! The servers were extremely attentive (Our main server was Tri, and he was super nice) — they made ordering super easy, suggested the best way to get more bang for our buck, and went above and beyond to make sure we were taken care of. They even gave us a big table so we didn’t have to wait long, which we really appreciated.

The food was absolutely delicious — the meat was high quality and so flavorful, and the unlimited veggies, rice, and condiments really tied everything together. Everything tasted fresh and perfectly prepared.

Overall, incredible service and top-tier shabu! Definitely coming back soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWeoT1sIqLFv8caity62zP&fid=0x0:0x55e3e00bdfe8b16a"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing dinner at Mokkoji Shabu Shabu Bar in Mira Mesa! For those of you who don’t know Shabu Shabu is Japanese hot pot. We ordered the surf & turf set sampler for two and chose the seafood platter with lobster, salmon, scallop, shrimp and ordered the New York cut for beef. It also comes with a garlic shrimp appetizer. Everything tasted incredible. Great vibe and atmosphere, all the staff were very friendly and accommodating with our questions, and the food comes quickly. [{"Name":"Josh Baltazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGwLc0426uUtyS_hszBwD6DJIMBgO3FQ0DNqDkJ5w2kX3vUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been here before and this place always hits the spot for Mexican food. This time I ordered online but picked up. I ordered the Hot Cheetos Burrito (carne asada, hot cheetos, cheese, guacamole, pico de gallo and sour cream), 6 Rolled Tacos (guacamole, lettuce, cheese and tomatoes) and a Carne Asada Burrito (Carne asada with guacamole and salsa fresca). All of the food items were pretty solid. Very easy pick up and they had salsa already packed which was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3Jp_mGP5DjBlIW5p-qt-W&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"adi mart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUi4IZLoyTc48BRo-t6oQF03rHMRoVjJ4jD7SsIfNRJVvYfjnSe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came back here for their caldo de res (5/5). We tried their carne asada fries. I think it was still a good portion for 2 people to share, even if It had the least amount of food compared to the other restaurants we had gone. Carne asada had flavor to it,  I just wished the fries were cooked to crisp.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCC69XIDmX5jAOKe7Oj832U&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We came in for a late dinner on a weeknight. Counter service and ordering was a breeze. They have an extensive menu and this place seems popular as it was busy when we were there.

The beef rolled tacos were ok. Maybe it was overcooked because it was hard and no longer crispy. The bacon and cheese breakfast burrito was better.

We also like their salsa options. But it was a mess. The whole restaurant was messy. The table we sat at wasn't cleaned. There was rice and food bits on the floor at other tables too. I should have taken pictures of those tables. The trash can was overflowing. Just felt dirty all around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPNDaUmX4roe1guzhr9rLT&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Daniel Cui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdwWT75jFGgtoUdSl3Qan7TznbiNAaZsduY77uvWF9pJjeQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ive been eating here for over 20yrs. The Food is usually consistant in quality but when the owner is not there the cooks slack off on quality. I ordered a Torta De Milanesa and it was missing the beans , lettuce and they were very shy with the avocado. It was more onion than anything else. Im very disappointed and wont order food again unless the owner is there to manage the kitchen. What a waste of a meal and money for bad quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpbW85gocyAPUt3vBA0jbK&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Rudy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV79Ahjus8RxSvSSqujUf18mvIRXK3qlj2zm8Nwk8vYQA9E5os=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is our go to Mexican spot in Mira Mesa on casual days. It's a no-frills fast food options. Overall customer service can be improved. Food (Burritos, Fajitas, Empanadas etc.) is on point and the salsa bar is great. I have been here multiple times and it's been a hit most of the times.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-pc2hcQ&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2022-12-5"},{"Name":"Richard Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMbMlhQOjlrgS5SB8oET0Nm8XlQYYi9do7zS2p0OKm1oLXOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the menudo on new years day. The serving was huge! It had plenty if meat and very little hominy - just the way I like it. I ordered the corn tortillas. The server brought it out along with limes, cut up onions and cilantro. It was  delicious. I'll definitely be back. They also had a lot of other tasty sounding items on their menu, which I'll also have to try. Very pleased overall. 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James DeCarli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhvkKK7WLjqgVFoURqPIQybOvKWSisb4v8DxinMEFmTKs-5xNP3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing very large burritos and fresh tortillas. I love large burritos and this one was the bomb. Great size and flavor. This was my first time here. I had the shrimp
and octopus burrito 🌯  Amazing flavor, quality, portion, salsa bar, indoor and outdoor seating, music, and atmosphere. Welcoming staff as well. I highly recommend.  I'll be back the next time I'm in the area.

Food choices 10/10, Portion size 10/10, staff courtesy 10/10, quality 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID33bur5QE&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2024-11-18"},{"Name":"Guadalupe Huerta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmZzWDzvt5NkoopYP3UDxsvvaZFqaTKf7X3ED_it7wkvG0yw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent service all the staff very attentive and friendly, they made good recommendations like the surf n turf burrito it was good just it is to BIG. We had carne asada tacos, carnitas and adoba. We also try the quesadilla with carne asada and the horchata it’s delicious. The food comes out fast everything  was great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIwIKkPQ&fid=0x0:0xd9209b23415a8f76"],"When":"2025-4-6"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9uEI70d-oKbQw-O5H1UVgCf4EkIszI2SwlCoTQLCd9VPmRWmD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is popular. Once in, I saw a lot of to go orders from delivery services and take outs.

It took a little longer than expected to get the food, but that's understandable since its lunch time.

The soup was very good.
The dumplings were very good.
The rice and pork was very good.
The service was good, and they were helpful.

Clean Toilets.
Nice clean tables.
Soda machine.
Kiosk for self ordering.
Plenty of parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADpxfS7-P49kcC6LwvlBdo&fid=0x0:0x67209648f505b012"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Rosina Su","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiUj9mf-Fap5baBIMXVl7C-q0g5bAtUhu9RB0Zwo2FYjtE_i5h3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bafang Dumpling — authentic Taiwanese flavors!
Tastes exactly like what I’ve had in Taiwan. The pan-fried dumplings are crispy and delicious, and the wonton soup is very comforting.
The fried chicken cutlet is tasty and aromatic, though slightly overcooked and a bit dry.
The pickled cucumber and daikon side dishes were refreshing.
No additional service charge — great value for the price. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBynw2RdksKaNP2k9n7jkaE&fid=0x0:0x67209648f505b012"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"Sue Duong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTU-8Riyfeaa46Yl_IZyAW2P3po_F4-fknk8W6SDtLmUXKoPBsgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"04-16-2025
My first time being here. Perfect time of arrival, 11:20am, no queue.

Ordered:
#3 $14.95
6 Signature Dumplings
6 Kimchi & Pork Potstickers
Hot & Sour Soup

#7 $13.75
Bafang Signature Noodle
Wonton Soup

Our friends ordered, see receipt. They enjoyed their dishes as much as we did.

Everything was yummy delicious finger licking good! Only draw back, the food took a while even though we were the only customers in the dining room.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCozcfuSQ&fid=0x0:0x67209648f505b012"],"When":"2025-4-19"},{"Name":"S L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOgdeRoCt2ogm0pU2gn6ta7Itetn2-24-mrcB43MQb0mSgHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly the best dumplings, noodles - so good I even ordered them 3 days in a row. Always had it delivered but no issues - food always best quality and even tastes good the next day.  Corn / chicken, pork dumplings - delicious.  spicy and non-spicy wontons - delicious.  Same for the spicy and signature noodles - so good. Food isn't that spicy - but you can always add more. Definitely recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Orlando Tellez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWG8dbEw2t7aTsBoY1MSHzXflg1mnTEZtSUXfbFYMErhAkwp51h4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bufang Dumpling is a fast food restaurant but the food they serve is delicious its ran by about 5 mexicans and play mexican music really loud
lol, but mexicans make the best dumplings lol.
I highly recomend. Bufang Dumplibg. I will be coming back to make this place my place to go for dumplings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALzZCgsd_ZeSnfKZ0mJ9BN&fid=0x0:0x67209648f505b012"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent Chinese food at Bafang Dumpling! The restaurant was very busy so you may need to wait for a seat, you order at the front and they give you a buzzer. We ordered the combo #4 with signature noodles, kimchi and pork potstickers, beef dry noodle, chili peppered fried chicken, veggie dumplings and soy awesome and soy tiger bobas for drinks. Everything tasted great. The service was very friendly and quick. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQuKPjZg&fid=0x0:0x67209648f505b012"],"When":"2025-3-8"},{"Name":"julio m","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItYBOAFy7wIDKD4P85Z5gt9lKWZtWvXs9j7LoEZavb2D_vqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my favorite places!!!
I just love the kimchi and pork pot stickers, the flavor is just great, and when you dip'em in a black vinegar and soy sauce mix... It's delicious!!
The atmosphere is fine, my family and me feel quite comfortable there; although some times it gets a bit crowded, as could be expected!!
The staff is very attentive, they answer easily ane questions, and make sure you get exactly what you order.
The price is very reasonable, and the food is fresh -my main reason to like this spot!!
There is plenty of parking, even if you need to recharge your EV.
I would recommend the dry noodle beef bowl, the noodles are very good and the beef has a flavor that gets complemented nicely with the hot sauce they have.
Definitely a good place for a quick bite, I am a recurring customer!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Caplin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkAQ1FmkOQUt4nGgyry2_U0TQSwpE4nboQWIvlkK99nq3TLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm happy Bafang has made its way to Mira Mesa! It definitely has Taiwanese fast food energy. We always order online and pick up and it is easy to do. I like the old fashioned noodles, potstickers, and wonton soup. I also loved the soy wild mango and I'm devastated they took their drinks off the menu 😭","Images":null,"When":""}]
