[{"Name":"Lunai Wellness Center","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhq5ngR3IrYs-AjmBbmIDAUaHHHeZofzOC7QmzY2pUb0RZ_f0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Allison and Edgar were very helpful . They were patient while our group was indecisive haha. We had a company dinner. And I always recommend this place to my patients because the food is very healthy and very good. We eat here almost every week! And plus we have the same company name which even makes it even more cute and awesome !

Lunai Wellness Center Team ! 💪","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVbthKifpoFiVcRri-abbf&fid=0x0:0x30c5ccbd52f5a387"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Gael Rios","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUr3T56GR1KTehDkgjzpbBe7T8bSW3EiZtjdqxux2qXhRmB9o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Linda and Cinthia made my visit smooth and fast.
They greeted me right away.
They stayed positive during a busy rush.
They explained the menu clearly.
They handled my order with care and accuracy.

Food came out hot and correct.
Service felt welcoming and personal.

Linda and Cinthia set the standard for customer service.
They made Luna Grill a place I want to return to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iman Hamidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw_O0ZbwASYF4pfDDYnJgxN41COWsZ6KVjU5IhPiH6NifoUR8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service here is consistently great. Everyone is friendly, welcoming, and genuinely nice every single time, which makes a big difference.

On top of that, the food is always fresh, well-prepared, and full of flavor. Orders are accurate, come out quickly, and the overall experience is smooth and reliable.

Easily one of my favorite spots nearby and a place I’m always happy to come back to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yasmin Lucky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7Qr9u46ECkxeVFuPERDsc26xo1xCExyC3EOKntMYghxGwgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here on 10/26/25 with my friends and Mom trying to be healthy.

The place is well lit, clean,  and quiet. Even the bathrooms are clean and you know that's hard to find.

The music was good too.

I usually order from here for my team monthly lunches since they are healthy and tasty.

My Mom ordered a Greek salad with pita bread & no protein and I ordered a Bistro beef kabob plate which came with a house salad, a lot of food,  & tzatziki salad.

We also ordered 2 drinks and I mixed mind with sprite and one of their lemonades which brought happiness to my mouth.

Everything was delicious and I didn't even know they bring your food to you.

The price for my Mom and I was $47.55, but due to my rewards, I got $30 off. Score!!

My friends liked their food as well!

I'll always order from them due to their consistent service and quality.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rudy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV79Ahjus8RxSvSSqujUf18mvIRXK3qlj2zm8Nwk8vYQA9E5os=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My favorite kabob spot was closed and Luna grill had been on my list of places to try for a while. Went with great expectation and was utterly disappointed.

Bistro Beef wasn't tender at all and low-key strained my jaws. Chicken was just okay and not flavorful.  Pita bread was hard and definitely did not taste fresh.

I really wanted to find a backup Mediterranean spot and this ain't it. Will give it another try, hoping for an improved experience.

Service was friendly. Visited on a Wednesday late evening and it wasn't crowded.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYuM69zwE&fid=0x0:0x30c5ccbd52f5a387"],"When":"2025-5-1"},{"Name":"Humbe B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUq6I_ZR5zeFbdu_Db9olt3GZxTbfOhPtEwe4_xRg6aDiDrTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Luna Grill is hands-down our family's favorite, and it's no wonder why – the Mediterranean food is consistently so good, so huge props to the chefs for crafting such delicious dishes! Beyond the incredible cuisine, what truly elevates every visit is the exceptional hospitality by Linda the manager, whose genuine warmth always makes us feel like valued customers, and Marlon, their attentive, top-notch service ensures everything is perfect. We keep coming back and wholeheartedly recommend this gem for an amazing meal where you're treated right!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMq496-FroflYQ&fid=0x0:0x30c5ccbd52f5a387"],"When":"2025-6-2"},{"Name":"Michelle Porras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhnt9hz3iCYRIJcQ4-Uc3vnTTYxc0vmbIo1RADQiVI4uR7tQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here at Luna Grill. Found this place online, perfect spot for dinner after attending the airshow.  The chicken, beef, and shrimp are all very flavorful.  I especially enjoyed the peach salad. Rian took our order, he's very kind and welcoming. We sat outside because the dining room is packed. Rian took the time to come outside and ask how everything was. Thank you Rian for your hospitality.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Randorff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoHKko7C_uLc69qSDMLiS8eC_3VaBeEUxSlTfrp34McH_LZb4W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very friendly and helpful service from Grace and Allison. The food was excellent! I always am hesitant to get chicken, because it usually ends up dry, but their grilled chicken was tender, juicy, and very flavorful with just the right amount of char. The Mediterranean salad was delightful and so refreshing.

Luna Grill will be on our list of go-to places in Mira Mesa!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHuN36Eg&fid=0x0:0x30c5ccbd52f5a387"],"When":"2024-9-1"}]

Sorry this is something new to me last time it wasn't like this. I thought they only do service charge automatic tip 18% if u have 5 more ppl . I was sitting at the bar for only 1 person. N also this is today Monday.thats it just wanna share it. Just fyi if u visit","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8rDBg0nipVS5dfxiMYeDN&fid=0x0:0x4364d8a01e456304"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend took me here for their happy hour special. We sat in the bar area and had a very nice waiter. I ordered a glass of merlot and it was not very good. I ended up having a blood orange lager that was delicious after.

The restaurant was not busy on a weeknight so it was relatively quiet. We had the popcorn shrimp, crab poppers, and sausage sliders. We like the popcorn shrimps but will skip the sliders next time.

We ordered the Bucket for One combo and the SNS (Snow Crab and Shrimp) bucket. Both were perfect for 1-2 people.  I really like the huge amount of garlic and all the flavors in the sauces. So yummy!
We also ordered the jambalaya. It was a huge proportion and we only ate about ⅓ of it. It'll be perfect for lunch the next day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_9duXGw&fid=0x0:0x4364d8a01e456304"],"When":"2025-1-18"},{"Name":"A Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTV_45MCIcZ7vk4T9chuUEFulo5NCkAI2RgWcxf1ZyK6ZT89Us7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last weekend, we decided to go for a crab bake at Crab Hut and ended up sampling two of their enticing dishes. The restaurant was a well-organized space adorned with a charming oceanic theme.  We ended up sitting outside in the sun and it was amazing, although the interior was equally inviting. Parking was a breeze, especially if you opt for the southern end of the lot rather than vying for a spot directly in front of the establishment.

Our dining experience kicked off with stellar customer service. It's worth noting that a gratuity of 18% is automatically included in the bill—an arrangement we found reasonable given the exceptional service we received. In fact, our waitress went above and beyond, promptly seating us with a warm smile and attending to our needs with remarkable attentiveness. Despite the tip being pre-added, we felt inclined to add more as a token of appreciation for the outstanding service.

Turning to the food, we started with a serving of calamari and fries. While the portion sizes justified the price, we found the calamari lacking in flavor and seemed overcooked. However, the fries salvaged the appetizer, boasting a satisfying crunch and delightful seasoning.

For our main courses, we opted for the Spicy Cajun Pasta and the Spicy Jambalaya. Both dishes were executed flawlessly, with the pasta perfectly cooked and infused with just the right amount of spice to complement the succulent shrimp. The Jambalaya, teeming with an abundance of seafood and meat, surprised us with its robust flavor profile. Though I would have preferred a bit more heat, the dish still left a lasting impression.

In conclusion, our dining escapade at Crab Hut left us with a generally positive impression. While the appetizer fell short of expectations, the exceptional service and well-prepared entrees more than made up for it. We look forward to revisiting Crab Hut in the future for another taste of their enticing seafood offerings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID90-aFTw&fid=0x0:0x4364d8a01e456304"],"When":"2024-3-20"},{"Name":"Leslie Ann Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmyy_nX3nAzykrs6ljnlVVwYl7Cm9q8u7_IM4a_x8SF3bUbTlD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time we dine at Crab Hut, it’s always a hit! The quality of the food never disappoints — it always hits the spot. This time, we ordered the Spicy Cajun Chicken Pasta and the S “N” S, and both were delicious.

The service is consistently great, and the food is always fresh, flavorful, and satisfying. Crab Hut continues to be one of our go-to spots for a reliably great meal and experience!","Images":null,"When":""}]

went back again & took more pictures & attached those here(:","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwwKuENg&fid=0x0:0x882ccc5ceb8166b7"],"When":"2025-3-15"},{"Name":"Ayla M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7OL6eHZyLhqIoFybCyz6m-GdnQSlm0TNsBR4dN7nJZrPl2Xzi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered for takeout and the staff were nice. The restaurant is clean and I love the mural! The food is super fresh and tasty. I highly recommend. The baked sushi is the best baked sushi I've ever gotten and their nigiri is soo good it melts in your mouth.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7xNWdGg&fid=0x0:0x882ccc5ceb8166b7"],"When":"2024-8-12"},{"Name":"Justin Fan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSW7AloYFq75g_4ANOhsDza1o5zNZCzrJrsMJrAfVchGGz1pbk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food: 4.5/5
Service and Setting: 4.5/5
Value: 3.5/5

Tora Tora is the newest sushi restaurant that has opened up in Mira Mesa and they make great sushi. The interior of the restaurant is modern and clean, showing some personality with Funko figures hidden around the register area. To me, the dining area is chic while not being sterile, an issue that many restaurants have when going this direction. I find the seating situation to be awkward, but that is nitpicking at this point. The lady at the register was super kind and chill. When I asked her if the squid legs were made in house she just straight up said no and same with a couple other items I asked about. I appreciate her for being real and letting me try items that they craft themselves!

Salmon Belly Truffle: 5/5
This truly amazed me. At it’s price point, I was not expecting much. The fish was so soft and fresh while having a luxurious truffle flavor. The main star of the show was the rice though. This is something I would expect in an omakase only level restaurant. It was the perfect temperature and texture, each grain of rice bouncy yet soft like a mini piece of rice cake. The rice was lightly seasoned and made the roll impossibly delicious. If they are consistent with their rice, they will probably be one of the best sushi restaurants in San Diego at any price point. My favorite so far and a very opulent experience.

Baked Dynamite: 5/5
Again, high quality ingredients. What impressed me the most was that the dynamite sauce they used tasted very faintly of mayo and had a wonderfully light umami flavor. The seafood used in the dynamite, though they are scrap pieces for sure, are of high quality and fresh. Scallops, end pieces of fish, and I’m sure whatever else they have are respectfully cooked, holding the integrity of the ingredients and their flavors. They purposely do not use things like onions that are used to mask poor quality or old seafood and I 100% appreciate that. Must get.

Miso Soup: 2/5
Standard miso soup. Came out pretty cold and meh. It was a nice accompaniment to the sushi though.

Wasabi Mac’ Salad: 1.5/5
Tasted like grocery market mac salad with sour wasabi. I wish they tried harder on this for sure.

Green Tea Tiramisu: 3.5/5
I got the inside scoop that they do not make this in store, but it was good! The matcha was light and not bitter. It was not overly sweet and felt cohesive, a word that is not familiar to many fusion desserts. I probably would give this a solid 4, but it was frozen solid so it tasted a bit dry since the lady fingers at the bottom did not have a chance to hydrate. A solid dessert if you wanted a complete experience here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOiPeEpwE&fid=0x0:0x882ccc5ceb8166b7"],"When":"2022-6-26"},{"Name":"Tony Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkLeLzSnvSoqFF_ge1ocur8XPgK6zB2xJWj2rqqKJVKkDTGNjuqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Parking: We had dinner at 8pm on a Friday and there were plenty of parking in the shopping plaza
Ambience: Loud, upbeat. Great for take outs but a bit too small to dine in with more than 2 people
Service: The service was Amazing! Very attentive and love the follow ups.
Food: y of the freshest Sushi ever I’ve had
Supports Military: No Discount
Overall: Both food and service was on point here. I would definitely recommend and return to try more items on their menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh-pPxsQE&fid=0x0:0x882ccc5ceb8166b7"],"When":"2023-3-7"},{"Name":"Bonnie Ye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPMma_MhhRbmmk_eCLt_9ZhOaoAMUkmiW9IaBXVwXz64s3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I come here often to get crunchy roll, California roll, mango habanero roll and gyoza. The service has been consistent . It’s a small restaurant with unique decor. There’s plenty of parking out front. I’ll continue to go back when i crave some crunchy rolls.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christina DLP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCcqQ1A_OgkS0sJtmwOtf8aleNOVovfIYAgs7HxDAT3EcrflyMxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food, fresh and hot. The price is very reasonable. I wish there were more Sashimi options. Mostly bowl options. Small seating space inside. I think this place is more of a pick up food location. But there was no wait for us on Friday night. Plenty of parking. And the staff are top notch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxvLzVdA&fid=0x0:0x882ccc5ceb8166b7"],"When":"2023-5-13"},{"Name":"Becky Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV97e1nMZAtmvGjInP68oa9Ln9idmYV60CTjuUxLdc4jkL5Hx1l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This has become one of my favorite sushi places. The prices are very fair, especially for the great quality you get. Loved the presentation. We got the nigiri, salmon truffle roll, and mango habanero albacore roll with garlic fried rice and miso soup. Everything was, hands down, incredible. The nigiri was of great quality. Our friend got the baked dynamite, wasabi mac, and seaweed salad. We finished everything. It's a great take-out place as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOtZ2i-wE&fid=0x0:0x882ccc5ceb8166b7"],"When":"2022-7-10"}]

[{"Name":"California Dreamer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIYEE_yvX2s57knX8nIzLccGhZrytIRKJS-0iEhxyBnoMW68mrCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience. Quick seating, service with a smile. The salt and pepper wings were pretty good 4/5. Pho was excellent this visit, much improved from prior experiences. 4.5/5.

They had a cool little robot that helps carry trays to customers. Menu is extensive, but almost always visit for the pho. Vietnamese iced coffee was served traditional style (not premixed/made in the kitchen). 5/5

Overall experience was excellent. Highly recommend 5/5.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIAMXJ8qHQs4NMZLcLC3GR&fid=0x0:0xe24753798bbf657a"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Rebecca Gonzales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUle1iNr7i-1zFQJgStEi_SUfty4qInbzcJK7b6ZZPftzL_BjInzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My son and I eat at the Mira Mesa location every Thursday. We usually order the chicken pho and rare steak pho. We decided to order our pho to go. When we got home they didn't add the rare steak. I called and let them know. I asked if I needed to take a picture and was told I needed to send a picture of the broth. Nothing else. My husband went to pick up what should have been a new order, as every restaurant does, but was sent raw meat. I went to ask for a refund and they told me I had to bring back the entire order. I took them back the raw meat. The least they could have done is sent new broth. So I then told them I wanted my whole order refunded. They called the owner, Duke, and he said I could contact his attorney! I was accused of lying. This restaurant has lost two loyal patrons that ate there every Thursday. We would sometimes go in twice a week. We took all our family to try pho.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvyC894KT6cDKE0_z8ruUz&fid=0x0:0xe24753798bbf657a"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Tracy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURaZ-0datmgHY-TkGOLpYDztzCSIurxBlsNR-L93BYAA6UT3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We came here today just for a casual meal. It took 10 minutes before anyone even brought us a glass of water. The soup noodles had yellowish, not-fresh broccoli, and the carrots had a sour, spoiled taste. We mentioned this twice, and eventually the supervisor only replaced the broccoli and carrots. Honestly, I won’t be coming back here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBi4KeBwO0IU9_sFnpK3EB7&fid=0x0:0xe24753798bbf657a"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"John Tanner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZhEb39PbK5K2U6gBqiQvJ23j9Ia33vMMeDfurPOFsVV9fmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The food is good but do not order online.  They charge 3 additional fees.  A 'convenience fee' plus a 'carry out fee' followed by a 'pick up fee' once you arrive.  The fees totaled roughly $4 additional dollars. This is prior to any tip if you feel so inclined on a take out order.  Might as well ordered through uber or doordash same cost","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Hogan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXxsffdrESX6CmtdGSX6F3w_Fhj0a2cze1AYutGOLgcrSgFZV2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pho Ca Dao - Comfort in a Bowl, Bright and Early

Pho Ca Dao never disappoints! The pho here is absolutely delicious—rich, savory broth with just the right balance of spice and freshness. The beef was tender and thinly sliced, and the herbs and toppings came crisp and vibrant, just begging to be stirred in.

One of the best parts? They open early! It’s the perfect spot to grab a warm, comforting bowl of pho to start your day right. Service is quick and friendly, and the space feels laid-back and welcoming.

Whether you're an early bird or just in need of a reliable, tasty bowl of pho, Pho Ca Dao hits the spot every time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDotqnXIw&fid=0x0:0xe24753798bbf657a"],"When":"2025-4-24"},{"Name":"Charles Blevins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIRrioR7SzjDW6R30li3LTLGreLtGPFXYADC9dVxVsSEvBTrfP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Oder pho soup and egg rolls for carry out. Paid online and when I got there they charged me more money stating price changed. This is bad business for what is stated you should not pay more. The pho soup lacked flavor and could have been warmer. The egg rolls my wife thinks were good but I have had better. We both agree that we both have had better pho soup.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arief Ramon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR2ETchaY9IPOmjaUnhWlzngH-SIxvT_Xa7nVlHSPFydCH6jR2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A San Diego institution for authentic, family-owned Vietnamese food. Their traditional Pho features a rich, deep-flavored broth and fresh ingredients. Generous portions and friendly service make this a reliable comfort food spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClhsirPg&fid=0x0:0xe24753798bbf657a"],"When":"2023-11-17"},{"Name":"Kamran Bigdely","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqqecHcDHTpT7RXZPmmIK-rdfvt7edkmVNTfRzJKkgMDb9a4ej=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wish I could give it 6 stars because their food was surprisingly delicious. We ordered their popular items (photos attached). Quick service and friendly staff. Lots of parking spots.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX5rWpHQ&fid=0x0:0xe24753798bbf657a"],"When":"2024-10-26"}]

[{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tasty Vietnamese breakfast at Thien Huong at Mira Mesa! We really enjoyed the special 2 roll with egg, pork, and ground shrimp and the Chao 2 with meatball, Vietnamese ham, eggs and hot dog. The egg coffee and ube coffee were also quite yummy. Friendly and sweet staff with quick service. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPPMc6ceVZwVF_3QKYiTZv&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Sue Duong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTU-8Riyfeaa46Yl_IZyAW2P3po_F4-fknk8W6SDtLmUXKoPBsgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"01/16/2026
My niece wanted to take me out to celebrate my birthday; I chose this place. We ordered pork roll $13.50 and shrimp roll $14.50. Both were yummy delicious as always!

07-28-2025
Both dishes (Special #1 and #8) we ordered were fulfilling, fresh and delicious! We’ll stop by again if we are in the area.

12-02-24
-Shrimp roll $14- very tasty shrimp flavor. I couldn’t get enough of it. Steamed pork loaf and fried pork loaf accompanied the plate were a perfect combination along with blanched bean sprouts and chopped cucumber.
-Special Combo #1- my significant other enjoyed his dish, especially the fried dough that came with it.
-Three color bean dessert $5.66- refreshing. Loved the coconut milk. Most places nowadays use half and half which I don’t care for.

I always enjoy the food here. It’s yummy delicious whether I dine here or order a party tray to take home.

Looking forward to returning for more delicious tasty shrimp roll!

10-09-23
I would not have come in here if my friend hadn’t recommended (not located in a popular plaza, opened Dec 2022). We met up for lunch after her hair appointment next door. Glad I agreed to meet her here because I had a great experience: reasonable price, yummy food, pleasant staff and clean all round.

Food:
-With pork $12
-With Shrimp $13.50
-Special #1 $14.50 take to go

Looking forward to sharing this hidden gem with my family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC51JCgVw&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2023-10-10"},{"Name":"P P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo6Cu-owH69pfSp6Eok-G1sCA5rWtzKzx9zjTSM4zgDmbGgws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"comforting food!  Just your friendly and convenient neighborhood restaurant that you have to visit! I love it the steam rolls a lot. Will return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzbPOx8MjSFt1zOoMxH5Cu&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Sandy Tathanhlong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVrHgeZLJsdHLToem5OCocE6DeMp7EF4bEkZgJ3uD_CQoqFgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent banh cuon! Very soft and fresh. It's getting harder and harder to find good, non-stale, banh cuon. The fillings were super tasty. Note that the shrimp is fresh shrimp, not dry. The nuoc mam (fish sauce) was wonderfully tasty while not having an overpowering garlic flavor. Because they're made fresh, expect to wait a bit, but the wait is not terribly long. This place gets busy and they don't have a ton of space. Maybe about 10 to 15 tables. If all tables are filled, they'll start their waitlist outside on a clip board.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBby_WjayvIOPAGcw1wgYDk&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2025-6-17"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update review - This is my second time to try out this restaurant and it is much better than my first experience. We had a Chao 1 and a Special 2, both of them are delicious. The service is nice and friendly. The store is not big but very clean. This restaurant is from the owner’s family recipe, it is unique and exclusive. You should come to try it out.
Previous review- So many people recommend this place. We were thinking to come here last Saturday for lunch hut line was so long. We had to wait for 45 minute to get the food, so we left and chose a weekday to have lunch here. I think the foods here are nice and unique but it is a little bit overrated. I don’t think it’s worthy to wait 45 minute for their foods. But if you are curious, it’s still nice to try. I love their fried Mung bean Fritters the most. The egg & shrimp rolls’ taste are kinda bland.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR-Pb6Aw&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2023-3-25"},{"Name":"Jake Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTCof5dkHG71kvmC0uzk65Ucg6d7wcuFaQfmi1wxGDno7B6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious, unique and affordable!
The space is counter service, clean and casual. The service was quick, brought us water to our table despite being counter service which was really nice.
The Banh Mi Chao #1 was something I never had. The meatballs and beef were so flavorful and the sauce mixed with eggs is delicious.
The Special #2 was very good, the banh cuon with egg  and pork and the banh cuon with shrimp were soft, warm, filling and all at an affordable price. Overall, amazing food and place that you can't easily find in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQorSb2AE&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2025-3-10"},{"Name":"Jesse Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqc4Js_hbpSJyGd7HxE4_GSDRsIjYI5FHNMKdapkO7Vpm1mm0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The steam rice rolls with sausage and egg was fun to eat, the overall taste is on the sweet side. Some of my friends have a problem of eating sweet sausage.

If you are new to this kind of food, order a sample plate to try before getting one for everyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDNpoPSFQ&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2024-1-22"},{"Name":"Ashley LeBourveau-Truong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0u2T4zSOaaQ77zoO-dfuL5-qqx5rC7UHPgMwupzcA0Vz1NZ_IfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great menu options that aren't common to find other places. We read that it can get very busy and it was filling up by the time we left, but when we got there there was no wait at all.

The food was pretty good. The combos are very big so might be good for sharing - we each got one and thought we ordered too much food. Loved the egg coffee!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZ8I6e3QE&fid=0x0:0xbcc70a27635664ac"],"When":"2023-9-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mia Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLoKuN0uz9NocpbP113iBvVJspr1W6mF4b-Z-_RMrF9bjxLpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious authentic Vietnamese food. One of the best in San Diego. They have a great outdoor area as well. We been here once a while ago but the owner still recognizes us. She is very sweet and welcoming.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB91IJve_gHZZmqhA1He34q&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Tran Vo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUC7mM_QAAoOE7Zs6ywMCpnPCMYdyF1-Dh1Zo_w3cZhRfmS1ODI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"i ordered Bun Bo Hue and it's good, trust, i'm Viet and more people should come try this place out, my friends also ordered Com Suon and Bun Rieu, they are all very decent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuuHqUaOZ2AcGU9Nyy1ZOF&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"My Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-o38aNqhmbPRZUZYMfBXJ4xFkgUX4l-cE6T9emtIIZJWEKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The menu keeps changing as they are still figuring out what works and what doesn’t work.

We came at peak lunch time on a Saturday and our food came out quick.

We ordered:
-Chicken wing garlic fish sauce: This was crispy and seasoning was right on. We liked how it was fried and wanted to try other flavors but got too full.
-Broken rice grilled pork: Loved that they offer legit broken rice, the bbq pork was nicely char and moist. The egg loaf was a bit dry.
-Bánh canh tôm cua: least favorite out of all. The broth has a thick consistency similar to egg drop soup with starchy tapioca noodles. Broth wasn’t as flavorful as other places and lacking more shrimp flavors.
-Crispy fried egg noodle w beef: Can’t go wrong with this dish. Crispy noodles with veggies on top.
-Periwinkle snails in coconut milk: wow, the portion was generous. I prefer the curry broth to be more curry-like, it was more of a watered down coconut curry.
-mussels with green onion sauce: This was prepared nicely. You must dip in their sauce to get the whole experience.

For drinks, I got the coconut coffee I tasted the coffee and coconut flavors, wasn’t too sweet. My friend got the coconut kumquat. She likes that it was refreshing and they used whole kumquats with the skin. She also tasted a bit of lemon and preferred it to be more sour and not so sweet.

Overall, this place gives you a glimpse of Vietnamese street food. I like the seafood items. Reminds me of night market. If we come back, I’ll get the escargot just because those are bigger than the snails and less effort to eat.

You can enter from the parking lot or through the supermarket.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJe7tMv_5tTZAQ&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-6-16"},{"Name":"Ryan D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdfjcPkhaFqaTw4MIUF5DcfGkNF2JxFLHSBqvy54mJIb19hGQC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Wanted to try this place out based on some recommendations. The sizzling Platter with the steak and pate was amazing. I'm sad they didnt have Razor Clams this time, but we got the escargot and the scallops. Would come again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYkd2DUw&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-5-4"},{"Name":"H N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5kfzXMmIPRUl9lAxwQfIYW72LAKxLY1ysx0ClbIeK88iiyu8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Saigon Corner is an absolute gem for Vietnamese cuisine, and their Bò Né is a standout dish. This dish is absolutely incredible—served sizzling hot on a cast iron plate with sardines, eggs, pâté, and that buttery, savory sauce that ties everything together perfectly. Pair it with the warm, crusty baguette they serve on the side, and you’ve got a meal that hits all the right notes.

The flavors are rich and comforting, with just the right amount of spice and balance. You can tell it’s made with care and attention to detail. It’s the kind of dish that keeps you coming back for more.

The staff at Saigon Corner are incredibly friendly and welcoming. They always greet you with a smile and provide attentive, caring service throughout your meal. It’s clear they go out of their way to make you feel like family, creating a warm, inviting atmosphere every time you visit.

If you’re craving real Vietnamese food or just want to try something new, Saigon Corner is a must visit. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwl6rOzAE&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Phuong Duong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTm-bydOUQukoBAdzXRRbbMeNK9jrfh9go1SB6SMxpUrxAQlU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly service, excellent authentic Vietnamese street food with 99% taste accuracy. Their mi cay reminds me about familiar Vietnamese ingredients used in every street food vendor in Vietnam. Must try da me, earl grey, corn milk. They all win my heart!!! Worth to try 👍👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDg26aI-QE&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-2-27"},{"Name":"Nhu Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDCggTefzlhxQEzkGyVXJmZPZWj1x-V9AEdObu_1h0hiCxb6Gg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great authentic Vietnamese noodle dishes! Good portion and friendly staff as well :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAkOEBZ40zcT4Q0AE5ujiTV&fid=0x0:0xf226f5803a89d96d"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"Katie Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2Kx7Q-2rja-q2ch0HtK4SuVLq96PZNpz8xu6VidSRCoYcu9CoRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a great local Vietnamese spot in heart of Mira Mesa! Give it a try. Their noodle soups are so flavorful and com suong is the best! Amazing price and huge portion too!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXC9I83WEgm87U-Bc9JFUdFZKAUZeviv6sAhtnu0QgpHdqdrMfq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"have avoided coming here for years because it always looks insanely busy but surprisingly did not take long to get a table! service was fast and our waiter repeatedly checked in on us which was great! food was good! not pictured is an assorted sashimi salad that was absolutely delicious i 100% recommend it!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCy9_nPq1Ja42xsROPZGvoN&fid=0x0:0x10648b04a68e4864"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Zach Siegrist","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVPXEfqIOQ4sCykUiEISOFlUAyUplRuIEWNcGsNbkntisdpID-6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great all you can eat sushi option - the fish is fresh and honestly big portions! For AYCE, the fish to rice ratio is great and if you wanted you can pay ~$12 more pp to do the sashimi option which we will do the next time! Service is fast and super nice! The restaurant itself is a bit chaotic and loud (of course) but again, loved the experience and will be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIruwIroGYPLK7vEjwX5K0&fid=0x0:0x10648b04a68e4864"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"stanley ho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTG9xV1owWYm_JGuTGCPNYi-Txw27Iy5VB3f0Fl9RN0N4cPFI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Little Sakana in Mira Mesa is a solid choice when you’re craving all‑you‑can‑eat sushi without a long wait. The standout here is definitely the fast and efficient service—orders come out quickly, and the staff keeps things moving, which is great for an AYCE spot.
As for the food, it’s good but not particularly memorable. The sushi is fresh enough and the menu has plenty of variety, but nothing really stands out as exceptional. It gets the job done if you’re hungry, but it’s not the type of place you go to for a special sushi experience.
Overall, it's a dependable choice for a quick AYCE fix, especially if you value speed and consistency. The food is okay, the service is great, and you’ll leave full.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnVjIBAySLp5RFEKiUuRHJ&fid=0x0:0x10648b04a68e4864"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Liz Noska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn6RSLb-im1Y50mNE_ITBHzXyMVdHklC9YjI7qfAxDXGG9ifPU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved our food and had such a fun experience! [{"Name":"Richard R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5q5trGJ3itme82ke2tnUhGp84rNcFHbHpMod8lqpEcqfce-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had never been here before and had a wonderful lunch! I wish we had seen that they had fountain drinks before paying $3.99 each for 2 cans of Diet Pepsi however!  The servers were friendly and helpful when the brought the food to the table and then checking in on us again.

The shrimp salad bowl was great with a large amount of grilled shrimp. My tuna was a bit overcooked but still delicious. The two sides I chose were the tomatoes, which were great sprinkled with bits of cheese, and the street corn, nicely spiced but could have used a little cheese as well.

Overall great service, reasonably priced, great food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBkCunBRoicStLy6T9xDE2g&fid=0x0:0x5236c12dd5f1cf18"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Sinh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrtf1dsjm06cEhkQs0bKFWtjb-xJxIwditkSqQtjoHla1XDE9P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"WHYYYYY ???

Taco trio was very good.
Clam chowder was very good.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ryan Rupley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUSeAQp_X7ZHy4hXIAeMVQVpkeF59zlew2hzp_am9EzpCgVRws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"📍 Location & Timing
•	Visited on a Saturday around 6 PM
•	Not overly crowded, but steadily filling up
•	Strong takeout traffic, yet service stayed fast and organized

🍽️ Food Ordered
🍲 Hot & Sour Soup
•	Great depth of flavor
•	Nice mix of tofu strips and textures
•	Mild-to-moderate spice — flavorful without being overwhelming
🍚 Yang Chow (Combination) Fried Rice
•	Solid taste and well-cooked
•	Only small note: could use a bit more meat for the price
🥬 Bamboo Shoots & Mushroom Veggie Mix
•	Cooked perfectly
•	Sauce paired really well with the vegetables
🍗 Salt & Pepper Chicken Wings
•	Lived up to the hype
•	Still crunchy after a 20-minute drive home
•	Well-seasoned and easily the standout dish

💰 Price & Portions
•	About $20 per item
•	Portions are very generous
•	Each dish could realistically stretch into multiple meals
•	Clearly meant for sharing — strong value overall

🚗 Takeout Experience
•	Food was still hot, fresh, and crunchy when we got home
•	Packaging held up well

✅ Final Take
•	Clean restaurant
•	Efficient staff
•	Excellent food quality and portion sizes
•	Highly recommend whether you dine in or take it to go

👍 Definitely a spot worth returning to if you’re in the Mira Mesa area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoktQqgP2AwFpMIXj0U3eb&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ken Nix - LEVERAGE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6xQvQTGoWSbeXh_Gth974wRwQwMG9JAg6Ii4rfcY3FrEUjZc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have to say, Golden Chopsticks absolutely blew me away. From the moment we sat down, everything about our experience was fantastic. The food was just on another level. Every single dish we ordered was spot on. The sweet and sour chicken had the perfect crunch with just the right amount of tangy sweet sauce, the cream cheese wontons were golden, crispy, and bursting with flavor, the broccoli beef was tender and seasoned beautifully, and the orange chicken was one of the best I have had in years, crispy, flavorful, and not overly heavy. The fried rice was so good it could have been a meal all by itself, and even the tea was comforting and perfect.

My wife and my granddaughter both raved about it just as much as I did. We all agreed this was hands down one of the best meals we have shared in a long time, and it felt extra special because we were all enjoying it together. The portions were huge, more than enough to leave us full and still have a huge amount to bring home to enjoy the next day. It was just as delicious when we heated it up. The prices were shockingly reasonable for the quality and quantity of food. It is rare these days to find a place that serves such high quality food while still being very economical, but Golden Chopsticks nailed it.

On top of the food, the people there were absolutely amazing. Friendly, welcoming, and genuinely happy to make sure we had a great experience. I honestly have not had Chinese food this good in over 15 years, back when a close friend of ours owned a restaurant in Portland. This meal brought me right back to those days, and I could not be happier that we found this place.

This was, without a doubt, one of the best Chinese restaurant experiences I have ever had. Between the incredible flavors, the huge portions, the great prices, and the wonderful people, I cannot recommend Golden Chopsticks enough. We will definitely be back, and next time we will be bringing more family and friends to share in this amazing find","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVTdxfJ6updgxntiJFg0yI&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Sina Ejlali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaDm8jHhXCIVQw_pUyAvWm3fH7PwqdSqj9QWDIX0g64awKSA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I tried the famous wings, and the crisp was genuinely impressive. Unfortunately, the chicken itself didn’t match the hype. The inside was surprisingly plain and lacked seasoning, which felt unusual since many Asian restaurants excel at well-marinated dishes.

I also noticed that the prices listed on the menu didn’t match what I was charged. The total on the receipt was almost 20% higher.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCNqnrPVXHd9XpugU_UFzT3&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Ellie PG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQOSd6SpUc00MaPewn10APdzhYCHwHVTQhSkb-IdzJTtrkRF44rA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Honey walnut shrimp was deep fry with some kind of thick breading!?
Pork Egg Foo Yong, has no pork to be found in the mixed, full of fried flour, Orange Chicken - sliver of chicken, I can guess deep in flour twice to make it bigger. I've been eating here, taking take out orders for years. But today horrible, I spent  about $130 something and I just couldn't eat it. The real cook has probably not shown up today.

They might say, why haven't you brought it back ? I ordered today to address my craving for Chinese food, and has no time to cook so I ordered, drove and pick it up. Im heading to work now and has no time to bring it back.
One photo attached of The Shrimp Walnut, sauce was on the side. The breading on the shrimp? Not what I remember 😕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2Dcc4DS1_2OlSHP3sdvH6&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"MEGHAN CUMA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrSNFSVXfmFdCo4qp9YOYQ4qp-R5S_svuQRy0-koNIkmlCVXzJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Did a take out order right before they closed. Food was amazing with huge portions!! Definitely on the pricier side, but typical for SD standards ($73 for everything). Had the Mongolian beef which was yummy but not that spicy. The lo mein was to die for, my favorite. The wings were meaty and crispy, even for take out which was a plus. The fried rice was fantastic, even with no protein. They close promptly at 9:50 so be aware!

Docked a star because I called and they said they didn’t do take out orders, walk in only (odd). And then my male friend called immediately afterwards and they took his to go order. Rude!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwQDOe1nJXePB_G4l6FD7q&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2025-7-6"},{"Name":"Everett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzwtcgDa2d1BBXxK2J_cllB7_4SbVpf650tc8o18-j4vhj4VTN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Salt and pepper wings lack flavor. Good for those without a palate.

I've visited nearly every single highly regarded Chinese restaurant serving S&P wings. It's just something you do when you are a San Diego native and Chinese.

Texture wise these are solid, good crunch etc. The problem is you aren't licking the outside of the wing, you are taking an actual bite. That's where it all falls apart. Most of the better wing places will brine or use some sort of rub to get the flavor into the flesh of the wings before they actually get to frying them. Evidenly Golden Chopsticks does not do this. Also this applies to the one in National City (OG).

They look great and present well because they have green onions, chili flakes and garlic but those flavors are only on the surface at best. They hold more moisture and just end up soggy on top. You know what they should have added? Fresh chilis like serrano or jalapeno slices, many of the better places will add those.

No place is perfect but I noticed this place got a lot of random hype. There's even some Instagram guy shilling for this restaurant over exaggerating every moment.

Royal Mandarin has this place beat and I'm not saying it's always worth the drive but when it comes to party platters where you are paying premium, take the time to pick better.

Service wise, you came to a Chinese restaurant. If you ain't at some gentrified restaurant don't expect much. I say this as somebody who goes to and in the past worked in restaurants.

Honestly these shills got me thinking I should go around and debunk them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDao9Hu5WZVfim7pLkkuQeU&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Eva Huynh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqOSKvKT8O1In4ljsvGdobI3Y1kYj9zw85yjtOWrjh0koEXUE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Not recommended for family with very small kids. The staff wasn't accommodating nor understanding to let us party of 2 sit in the empty/larger tables in back with a cushioned seat where we could *safely* put our carseat there. Waiter refused then manager reiterated the denial. No apology given. The business prioritized profit, and I prioritize our baby's safety. They wanted us to put the carseat on a typical, unsecured chair which was a no-go. It was a Wednesday evening, and this place doesn't deserve our business.

Besides the latest incident above, I have been here several times. They also offer catering. Food portion is large and taste okay but most dishes are pretty oily compared to other Chinese places. Service has always been average or slightly below. If you dine in, waiter will address your need at the most basic level although none appear happy working there?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Man Xue","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhhJJEGJu8BHgfQx2RxrONPs14ihukKyUdoNoq-RltUP7HS1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Decide to take my coworkers to this newer Chinese restaurant around the area. I haven’t been but saw their salt and pepper chicken wings on ads…so I was sold. Most dishes are good but not amazing to SD standard. But those wings were so crispy and seasoned properly. I might come back just for those wings haha","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQlNjyZg&fid=0x0:0x9f9eb61a0fa8a875"],"When":"2025-3-9"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Titan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJgfPbtoTk6wC9piglEobRZF8WanvOLODNb20Iz97zTdpi_NA9AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Me and my buddy finishes walking Mir Mar lake and stopped by for a quick bite. I chose Rakiraki over Nishiki since it wasn't a chain and the atmosphere looked promising.

I got a vegetarian ramen with extra noodles, I tried to confirm that the ramen was vegan. And the server said it wasn't. I asked for clarification about what wasn't vegan and he didn't know. I asked if it was the broth or noodles and he said he can asked the kitchen, but then said they probably "can't guarantee it's vegan due to cross contamination."
I proceeded with the order anyways. I asked for a spice ball and asked the waiter how spicy it was. I explained I liked things really spicy and asked on a scale of 1-10 how spicy it was. He wasn't sure but insisted I could get an extra ball for free so I agreed.

The food came out quickly and looked promising. I had a can of green tea and was ready. My friend prayed over the food when I realized I didn't get my spice ball. The waiter then provided two for me. Landed both and we ate.

Despite the extra noodles I was not full, and the spice balls were kind of a joke, I didn't even break a sweat which was disappointing.

My friend likes his ramen and said it was good but complained about his side of meat saying there was too much fat in it (he did have a huge chunk of fat on top of all the extra fat in the cuts).

Overall the food was fine, not filling but not bad. But ultimately forgettable in all honesty. I will not likely be returning as it wasn't worth the $65 for two mediocre meals. Sorry! 😬","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyxH040Y2Iu0nESxSszcfe&fid=0x0:0x82e305f2a2070736"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Jay V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURLmV_vaE141n0_UyMRaKa6scE640EBHJ0rSjB1dCb-3DfSxs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I love coming here and have been coming on Mondays. The servers are awesome no matter what. However, my complaint regards the kitchen staff. On Mondays it's usually not busy but the food takes FOREVER to come out!!!! Today it was the ramen. Appetizer came out quick! Most Mondays both take forever. I noticed that everytime the server takes an order he has to physically go get the chefs from wherever they are. And the kitchen is pretty visible, they are ALWAYS on their phones talking or doing everything but making the food. It's ridiculous and I can see why it takes so long, THEY ARE ALWAYS ON THEIR PHONES!! Ty had to apologize multiple times about the wait time for food and I get that it's not his fault but this is ridiculous.

On top of that, last week, I decided to come in on a weekday morning and ordered my usual appetizer with a ramen. This time, the appetizer took forever but the ramen came out instantly. What's the deal with this?? 30 minutes for garlic edamame is just completely insane. Again, no complaints about the service but the wait time for the food is way too long.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1lpLpxaIe4aGimhIEI4aUpyWmrdpJ2Pp8jgSmWZzJvjyHJQN-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came in at 6pm on a Sunday. Got the happy hour hot sake for $3.95, the black edition ramen for $20(worth it!), tempura Kabocha roll to go. Start to finish, great service. The guys were so attentive, kind and genuine. Much appreciated! I lived in L.A. for several years and have had some amazing ramen. This might be the best. Super fresh! Especially the pork. Love the presentation for the Ramen too. Chill R&B vibes and nice decor. 10/10! Keep it up. I live in north county, but I’ll be back. :D","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Faith D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDl1H0Q1VCslTQA6XhxQqSVu_C0_la-jmVP6k7cT5WoH07zA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What we ordered:
• ikageso karaage (fried squid)
• takoyaki
• all star ramen
• ox tail tsukemen
• milk tea
• strawberry ramune

We normally get the chicken karaage but this time went with the squid and it was sooo good and fried perfectly!

Dipping noodles are always a fun, and I don’t know of many places that have tsukemen so we always have to get it here. They have a braised oxtail version that was very flavorful with the tender oxtail falling off the bone!

The All-Star Ramen was definitely my favorite. This Ramen has fire-flamed underbelly and comes with kurobuta spare ribs and jumbo crispy gyoza. The tonkatsu broth was amazing and enhanced with black garlic and red chili oil 🤤 it was a big portion and I definitely had leftovers for the next day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg0t_YuAE&fid=0x0:0x82e305f2a2070736"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yummy ramen at Rakiraki in Mira Mesa! We really enjoyed our kurobuta and Shabu Shabu ramen, as well as the poke sushi roll and the vegetarian green-gyoza. Nice they have pitchers of Sapporo. Very friendly and quick service. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYQ_7X7a05PeMkG6D-LFNP&fid=0x0:0x82e305f2a2070736"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Daniela Alvarado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8ClpJSPJK9QN649Kq2a9HHQm0Vn5oY8wWXRkYnNP6q-MkYLDz7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Rakiraki has to be one of the top 3 Ramen spots in San Diego! But this location is my absolute favorite. They do everything right and maintain consistency every single time!

It was a Friday night around 5 and it was a little busy but thankfully there was a table open. It was right in front of the AC unit so it made us really cold! We asked to move and there were no more tables open so we moved to the bar. They took our order promptly and the food came out around 10 minutes after placing our order.

I usually get the Shabu Shabu ramen but this day I got the Original Hakata Tonkatsu Ramen with chashu pork.. big mistake.. :/ the pork wasn’t not chashu at all. It was tough and not the right cut to be called chashu. Really ruined the meal for me and I wish I would have stuck to the shabu shabu. Honestly if it was chashu then they game me the crumbs of it cuz they advertise the ramen with a SLICE of chashu pork in the photo.. and if that is the case I didn’t appreciate it..

My cousin ordered the Akasaka K-Town Kimchee Ramen. It was a little spicy but had great flavor. She enjoyed it very much. We also ordered the jump fried gyoza which is pretty bland inside and lacks flavor but I don’t come here for those.. and the chicken karaage which isn’t really Karaage cuz it isn’t fried in the traditional way, it’s really just fried chicken thighs not cut properly so when you bit into it, it tears awkwardly .. but I don’t come here for that either.. just the ramen.

Anyways I love coming here for the ramen but I guess I shouldn’t change it up and also this last visit I was pretty let down honestly..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDn5ZTFrgE&fid=0x0:0x82e305f2a2070736"],"When":"2024-10-8"},{"Name":"donny blaze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVywPX164DxNYXbhLL7W1wcq-0dGskCwgvRIukqJ1VF_UveoaZ9mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Definitely liked the ramen here. 😋  the brother was packed with flavor. We had Gyoza pork and had it pan fried, they were huge and filling! 5 big fatties, the picture just didn't give the size justice. I highly recommend them. The layout is nice, it's open, and looks to accommodate big parties. We sat on the bar which had a very large flat screen for the sports, and even gives you a little peak into the kitchen. We went on a Sunday lunch and it was very crowded, but we sat instantly because we were only a couple. And for high volume I gotta point out the bathroom was very clean. I think the sushi rolls were not too unique, like the caterpillar doesn't have eel, pretty much they are all California rolls with cream cheese, and maybe with a twist like making it crunchy. It would have been nice to enjoy some good rolls with this awesome ramen. Hence the 4 stars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB8syxAQ&fid=0x0:0x82e305f2a2070736"],"When":"2023-1-16"},{"Name":"Ryan Raker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiuKFXMEjOyt0PeRXCkv3uTIcdJgmYWTW1P3si7rxkVg-Bw8OW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The first thing I noticed when sitting down was how sticky the table was, it felt gross. The service was good and I ordered the black ramen. The broth and pork were both bland and the pork was very dry.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"KakuBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWutlKZi6Y01z2Y5IREHHTIWtcCCIaHmbgvMr5DtNejgeQXtjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Banh Mi Blvd is a small, family-run shop tucked away in the Mesa Shopping Center, specializing in Banh mi and boba.

The food:
🥪 #12 BBQ Short Rib Banh Mi ($12): The fillings were excellent. The warm short ribs were quite rich and a bit fatty. The Vietnamese garlic mayo was a savory base. I appreciated the generous amount of pickled daikon/carrots, jalapeños, and cucumbers, which provided a fresh, vibrant crunch.

While the kitchen makes their baguettes fresh daily, the toasting on my order was too aggressive. It left the bread dry and brittle rather than crisp-and-chewy. Because the bread is such a crucial part of a Banh Mi, this impacted the meal. Tip: I recommend asking for "light toast" or no toast if you prefer softer bread.

Logistics:
• Parking: Plenty of free parking available.
• Seating: Small indoor dining area (seats ~12).
• Vibe: Casual spot that even sells some sassy branded swag.

Overall:
A spot with potential and tasty ingredients, but the execution on the bread texture missed the mark on this visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQbMzqbM5dZh5WQJuBC6VE&fid=0x0:0x3ddca1f95993717e"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Stephen Dunn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOwx5ww7EbIOox4blRQpVLmMpVtjZ0YWfLHLpn3_oMbARuAak2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The chicken bao buns and wings are amazing! Generous portion, super fresh veggies, great sauce and spicy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxmAkWCnio47S2UQP7hMEN&fid=0x0:0x3ddca1f95993717e"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Elexis Carin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcyLepvRQkAo83APeijJ9_p8WV_IKAi9SsRJIcc73ULxbbwHJUCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a bad experience with bahn mi elsewhere in the past. The bread was rock hard and it had cilantro all over. But Bahn Mi Blvd totally changed that. The bread has the thinnest crunchy shell but is soft and fluffy inside, the portions are great, and it’s full of delicious pickled vegetables. It felt light and refreshing, but filling (I only ate half). I think my husband liked the Filipino fusion options like longanisa fries and tacos. Appreciated the recommendation and friendly environment as well. Wishing them success.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lily Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqepgJEnXZ3nGGD3XG-EVEIJzyKqJEQtxNy7qTiJB1wX6hzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recommend rose tea as not many places have it around as well as their food. Kong is always providing a great service and a really friendly guy. I always look forward to his recommendations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKQ-DZVLGC_on7J6a8dC5M&fid=0x0:0x3ddca1f95993717e"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"ww","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGenTh2V_6WuK32jVEZjorqyvuvLiqSbmhMyjKOlUPiOsWj-EN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came out of a terrible job interview after taking time off of the terrible job I currently have. I went to this place after my instructions led me to the wrong parking lot. Menu was very straight forward, I ordered Joe’s Special and a Vietnamese Coffee. It was absolutely amazing, the sandwich was the perfect size. The ingredients and textures complimented each other so well, and the flavor was immaculate. The coffee was pretty good too. The only good part of my day was this sandwich.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keirwin Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLx3fGsqkmiimJMK9lGiGifYVN4sCyA2hvirv0KqVqIRYR9lS0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Sandwiches are pretty ok. [{"Name":"Aristides “Ari” Alvarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzlGKbvJgtY9ey97xyLkZZ-Jija1_cHrHm1HrF6W6wwyDnJEyBBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an amazing time here. Sampled 5 corn dogs, the elote, kimchi fries and dirty fries. Just wow, wow, wow. I've added the names of the corn dogs to the photos I submitted so it's easier for you to distinguish them. You have the option of fully customizing the corn dog filling. For all of mine, I did a 50/50 mozzarella and sausage, but you can do a corn dog that's just sausage, just mozzarella, a mix of the two, or a veggie dog. Every sauce they add to each unique dog is a must, try not to change it, the flavor combinations are just amazing 🤩","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENjelKaIyI_oag&fid=0x0:0x22de060081ababb8"],"When":"2025-5-30"},{"Name":"maumwool","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvSYfnMctVpCEU4jJAnft4VdFv7tmmTtqX8RbbztFhR-3sxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Since my first visit, I've been completely satisfied. The flavors are so much better than other corn dog places, and they regularly introduce new ones. I want to try every filling and every flavor combination, so I keep coming back.

My favorite combo is the spicy beef sausage on a Two Hands dog.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joslyn Marett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKy1hxyb49JxHNNQ3DBoeMixdkwQeTOX2aIEQJ7LG_4TaZxLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to this fast food spot last week with a buddy after work. The place was clean and the staff said hello right when we came in, which was nice. My burger was cooked well and the fries were hot n crispy, maybe a little salty but still good. Prices were pretty fair for what you get. Service took a few mins longer than I expected, but they were friendly about it so I didnt really mind. Overall I’d defintely go again when I want something quick and easy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Sutedja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLh-YK5_ra8JVEHXrFxs1iP84njSpImWOi2pr6J4Zf8QdL4Ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Serving was pretty substantial. I got the box combo, which is 4 strips of chicken with fries, Texas toast, coleslaw and their secret sauce and a drink.

I ordered mine through the app for pickup and I like that when I got there, they were finishing up my order, so I got it hot and did not have to wait long. I definitely would recommend ordering ahead if you can, because the line gets busy during lunch hours.

The chicken and fries were crisp and sufficiently salted. The secret sauce was pretty tasty too.

Plenty of seats and they have some booths options too. The place seems clean and tidy. Pretty great for a fast food place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_wN71qgE&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-1-20"},{"Name":"Diego Macklis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb0jJ8VjgCZCKKuXwy78--wxYVpOhbtj5C7hqYTKYsMLaGHxQY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Canes never misses. Vibes were chill and the food was straight fire. Got the Box Combo (no coleslaw because I’m picky lol) and everything slapped. Texas toast was elite, chicken fingers were crunchy and bussin’, and of course, Canes sauce is the real MVP. Fries hit too. Got a lemonade, cup size was actually solid. Staff was super chill and helpful. Price was like $12, kinda up there, but honestly you get a lot of food so it’s worth it. Bathroom code btw is 22467. Easy 5/5.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIjNOHeg&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-3-30"},{"Name":"Fernando Aquino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIeYBfAqlPIHOXOv98v8dACl0RVST5cngGALqEOhoMIEscvc_Cm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place. You get what you pay for. The food is great. I asked for the 5 piece combo but for an adult the 3 piece is just fine haha.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbSr35toq4f8MGCbqpQlWV&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Jordi Fabrega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURUimi2fuoFttwWjiCF4NV9ZDEluNo0L2cUlH3LNHzjRkRbxhOGA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This Mira Mesa Raising Cane’s location is one of the few in the San Diego area, and it has quickly become a favorite for many. The food here is undeniably delicious, capturing the authentic flavors and quality you expect from Cane’s. While the chicken portions might seem on the smaller side, the taste and freshness more than make up for it. Each bite is a delightful experience, and the menu offers a great variety to satisfy different cravings.

What really sets this location apart is the service. The staff is exceptionally friendly and welcoming, always ready to make your dining experience as pleasant as possible. Their warm and attentive demeanor adds a personal touch that makes you feel right at home.

The atmosphere of the restaurant is another standout feature. The vibrant decorations with vivid colors create a lively and enjoyable environment. The addition of disco balls hanging from the ceiling adds a fun, retro vibe that enhances the overall dining experience. It’s a place where you can enjoy good food and good times, whether you’re dining alone, with family, or with friends.

Another highlight is the beverage selection. The fountain drinks feature a variety of Coca-Cola products, offering a refreshing complement to your meal. Among the options, you’ll find something for everyone, making it easy to pair your favorite drink with your food.

Whether you’re a local or just passing through, this Mira Mesa Cane’s location is definitely worth a visit. The combination of tasty food, friendly service, and a great atmosphere ensures a satisfying dining experience every time. We’re looking forward to returning and trying more from their menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgiqDHbQ&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-2-23"},{"Name":"Jamison Berg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd6I3sKfCm2ADF8pwtwM3DsigE9CIMHMXRfk-_g-4_4bW5akUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Raising Canes is always consistently good. Chicken is always fresh and delicious. Drive Thru is a long line sometimes but always goes quick. Will order an extra canes sauce to go with the 4 piece combo. Hint: slice the bread and put the chicken, fries and coleslaw with canes sauce to get a secretly awesome canes sandwich!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgnO6gcA&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-2-23"},{"Name":"Shorty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWTlKj4Ev0QauD3HwifL0DBBLB_Dd1Z8URhVZjbQaM8qpP8gk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I come to raising canes I feel the price goes up and my chickens get smaller. I do enjoy raising canes I always substitute the coleslaw for an extra bread","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDD-3rK7YoEa73elKM_UiOF&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-7-30"},{"Name":"Neil Sickling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXswRGGOwvnBSuBXK1BY8zLgCCVEwWKYFZYblT-kYIsdhS8wksR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very pleasant idea for a quick chicken meal. Food was very quickly ready (despite a lot of people arriving at the same time), it was hot, and tasted great. Whatever is in that sauce was great. Well done, excellent, simple food experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg6PLd4gE&fid=0x0:0x567a2cf6801187c4"],"When":"2025-2-13"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went here for lunch and for happy hour. We really enjoyed the great attentive service and the food was delicious.
It's a great happy hour and we will definitely be back again.

We tried their guava margarita, mango margarita, and the spicy cucumber margarita. I like the guava margarita most. They aren't made with tequila but with I believe wine vodka instead. Still tasty though.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHfXiPWQLXPTYCwQ63hQCu&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"My Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-o38aNqhmbPRZUZYMfBXJ4xFkgUX4l-cE6T9emtIIZJWEKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Unlike the Convoy location, this location has plenty of parking and indoor seating. Your order is taken after you are seated not at the counter. Same club music. Large tv’s for sports and a nice bar. They’re just missing a dance floor to go along with the music!

Came on a Tuesday and there weren’t any Tuesday taco deals. Just happy hour Monday - Thursday 3-5pm.

We ordered:

Octopus taco - amazing. The crispy onions gave it an added crunch and generous on the octopus. Choice of spicy salsa macha or pesto. We got salsa macha, it’s like chili oil.

Queso Birria taco w consome - I like the birria taco here over Mike’s Red Taco! It’s fully loaded and flavorful! The broth was not overly salty.

Ceviche de cameron - shrimp, red onions, cilantro, tomato. This one is traditional and basic out of all with refreshing herb flavors. I prefer this ceviche over the other one.

La coqueta - cooked shrimp, octopus, red onions, cucumber, roasted pepper,  cilantro. This one had all the nice assortment but it was too wet. The tostado got soggy. It also had cream cheese base that I didn’t like.

Garlic shrimp plate - came with salad, rice and beans. We substituted the beans for more salad. The salad had a hint of jalapeño dressing that gave it a kick of spicy peppers. 10 shrimps! The rice was too wet for me, I prefer dryer. It also came with a side of tortillas.

We each got the guava margarita. The guava purée tasted like the guava juice from Costco! Regardless, it was delicious. Originally, I wanted the tamarindo margarita but they sold out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOqxW5VpgPBIlanWDgHL7Q&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Catherine Hunt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYH-I4RvrfRUXl77LorTgEYOQ9Iu5u4MQ2EyTsBvUTqYmBsYb3iA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend and I went for lunch on Thursday and it was our first time here.  The menu had a variety of offerings.  The restaurant had a nice ambiance though a little loud as more people arrived and the music in the background was lively. Our server was nice but got busy and didn’t check whether we needed more water or anything else.  The food was very good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBr5022TzWgIPS8Rmad394h&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Adam Hargreaves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-72C3SwSSy6l4Rj5Erfs9-s_LbsS-Em62yI5q_HuqyVbHNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came for brunch and had chilaquiles, huevos con chorizo and some pancakes. All the food looked beautiful and tasted great. The servers, Auria, Juanita and Destiny, were all super attentive and friendly","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCrH_ikvMi1-CadOsR4MaS&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"EcoVoyager and Eats","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrR2LRo-Io7zUm7CU1z08UBQs6P8tC95FY3khAii_drrshoqM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great spot for Mexican seafood with a nice atmosphere! This is my third time here and first time too Happy Hour. The margaritas were only $7-- an oyster is only $1.50 apiece such a good deal. We enjoyed a peach margaritas and a dozen oysters. I had an ahi tostada from the happy hour menu, which was fresh and delicious, as well as a shrimp and cheese taco that hit the spot. Others in my group ordered the three-carnitas taco plate with rice and beans and really enjoyed it.

Overall, tasty food, great prices during happy hour, and a welcoming vibe. Definitely worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLKD4bUeQRvRPKXsyghXyI&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Maggie Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXlqBaCSZaj7gvE2BpyIkm5M92ky4i627tHvjAW7YrVaMeFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Viejon - Mira Mesa
Hands down one of the best brunch spots we’ve hit lately! The red chilaquiles were packed with flavor and cooked to perfection, and the tres leches pancakes? Absolutely insane — soft, rich, and melt-in-your-mouth good.

The vibe was everything — a live DJ kept the energy up with great music without it being too loud. Perfect for a fun and chill brunch.

Service was on point too — super friendly and fast. And don’t miss their café de olla — so good, and you can choose between almond, oat, or regular milk.

Already planning our next visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo3YHfqAE&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-4-27"},{"Name":"Mario T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1Mtsj3p5sqelTaaDrhXOFMvKOulg0MumGlbIiHpPYbR_1zc9D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time there, went for dinner. The food was good the only plate i didnt like much was dessert, i got the concha with ice cream. The bad thing was the concha was hard not fresh. I know my sweet bread when its fresh. The atmosphere was good almost closing time they play music loud.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZhY_gtoC-qDW8bLhRT2Ua&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s so nice we have one more brunch spot in scripps ranch! We literally need more this kind of restaurant. It looks modern, nice and delicious. I went there with two of my best friends. We ordered some tacos and fried fish. The tacos I choose is Quesitaco and Smoke Fish taco, both of them are very yummy, especially the Quesitaco, highly recommend! It is also huge! Two tacos are totally enough for me. They also have a lot of brunch items, I will definitely try it the next time. Their drinks menu look very great as well. I had a Chai tea latte and my friends had tiramisu latter, we all love them. The waitress is super sweet and friendly. I enjoyed the experience. The only thing is I felt my stomach is uncomfortable that afternoon and night, I’m not sure if it is related with their foods, hope not.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByV_cpT6aADYEHQ2FWCNuo&fid=0x0:0xd59a5743ce1895ac"],"When":"2025-6-27"}]
