[{"Name":"sonam p","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsGhjypjofvEds7npyqWlbp9riUAH3v7d7UIm0-wpOWd4UuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a truly touching experience at Urbane Cafe today. When placing my order, I mentioned that the last time I had this sandwich, it wasn’t made properly, and I politely requested that it be prepared well this time.

I was genuinely taken by surprise by the response from Bryan C., who was taking my order. Without hesitation, he told me he wouldn’t charge me for the sandwich—even though I repeatedly insisted that I should pay. His integrity, kindness, and customer-first attitude truly touched my heart.

What made the experience even more special was that Bryan personally came outside to hand over my order. He was incredibly polite, warm, and sincere, and he made sure the sandwich was prepared perfectly this time.

It’s rare to witness such genuine care and willingness to make things right. This experience left a lasting impression on me, and I’m truly grateful. Thank you, Bryan for reminding me what exceptional customer service really looks like.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paola Marquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXIbKUeBFZK639HSO3O8sSGsYsW3iOyBfqSQrKsLHEcYBzMA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best variety incredibly tasting healthy food in the area!! We will definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ally v","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-0LeWcOJ4M00AXLnmKvAtl3T6uqqHoEUMmWXDrfoZg04zAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my favorite places to eat! I’ve grown up in OC and SD and have been eating at different Urbane’s for several years but this is my favorite one! Food is consistently top notch, and the staff here is the best. They are always polite, friendly, and fast. Leadership here is also approachable and helpful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sunil Kurian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX93XUTdVoApEu4PErEJIVr7gPXgQM5ya4clbIoCOaLOzzzxbbj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had lunch here a couple of weeks ago at the Mira Mesa location. Still, it’s a decent spot to check out if you’re in the Mira Mesa area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFLzwtSiCvM3DKSgli3QY6&fid=0x0:0xa96aa933624fc5a6"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"An Pham Medina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFfW7-yqF9mDtJbNXssZT_A_Q-FvyYkHMMb68rMe29VE-vTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time eating here and we will definitely be back! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"KakuBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWutlKZi6Y01z2Y5IREHHTIWtcCCIaHmbgvMr5DtNejgeQXtjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bale French Sandwich is a tiny shop tucked away in Mira Mesa Square serving quick Vietnamese dishes like banh mi, fried rice, egg rolls, and boba.

We enjoyed the charbroiled pork and lemongrass chicken banh mi - a great value at $6.25 each. The bread had a great crust: thin, very crisp, and flaky. The pickled carrot and daikon added nice texture and brightness, while the raw jalapeños brought the right amount of heat. The egg rolls were also a hit, with a peppery flavor and a crisp outer shell.

Note that this is a grab-and-go spot with a strictly business vibe. The service is efficient, so have your order ready. There is only one small table for snacking and two benches for waiting. They also offer extensive party tray options if you order in advance.

There is plenty of free parking, though the lot gets competitive on weekends due to the nearby Aldi and Lucky Seafood Market.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAK-Hfv1STvHU80aN692Wqy&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Louis Vo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0H0jn1WKmyCBebL_r2nScaV4BDojby239BTPhxh2ykGrGmyKUPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mid at best.

So sad this place has fallen so far. Bread quality is down, amount of meat you get is disappointing. Inflation is understandable, but dropping quality at the same time is not.

I've given this place sooo many more chances over the last few years but the decline is consistent and continues to show that it's no longer the standard. Not worth the money.

Staff is nice. Store is clean. But I'm here for the food. And that's not hitting it and likely never will again based on the trajectory in the past few years.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdB-RxcpsTFHc3qfrmQG4g&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Genevieve Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSkVg2ZQP5nr1wOwTR0C7L_T22xlsYH7Sotubfe5cKDD840i7b7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best sandwiches I've ever had in my life. This place knows exactly what a sandwich is supposed to be. It's filled with all the veggies you expect and you pick the protein you desire.  I'll tell you this much... anything you order is going to taste good. We had thai tea and mango drink as well as egg roll and sesame balls with bean curd. So good!!! It was so good i couldnt finish it... but i ate the rest later in the day.. JUST AS GOOD..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBo7h4H6LIJAVMM_0HDlSNQ&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very impressive Banh Mi sandwich here at Bale French Sandwiches! Their price is unbeatable, all the Banh mi are under $6.5, and their size aren’t too small. It’s like a 6 inch sandwich, perfect for one person. The sandwich has a lot of stuff inside, it’s filled with veggies and meat. I ordered a BBQ pork and a beef Banh mi, both are awesome. I highly recommend this place, plus their service is so friendly!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD9euicg&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2024-3-31"},{"Name":"Duong Hoang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKKnfwiBjLiN1W7P8Qap0uqVkgMw4HKmEpvmqIWo35QzZ_XA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love their sandwiches. It brought me back to Hanoi during the 90s. Cured pork sandwich is my favorite. Their sesame balls are excellent too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIur97nPnpTh3wE&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Terry Ta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmx467GR_lH3r-VcP-URrFXTGJjS62Eego-elQ5uwbU8w6kbNt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible sandwiches with little meat portion.   Lacks so much flavor and the bread is not good.  Hard pass","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCntEBBpo2hwaZ_nmjm1-V8&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Hong Torrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_nhy_VprJnoQsTZbblZVOSaj-27ksuw-Y2Oi9I7_yiaIACV0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So I’m always on the hunt for a Vietnamese deli close by. Coming from Washington state and being able to enjoy the international district in Seattle I was very disappointed to see how very little options I had out in San Diego. This place popped up on my Yelp and I had to give it a try! When I saw it it was a Monday so I was pretty bummed but they were closed.
I work locally so I figured I would round up my coworkers and see if they wanted to order some Vietnamese sandwiches. We ordered chicken, pork, the combo, and several other dishes. Everyone was super impressed on how delicious it was. I really do you love the fact that they had other options that were grab and go. The cashier lady told me that they make all their food fresh in the morning and once they sell out they sell out! I am very glad to know that if I call and place an order they are able to hold some of the items for me. Everything was super delicious and super fresh!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWptegTA&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2022-3-22"},{"Name":"Ms. Bui-Bernheim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxYk8b4yY9RTCc_TfGjN_hA5FHOtlsqDDfg0tEGAoy0VSUng3y_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a small hole in the wall gem. The sandwiches are around six bucks ! When was the last time you got a made to order flavorful sandwich with all the fixings for that price ? The super pleasant stuff was fantastic . We tried their spring rolls and other steamed rice cakes . I heart this joint and can’t wait to come back for the catering","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDf2cPaLQ&fid=0x0:0x6dc8c57154720f46"],"When":"2025-1-8"}]

[{"Name":"Abarajithan Gnaneswaran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTcq1z0akLmLkusQwOlRVhIdqvqk7HS6dGzhIGHir_Jn6dA1z9gg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is insane. My Asian friends, who have super high standards for seafood, had their faith in American cuisine restored. One of them said "This is the best oyster i had in North America"

We ordered fried soft shell crabs, bucket with shrimp, oyster & crab legs, and Gumbo. Everything was perfect. We will visit often.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArFruYRWRC98V4tcncDvao&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Shabari Vivek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxVbfE82HwL3JQvTT6HS73cSosV6o9gfIW_jLE6Z8_p3j3btPPgw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s shocking how the quality has gone down. Ordered a large amount of crab and shrimp to feed 6 people and the amount of sauce in the bags, barely enough for 2 people. It used to be 5 star food and service but alas not anymore!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN_rxQwAJfTAjCLKpGo8lE&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Jay L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUX1zvLxPREdZGaL0LCrFLcXnqVOZdhhgxsQ-dB3p9_LZyDBNTX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called & ordered. Arrived 10 mins later. Food was ready & handed to me 3 mins after i arrived. Staff ALL smiled, greeted me & asked if i had ordered yet.

I ordered the fried shrimp basket with plain fries.

Food was PIPING HOT!!!!! (PERFECT) DELICIOUS!!!!!

Whomever trains the staff is doing a marvelous job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lina Zhao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyiAHRNCI6p9qc4aPwW3Y-zqfobEdFG1SPAQx7dwSja3RSnkU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Been there couples time before and dine in there. BUT I ordered Togo yesterday, the shrimp are NOT FRESH, you can taste that. But before I dine in the shrimp quality is good. Won’t go back again, waste my money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENWy3aOL7YLDPQ&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Ana Cabrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzU17clQZBG_EEDg8PyFgcyEODFzxQVQaMxJ6andmkNmOoBN4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here for the first time last month, and it was good! 🤤definitely will be coming back soon. I got  the shrimp with potatoes & corn, fries, and a margarita.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz-wlhPfPg-c3JP3rkOcR2&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went on a weekday and the two of us were seated right away in a booth. Our wonderful server was Ron and he did a great job advising us what to order.

I would say that this place would be better suited for larger groups. They did not have a seafood bucket with a variety of seafood like other restaurants. Each order for the seafood boil had a 1 lb minimum, except for shrimp where you can order ½ lb.

Since there were only two of us, we were limited on what we could order. We ordered 1 lb of Alaskan snow crab legs, 1 lb of clams, and ½lb of shrimp (with heads). All in the Sha Bang sauce, which was pretty tasty.

We were advised to order it in Mild. Glad we did because it did have a little heat and Medium might have been a bit too spicy. Food came out pretty quickly.
It was fun to dump everything on the table and eat with our hands. We were given bibs, gloves, lots of napkins, crackers, lemons, salt and pepper, melted butter, and hand wipes.

Not much of a selection for alcohol drinks and no wine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAnZ7xPw&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-2-11"},{"Name":"AJ Hmoud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuYlk0wvjJAWlqmImkJ7XPtbyrWQ_rkrj5roB77gC2AVGkf61o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Solid spot. We ordered the king crab and calamari—both hit the mark. The vibe was great, and Chris (our waiter) really made the experience smooth—shout out to him. Definitely coming back next time I’m in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwr73DhgE&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-3-29"},{"Name":"Sara H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIkXDPO-UecJv08B2X4nJLzZwQiiLEqtEmIc45H58AAEx7dKzW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very delicious! Great experience overall, even though it was a bit messy 😄","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8DYvbpZrHe-sbJYe1R23y&fid=0x0:0x9e543e56ab4fb08d"],"When":"2025-9-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Haylee Jane Monteiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4F6GmFKEiNWrzo0vPgBuUR_Cl9LqyfsnuPuZFB3oLMLipcJNuMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered for pickup on Uber eats with 30% off and the food was ready in about 10 minutes. Nice how quick it was! Got 4 small pizzas for 4 of us, and there was still one pizza worth left! Quite good portion size!
Overall all the pizza Toppings had good flavor but the bread was quite thick so they didn't come through as much on all the pizzas.

Chili Paneer - I didn't try this one but the vegetarian folks and husband seemed to like it! Quite a good amount of paneer in there!!

Curry Veg Special - absolutely loved how many veggies were on this! Good amount of toppings on this, so the crust didn't feel too thick. Perfect with some extra chili flakes on top!

Chili Chicken - considering the popular meaning of Chili Chicken in India is Like an Indo Chinese dish. I was actually thinking this would have indo-chinese flavors but it was more of an Indian flavored pizza. Still very delicious and I think I actually preferred it over the butter chicken!

Butter Chicken - husband is a major fan of butter chicken and he loved this one. I think first and second but it was quite good but after one point it was like the dough was too thick. So the amount of toppings were too little and there was not as much flavor from the toppings and it was more bread.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAK81dXhFyON3tM8vGDVYM7&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Shirley Quach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCAsvz2DWi5gf1vtC5qie2A1Ryd3w30sdb9q11fnsQfDrNchZnZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Im surprised I haven't really seen curry pizza until now. We got the paneer 65 appetizer which I loved. Chicken biryani and paneer butter masala pizza. I was concerned about the spice level but if you can handle jalapenos without the seeds you'll be fine.

Would come back to try the chicken 65 wings and butter chicken pizza next time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6Jww0-hA9zschQr9j8NuA&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2025-6-20"},{"Name":"Breana McGowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgw3yDMLbfw_V_O-3Erzi680oF5oRtvKdPzU5NIs0C5DUPlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The men that work there are super friendly and provide great customer service. The bread of the pizza is crispy and fluffy at the same time. The toppings are generous. However, i didn’t have sauce to give it the flavor you’re looking for. Everyone recommends the butter paneer which was good but the curry chicken has that hint of heat and Indian curry that makes it more unique. It was good but not great enough for me to go back which I am bummed about. Definitely try it as more sauce for me may be a personal preference","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX4uGI6wE&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2024-10-25"},{"Name":"Steph Marco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR5DOmC3rZ84_wiw06deNUuoebFywRbATidqSoTFnVMX7yCGgm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"surprisingly great tasting fusion - indian food on pizza!! it’s the same indian restaurant that we go to during lunch, I guess they have a joint venture. and the chicken 65 wings - wow!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENSD-5CigszhnQE&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2025-5-22"},{"Name":"AnuReviews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfX8pfr-se95hoSStGreSbyrAosRSF9sOfmrF4i_gnGUZw5Mhx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Tried the Paneer Butter Masala pizza at Curry Pizza Point . it was way too saucy. The flavors were there, but the heavy amount of sauce overpowered everything and made the crust soggy. Needs better balance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHRwKVEspfTWxtxpFIc6Ma&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"chris brunnquell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1J5QUFEwO-GECgkbLT_uEbO0e7_ba5io4su_U5zmvxGZeotdI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The flavors are great, but the pizza is not. Unfortunately, the crust is Pizza Hut-esque.  I'm not sure about the feasibility of using naan as crust, but even if it was just fresh NY style crust this would be five stars. Can't get over mushy, bready pizza.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thuy Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKx4e8TJHciGgea0KqblHjNzasjR4kqIOxilezIUCslQ4MujME=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried their pizza for the first time this week, and it was so good, I had to come back the next day and try another pizza. I had a curry chicken pizza and then the next day, it was butter chicken. It might be a bit of a big back activity BUT I couldn’t help it because it was just that good. I’ve been having a huge pizza craving and haven’t had pizza in months. The pizza here hit the spot and I’m 100% coming back later.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnkKrXtgE&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2024-9-21"},{"Name":"Katie Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtAwDh-Lum8eVtx-niatouUfD6Vx_OwLrzZOo8otlEESwzCq7D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So many great pizza choices and they also have nice appetizers. I got the butter chicken pizza, samosas, chilli breadsticks, chilli paneer pizza. Will be back to try all the flavors! Mango lassi is great too. Good spot for lunch food made to order.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICz0_jpvAE&fid=0x0:0xb5e03194ff7b1d71"],"When":"2024-6-4"}]

[{"Name":"Jen M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDMZ3i8pnOTOFUQzxBhPa58nr-ERWbujDql50cLlV4vP2K-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent little cafe in a business park. I ordered in person and my order was ready in under 5 minutes. Service was courteous and efficient. I ordered the turkey club, lightly toasted, and it was perfectly executed. Avocado was perfectly ripe and the lettuce and tomato were super fresh. Turkey was high quality and condiments were just right. Prices are very reasonable. I think I paid about $11 total and portions were generous.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXQ0nuTgoVxwcgnaVzucyZ&fid=0x0:0xcc62894336dfb6f0"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Kunal Singla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOyqqTeKFuxKuB_1hg0vL_qwM6nfNw2kBPPsNN2VCNTVz91YcStw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Local, small cute sandwich shop. Really love the sandwich options. Really close to my work, so it’s very convenient. Have come back a few times now and recommended to friends and coworkers. Very good portion and prices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUsgOlVCsAa_EyDadjb5HY&fid=0x0:0xcc62894336dfb6f0"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Gina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVork-57EhM7hfLHYknqdjG9nxv6LY9TBcamBEiXsZ7HILrUFdphw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Ordered on doordash the chicken bacon sandwich on a role with Chipotle sauce. In general, it was a solid sandwich BUT the chicken is what i wasnt a fan of. It was not grilled but it was precooked some way and then reheated that it was rubbery and had a bit of an after taste. Everything else on the sando was solid & fresh. The portions are normal and good for the price and it was delivered still warm and nicely wrapped.

Ill be trying a regular delivery sandwich next time and ill update my review!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christi Papworth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKf4NXmjupNKH58tY6badPp-kKHj0DTAU-8mpGKeLOjqHZs9w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this place! Their Cuban sandwich is so good and they have so many sandwich options. they have quite a bit of seating inside with pretty wall art and they play nice music.  staff is super friendly.  And prices are low for the quality that you get. Highly recommend for sit down ortake out!
This photo is half of a Cuban and half of the spicy turkey cilantro on toasted wheat sandwiches. Both were excellent!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7_MKfRA&fid=0x0:0xcc62894336dfb6f0"],"When":"2024-8-13"},{"Name":"Tiffany Lindholm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcx_qdEPSL_S4JqnTSfJ-sJbFq1zAJZdRgk1026zvXRf6zvmt8sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was delicious! We had the Cuban sandwich and turkey. If you've tried Portos Cuban sandwich it's very similar in flavor. The bread was toasted perfectly. The staff was so friendly and the restaurant was clean. [{"Name":"Imee C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWioeyCgeB4uUWcshPAC2pQIsYfzt_qMb-WRuNjjtwRo95RTH1PfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here right when they opened on a Sunday.  The place is easy to miss. Parking spot was easy to find since they just opened/. We were seated right away.  They had a QR code at the table to look at the menu.  Order is also placed using that QR code. My mom and I shares the Beef Hot Soup with a side of vermicelli & fried tofu skin.  Broth was delicious and glad my mom shares an order because my mom doesn’t eat much.  Server comes around all the time to ask if we wanted refill on the broth.  we had to refill it twice because it was very good. It came with a side of rice as well.  Servers were very attentive and pleasant.  I would definitely come back here again and try other soups","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhIOGN2SWdO4uQRQtj5nLf&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Only place to eat Taiwanese stinky tofu pot in San Diego, I like the flavor and the pot is pretty big. For this price, it’s kinda very worthy. The down side is the flavor is little too mild so you have to use a lot of the bean paste. Also the Napa cabbage is little bitter somehow. Otherwise, this is a nice place. My husband had their new items, he enjoyed it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICT44WAFw&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2024-5-18"},{"Name":"Victoria M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKf4ASsrmAEQw-RKK11KDR2FxWrrR27CNHrxlujNcU6crZbmx4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If anyone has made hot pot at home, you know the labor of love that goes into preparing everything. If you’re looking for a nice break, I highly recommend any location of Tasty Pot. I’ve gone to the one in Stockton, Temecula, & now this one. My son got the sizzling beef plate with udon and it had a ton of flavor which is worth the price. Personally, I recommend taking out the cabbage as it’s just a filler. Other than that, I would definitely come back again! We got seated fast and food was very flavorful. The drinks were decent, I enjoyed their complimentary black tea more than these ones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_37WbGw&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2025-1-20"},{"Name":"Valerie Wan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt3fu8F8FdwrqN7AIqxSLH6FrKsBTBi8vCMiAFF53xibsrQP-oRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall great experience! I got the beef pot, and it was super satisfying—such a good amount of food for the price. I also really liked that they give you the option for iced green tea with your meal. It was refreshing and just the right amount of sweet!

The sauces at the table were a nice touch too. I really enjoyed the garlic soy sauce (not totally sure what the other two were, but they were good!). Overall, everything felt fresh, flavorful, and definitely worth it. I’ll be back for sure!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA4NGktAE&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2025-1-28"},{"Name":"Tom Hsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1flMM5VFFxDSBKboTZO8YX9JL5yC3NVROztkw1LxTJpvnyqOP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Quick wait of 10 minute on a weekend off hour lunch. Easy to order in app. Service was friendly. I enjoyed the included drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxw1z8iXOZgoKukuRNlQzs&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Fredrick T Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXcaQk4q6mnhGVTYvlYd3qXbVAFDEVYT5q8mgxaPvM0hh2ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice restaurant,  prices are reasonable, good food,  nice presentation and service, restaurant is very clean and have a lot of places to park. We arrived early for lunch so there was no waiting time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4W2Fvw7bTsAtLIU5MPXoa&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Phuong Dang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW08DpP30U4ma4Y9T8kk_6lya78spdMgUcT0nJU7LpZS13MLuwtig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious, clean,fast and friendly, highly recommend. Tiger boba drink is much.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbgy13pYBIJPXmGrNqoj0G&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Griffen Stapp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIco0zr3ZeAnLyLzO359aoHOzXit_0dECOray1xUo43ozl5cA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We found this place on the off chance off Yelp and we were not disappointed. This is a perfect place for hot pot, where you get a variety of bases, add in any additional items, and cook your perfect meal. You have a great variety to chose from with everything from curry to veggie to spicy to cheese and more. It’s also convenient so you can order off the table and they bring it to you. Their variety of drinks from teas to smoothies is great too.
The additions include rice, noodles, different eggs and more which leaves you in control of everything. You can add more meat and you control how well done you want it as well.  The service is great and they add more soup base when they come around.
The prices are very reasonable, however the place is fairly busy so it’s best if you put in your name ahead of time. However you can only do that if you have large party. So check out this great gem in Mira Mesa! You’ll leave full and happy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-pZqiswE&fid=0x0:0x2fb6c14242cf10bf"],"When":"2022-12-5"}]

[{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Returning from Seattle to my hometown in Mira Mesa, I really miss the Manila Fast Food restaurant. They offer a wide variety of affordable and delicious Filipino dishes, from snacks to big meals and desserts! The portions are generous, and the food is always tasty. The service is nice. I absolutely love it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDH5-fzzwE&fid=0x0:0x20b4403737ce5be8"],"When":"2024-9-20"},{"Name":"Nonnie Tavisola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzdbkgwHT5gIE_W910pxQtrTH7L5qvg6Twsrs55VJQ3-Sc5V3Zbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Now I understand why there is always a long queue.  Food is great!

The experience remains 5+10 STARS for us.

I have lost count visiting Manila FF&D whenever we're in the area; but each visit - it never fails to satisfy our palates and tummies.

We arrived past the rush hour lunch time.  However, there was still a queue of customers waiting to be served.

Food choices are still mouth-watering.  We were still tempted to order as many items as we could despite our dietary restrictions (don't tell our doctors).

Staff and management remains professional and friendly.  If you are not familiar with the choices or it's your first time to visit, ask away.  I think they give out samples for you to taste.

The ambience is "CROWDED" with moderate noise that's tolerable.  Some tables are louder than others as you could "hear" the "private" conversations.  If you can only "mute" your ears so as not to hear LOUD "privileged" information, or it would be nice if we could "transfer" to a safe-distance table in the middle of a full-spread meal.  Maybe we will just order for "to-go" (take-out) or eat inside our car. - I am kidding.  The "loud private" conversation obviously is beyond our control.  We quickly enjoyed our lunch and got up fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICP8-GCdA&fid=0x0:0x20b4403737ce5be8"],"When":"2024-11-27"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is so delicious! It is like a family diner cafe style. You gotta choose the foods from the counter. There are a lot of choices and they offer small size portions, so that you can try different things. The taste-wise is very very nice, it reminds me of my grandmas cooking. The foods somehow are a little bit heavy taste, but I like them. I tried their desserts before. They are super super yummmmm! Sorry I couldn’t really remember the dishes names. But please come here to try it out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG1bnA7gE&fid=0x0:0x20b4403737ce5be8"],"When":"2021-12-5"},{"Name":"AdventurerJOJO_TTV","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUr70Ok8pun1sPe0FUvp6NI76kgosXMkIs9BGvN9t1diT77wcU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food was mid. We got the Longonisa / Burnt Tosino in one plate (see picture) and the Lechon Kawali / Pork Afritada on another plate.

The Lechon Kawali was the best dish out of the 4 and the burnt Tosino was the worst for obvious reasons. It was probably cooking since morning and  they should have tossed it instead of sold it to us for us to toss it anyways. I can't help but feel scamed out of an entree.

As for service, they let the lady behind us cut us right in front because they seem to know her. I'm thinking she would give them a 5/5 stars for letting her cut us.

The atmosphere is very clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX3PDThQE&fid=0x0:0x20b4403737ce5be8"],"When":"2024-10-25"},{"Name":"El Raider","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwMAzWZE_frJvH5rzeljpNElotMJQi7tU1ro1tP6mPqWx8qAvsTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best BBQ beef I've had, I didn't know what I was going to order, but gave this place a try and it was fire, food was a little cold but flavor was on point, wish I had some type of hot sauce.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJu-3SJg&fid=0x0:0x20b4403737ce5be8"],"When":"2023-7-5"},{"Name":"Nancy Doodle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZ31IjGgIM5Ud-eJKIlIpzvH6PBh4hDMbE6HVMSYWF-5SyGcS_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I used to love and eat at this place and  love the people before but now they sucks with their service I don't mind paying more on my food. I pay for my food I don't ask for it this one crew here a man his so disrespectful and rude... if you see this guy serving you walk away.. his giving less food and he had the audacity to be rude qosh . Sorry to the owner but don't make him as your front man pleassseee...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMbMlhQOjlrgS5SB8oET0Nm8XlQYYi9do7zS2p0OKm1oLXOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Large selection of Philippino food. Large eat-in area. Friendly staff.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lim Lolsme","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_yGSfZofMB_QLFHUy10TL5qLEQwq9OdKswgxHTKOY_FJX33A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Not authentic at all. Plenty of room inside and out. Great, friendly service from everyone. Might come back for the pumpkin spice cold brew alone: SO GOOD! But I would be eager to try the other items in their extensive menu. I tried the sope benedict, a delightful South of the Border twist on the classic benedict. Delicious! A little stingy on the fresh fruit for the price, but everything else was so great, I'm willing to overlook that! 😄","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdDs8LOq9MjL_IPGK7E3al&fid=0x0:0xa98af3cea0898747"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"Gwyn D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUI9PcNidUU1M_o3LlzJPf-DsOEC22SotT7JDaotjvbjZFXXVIz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Has become tradition about once a month to come here for breakfast.
The food is always hot and fresh. Specials are tempting and usually great value.
Staff have years of service, not a high turnover, which is nice. Great place, wonderful service and delicious food. Ask for Chan, he is the best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matthew Bonnes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJv1tE72m83YPdJouPFYrk0KX93_m1oBGTME1T2Mi4uO9XkQQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience at Broken Yolk Cafe. Food was excellent as always, but the service really stood out. Gordo was friendly, attentive, and kept everything moving without ever feeling rushed. He checked in at the right times and made the whole meal feel easy and relaxed. Solid spot with consistently good vibes","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"I.S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1UGROcoleNbCCNEEbl7E_Y6hUhjEeswAHpzzuBKuOea0iawxH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I came because I was looking for something fresh and healthy for lunch.  I'm surprise it has 4.3 stars.

My daughter ordered a classic avo toast and I ordered the "mom" omelette; both were disappointing.

The food took quite a bit to come out (not busy, it was 2:30pm and the restaurant was empty).  By the time it did come out, her avocado on the toast turned brown.  It looked very sad on that plate.  My omelette was not good.  It just had a strange taste...almost like the veggies were cooked in a lot of oil.  Even the homemade biscuit was not that good; dry and lacked any flavor.

Service was acceptable.  Coffee was meh.

Not for us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfwcH1cg&fid=0x0:0xa98af3cea0898747"],"When":"2025-1-7"},{"Name":"Be Real","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB6VFLtG8MxcuEdjBvpkfX0HYecELSQy5O8qHyF7hFKuwL6DMOvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited on a Friday morning and were seated right away. The service was prompt and cordial. My family enjoyed the food. Me, I thought that the pancakes were too thick and the crepes dough needed more flavor. My family loved the pancakes and crepes. My nephew said that his salad had too much grilled chicken. We are never happy. We had a wonderful time together.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDa1qieIw&fid=0x0:0xa98af3cea0898747"],"When":"2021-8-20"},{"Name":"Julia Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICsQ5BizwErP1QE-xG5ALskDHKJj5SOFesjSCbkIvotibeDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"My 87 year-old friend and I arrived 45 minutes before closing. We ordered and unfortunately they didn’t get the order right so they fixed it.
15 minutes before closing, they had started mopping the floors with straight Pine-Sol that permeated everything. They mopped the booths in front of us and behind us and the floor beside us!
There were only four of us in the restaurant, a table beside us and my friend and I.
The smell was so overwhelming that it literally affected our meal.
The manager was there and I mentioned to her I couldn’t eat it because the smell was so strong and obnoxious.
She took my gift card, and cleared it out of the amount that I had on there. I asked if she could come one of the meals because we couldn’t eat anymore.
We left at least half of our mail behind on our plates.
This was at the Mira Mesa San Diego, Broken Yolk.
It was Unprofessional and to be brushed off when we asked to have at least one of our meals comped and was denied.
I won’t go back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patrick and Nathalie Goldie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPx9nYYiCFE653NS-Kj9gE33txma5-wREXdGjnDyIZS3hDQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered three country fried steaks at Broken Yolk, smothered in gravy, with two eggs (one scrambled) and hashbrowns on the side. And of course, we had sourdough to help soak it all up. The steak was crispy, the gravy was rich enough to swim in, and the eggs and hashbrowns were the perfect supporting cast. The sourdough? Just the right tool for gravy cleanup duty. It’s a breakfast that’ll fill you up and keep you going until you realize you’re too full to move!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_hIKyuAE&fid=0x0:0xa98af3cea0898747"],"When":"2025-1-12"},{"Name":"Jasmine Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTHfQKlNhZTt41e_r7HSvuHo2U7Y_d8bRko9sxUhnpWFkgnnQpUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Diana was our server and she did a great job! Checked in with us but wasn't overbearing. We loved her as our server!

It was our first time in and the food was pretty good. We weren't wowed, but with a ton of options we are excited to come back and try something new!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Angel Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQt65H4-diZKw5_0in1zS9RkWbnNukG8dGby1EQHqrmrjJYwPaAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Complete Uniqueness, Nerve, and Talent are what’s needed to create the flavors that Nishiki offers. I don’t know if it was the right time or the right moment, but everything felt perfect to me—spiritual is the best way I can describe it. You can’t rush a cherry blossom 🌸🌸🌸. I hope the time is now for you to experience what I experienced at Nishiki, because Nishiki Ramen is serving it. 🌸🌸","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD938ZziRb1Bycu_w628Po3&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Tristan Harrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo_CwPTRcdR2OCD8s5J1qqUCf1IK_pnCUzjU7yuE5-q--oy8Hk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This location is not the same as the other location off Armour st. I can tell the level of service is decreased and food taste different.  My ramen barely had any broth and the taste was off. I have been going to the other location for over 5 years and I get the same Shoyu Ramen each time. The broth didnt even look like usual and the meat taste old. The Noddles taste old. The server Paris never checked on us or ask if everything is OK. She just stood behind the counter. We had to flag her down multiple times just to get a drink refilled. We came right when they open so there were only a couple people there. Ni excuses. My wife and I were not happy. We also did not like the attitude Paris gave us when we asked if there was a service charge. She was extremely rude. Service charge for what?? We didnt get any service. Check your cameras and tell me how many times they checked on us. I will never come back to this location. I will just keep going back to the other location off Armour. The foods taste better there and service has always been great. I'm getting tired of places adding a mandatory service charge and giving horrible service. I dont mind paying it at the other location because service has always been great. Not here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBPiBE36BRZHONt_1GBYYz5&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Khalid Omar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUsbe3jb84oV6vmNjPoJhyhgCp5XxJH3JrFAHjvloOrBtEDhiZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Japanese restaurant, serving ramen dishes of a range of variety and other items, including drinks.We ordered spicy Chicken ramen, spicy veg raven and Japanese Ramune strawberry soda.All were delicious.Service is good.However, for regular customer, it is expensive.See some customer dissatisfaction on curry.Management must resolve these issues at the earliest.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWPl35ggLeJ9KuFb2sQNKi&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Christina Chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILZTqtGMRhFCpF_r0lOQjIokn7UOs_EU06QOw6iDJigQX9Mw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They don’t have enough waitresses and chefs. This store tend to fulfill their online orders as priority. We arrived at 6:15pm and the store is not even half full. We were told that it will take 25-30mins to get the food. Ok! When we’re ready to order, they don’t take the order and said we have to wait until the previous guests who are not yet ready to order to get their orders first. The online orders from their system keep popping up and we waited for long time to get our food finally. The business model is really unfriendly to the guests dining in and they will automatically add 15% gratuities to your bill 👎even the services were bad!

Added: the quality of the ramen is not stable too. There was one time which was really good and ramen today tastes bland…it really depends on the chef that day. Probably will not come to this store anymore.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXrRCC4MT-gxGQYR5tAVxjE4p8PNoj1KdOSWedo5x6llbYwerS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wait times can happen but i was lucky enough to arrive when the other chef arrived.  Food was great and everyone else was pretty angry at the long wait… Oh well *slurps bowl","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCaeygevfsVxyOwvaHLG2bf&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Mr Free press","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1KzdeKMh82juGPSEhyfTOL1Y8Bo2YIozMKkYlrSe8vHyhalQe8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nishiki Ramen is a must-try spot for anyone who loves good, flavorful ramen. The broth is rich and full of depth, and you can tell it’s been simmered to perfection. The noodles had the perfect texture—nice and chewy—and the toppings were fresh and satisfying. I especially loved the pork chashu; it was tender and full of flavor. The atmosphere is cozy and modern, and the service was quick and friendly. Whether you’re a ramen fan or just looking for a solid meal, Nishiki Ramen delivers. I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGEZVRXRW3RmlhzYwWpfg7&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"Robert Gold","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0OlqhvlvhgJnHhKrZFOCEYIQjeZZGGCCduMLCVR_a6Dc_gyM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had dinner at Nishiki Ramen twice in the three weeks I was in San Diego and both times were incredible.  I had the smoke bomb ramen and the spicy chicken ramen, I would highly recommend either of these options; but I’m sure everything on the menu is just as good.  I will definitely be back the next time I’m in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeD-PS_XKOxzuzpxzINJp_&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2025-7-2"},{"Name":"Usha Khatiwada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKClq4gGwOr9TgMm0WPbN0wNeRhFtcbuxc2ScjnB2V7kG02tLr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to Nishiki Ramen to have lunch. Service was quick and polite. I got the Spicy vegetarian ramen. The noodles were thin, cooked well and the broth was flavorful.
My husband got the Nishiki ramen. Overall food was great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIxKygNg&fid=0x0:0x1fe249a921fa5c26"],"When":"2025-4-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"T Don","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnpQ6sKctlEQWRPM0CLo-x-JGf-a9mEImzx34ubS-zcGrbzRf46Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lots of parking.  Great food and lots of selection.  You lineup, pick your combo, and kindly ask the friendly Tita’s which entree you want.  My favorite was the sisig which is the fried pork belly, chopped, and tossed either onions, spices, and chilies.  Also got the kare-kare which is the peanut butter stew.  Lots of food for the money.  Will come back again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAtu1uUejBCJqVMP2kzvNmy&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Aaron Nigro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnx7vhl24u2fY9AVc3ghB6XzrlX8HdTWTKrZekPisCuKHoA4amcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I grew up with a melting pot of friends & Filipino cuisine was among various food types I grew up eating a lot. Pancit & lumpia are my favorite food by far & I haven’t had in years but on my way to the dr I saw R&B Filipino cuisine and had to stop…

Let me tell you when I took a bite of lumpia l, it sent shivers down my spine, the hair stood up on my arms and neck, and I swear I was glowing! Not from radiation lol, but that bite took me back to when I was seven years old, skateboarding to my friends house, knocking on the door asking if Julius can play, getting invited in to have lunch, & first discovering this Godsend of a food lumpia and it’s heavenly companion Pancit! 100% authentic and guaranteed to give you flashbacks! 10/10 you have to go here! It’s not even a recommendation, It’s your duty!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxHFI8wjcdoCoxzoXbx7Tw&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Everett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzwtcgDa2d1BBXxK2J_cllB7_4SbVpf650tc8o18-j4vhj4VTN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty food, good variety in choices.

I might be a bit biased going into this one. It's a favorite in my household where we like to stop by every couple weeks (I try to cook at home most the time).

First of all, it's basically as close to home cooked meals as you are going to get. Don't expect the world but expect to be satisfied with what you get.

Sisig is one of our favorites but for whatever reason, over the weekends it seems to be cooked better. Not sure why but we theorize there's either a different chef handling it or some other change in method. Regardless I recommend showing up Saturday & Sunday.

Service is great along side the portions. They could easily steal the old Olive Garden motto "When you're here, you're family" because it's just that place.

So if I like this place why the 4 stars? Because not everything is a banger, but it's all solid. There are some innate flaws being a cafeteria styles restaurant and that's ok. This place is worth the try and it's definitely worth the money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I miss R&B in Mira Mesa! The best food here is Sisig and Lechon Kawali! For lunch, we tried Kare-Kare, which is a dish with beef, long string beans, squash, eggplant, and shrimp sauce. We also had Bicol Express, a spicy Filipino dish. Of course, we couldn't miss out on Sisig and Lumpia! I miss it so much! The server is nice, and the atmosphere is good. It's always busy and affordable, so if we can't finish, we have leftovers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbqqDIBA&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2024-7-25"},{"Name":"User9","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlmwuczNydXJcjEB-bIls5d6RKR99hTGXLC76eyJc2NcLiUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time here, came at 11:30am on a Thursday, two other customers in the store. Ordered the combo, with BBQ Pork, Pancit, and Lechon Kawali (Fried Pork Belly). Staff there was pretty pleasant, and after ordering, she made it into a combo. Price was about $19.38 or so, and I just paid $20. None of the food was going bad, but generally a bit overcooked. BBQ Pork had a good taste, but was tough and chewy, and seems overcooked. The Lechon was better, and while the skin was crispy and the meat was flavorful, it seemed a bit overcooked. The pork fat was perfect though, literally melt in your mouth. The noodles were okay, not particularly bad or good. If they could shorten the cooking times, it could be really good. The meat wasn't going bad, and the flavors are good, just overcooked. I finished the noodles, fried pork belly, but only ate half of the BBQ pork. I give it 3.5 stars out of 5, although I rounded up to 4.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIQRrJAOCeKxaa8C0-_HaN&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Globetrotter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI6abyupnphkqAPwf9MKZhCUT1618V6guqw2gK5O_BoC2ga9o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A FOODIE’S FIND🤩🤩. It’s all about tempered flavor of AUTHENTIC FILIPINO cooking without any hint of adulteration. None of that “fusion” stuff. FLAVORFUL street-food style service.👍👍

The eatery is very unassuming, tucked in strip mall. It’s a small, likely family-owned business that seems to be very popular to ethnic Philippine emigres and Filipino-Americans as well other locals.

It’s a serving counter of freshly cooked food.👍👍👍The menu is on the board, but prices on the board are catering sizes. It very inexpensive: pricing is based on the size of the container (S, M, L, XL) that food is packed in.

It’s street food style service. No frills.

My most flavorful recommendations:
1. Fried fish: Fresh crispy fried without any greasiness. Simple salt/pepper seasoning 👏👏
2. Pinakbet: Classic Filipino dish of mixed tropical vegetables. The surprise was variety of Acorn squash has exquisite nutty flavor 🤩🤩
3. Kare kare: Classic stewed beef in peanut sauce. What was a pleasant surprise was the meat: it was a mixture of tripe, little bit of muscle and what I think was sweetbreads (thymus/spleen). It was superb. 🤩🤩🤩Feast with you palate!
4. Stewed taro leaf: another surprise 👏 The lowly young shoots/buds of taro stewed in coconut milk. It’s rich and delicate flavor😎
5. Eggplant torta: More like and omelet using an entire length of a Japanese eggplant.

There others in the menu to try, perhaps when on another San Diego trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChipOetgE&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Derrick Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxjH7sHYnX9znK2Mez7L3xxbTiLY-5ixPxE8hUBp_lzJ08qSRU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome Establishment With Fantastic People Who Treat Ypu Like Family And The Food Was Outstanding, Made Fresh And Hot. We Came In For The First Time Eating Filipino Food And I Was Overjoyed With Everything. Well Will Definitely Be Back For More Good Food And Outstanding Service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_ldC_Wg&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2025-1-17"},{"Name":"Daygo Eats","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4jtYsSLgiMs-RHR0m_Q2qe5P2yhAWSpCuzApxylGpJCe17-dooQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best and cheapest (~$13) Filipino food spot nearest to the UCSD area. I'm a Mexican from the South of the city and my go to place is down in Chula Vista, but I attend college up here and have been looking for a good spot up here. The Filipinos at school would swear by this spot and I'd tried Manila Food but didn't love it so todays the day I finally gave this place the chance.

I absolutely loved the food especially considering that I'd only ever had mediocre Filipino food in the area. I got the 1 item Plate with all Pancit, and my entree as the BBQ Pork. I'm personally a bigger fan of BBQ chicken but this spot didn't offer it; I'm just glad it came on the stick. I also got some lumpia and paired everything with a diet pepsi.

The sauce they accompanied with the lumpia was unique and I'd never tried anything like that. It was definitely a sweet and sour sauce but it was like infused with a tamarind something. However I will have to say, the lumpia were not my favorite. They're okay and I will be coming back but I'll be sticking to the bbq pork and the pancit.

The place is not huge, but you can definitely eat comfortably although it's all kind of catered for togo. Everything is fresh and it's just a real authentic Filipino ran food spot which I can absolutely appreciate. This is the kinda place that feeds a community and I'm glad to have been able to come find it and support this business.

They took some time to address me and I think the ladies were a little thrown off by my presence considering that I don't look Filipino and definitely do not speak Tagalog. Either way, they got my order in and served it properly so that's all I really have to say about the service. They served me and catered to my requests and I'm appreciative of that.

Give it a try if you've never had it cause you might've just discovered one of your newest and cheapest favorite food spots.

Overall, DAYGOEATSAPPROVED✅","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv0bG2dw&fid=0x0:0xc16ab6bcd9878715"],"When":"2024-12-12"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Fat Maggot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQ-4QPblL0Hzt64Pfp6BHeVsXTuYFWT_P1l3huEAzkLVO-dXCTQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Hands down the worst dim sum I’ve ever had anywhere. I feel bad for anyone who sets foot in here. The manager will attempt to say that this review as old information (as he tried to do on Yelp), but I went to this restaurant on 12/26/2025 and the photos were from that day, so their attempts at discrediting me are blatant lies.  Stay away from this disgusting restaurant.
------------------
There is so much wrong with this place.

Upon entering, one is the greeted with the harsh aroma of kerosene? Or is it butane? Or propane?  Whatever it is, it's not what one wants to smell indoors in a restaurant in which one plans on spending a bit of time ... as dim sum isn't a quick undertaking. Upon quick inspection to discern the source of this smell, we saw it was coming from an open flame that was on one of the carts that was traveling around the dining room (see my pic of the cart with the fire burning on it).  I know that dim sum carts are often heated to keep the food from getting cold during service, but never once have I smelled the heat source. And starting the meal off with the ambience of a gas leak was not something I anticipated at all. We should have just walked out because it just got worse from that point forward.

There were only 2 of us so we didn't go crazy, but we ordered a good amount. ALL the dishes were served TEPID in temperature and that is simply unacceptable.

We grabbed some go-to staples as the carts went by (in this order):
-Shrimp dumplings
-Chicken feet
-BBQ pork rice rolls
-Shrimp rice rolls
-Pan-fried buns
-Sesame balls

And we ordered a couple of dishes off the menu from the kitchen:
-Chinese broccoli (gai lan) with oyster sauce
-Beef chow fun (sautéed wide flat noodles)

Shrimp dumplings- When one went to pick it up with one's chopsticks, it just completely fell apart and regurgitated its filling into the metal steamer basket. (See pic). The filling on these was not seasoned well and the texture was also too dense. They didn't even taste good.

Chicken feet- These were not left in the steamer long enough and they were overly chewy and hard to eat. The tendons were hard to separate from the bones which means they needed a lot more time. The entire dish was under seasoned and needed about twice the amount of sauce, being on the dry side.

The BBQ pork rice rolls had a structural issue like the shrimp dumplings, and some were intact and others were excreting their fillings out of splits on the side. Also, the filling was bland and needed a lot more seasoning causing the whole dish to be bland even with the soy sauce drizzled over it.

The shrimp rice rolls were served room temperature (what?!) and the shrimps were too firm and slightly fishy (eek!) while the rice roll wrapper was flimsy just like the BBQ pork versions above.

The pan fried buns appeared legit and held promise until I bit into them. The filling was salty enough, but too dense like a meatball and the bottoms of the buns were not crisp enough.  Usually, one expects the filling to be juicier and looser, somewhere between a regular steamed pork bun and a soup dumpling. The pan fried bottoms should yield a satisfying crunch when juxtaposed with the soft steamed doughy top. These were not fried for long enough so they weren't very crispy at all.

Sesame balls - this was the only item that tasted ok and as expected, but it was not served warm despite being on a cart with a wide open flame licking the cart shelves.

Chinese broccoli with oyster sauce struck out initially because the server brought hoisin sauce instead of oyster sauce and we didn't notice until we put the sauce on everything then started eating only to be horrified by the sweet taste. We sent that dish back and they remade it, but we didn't get it until 30 minutes later. It came out cold, but with the correct sauce. The texture of the leaves was too soft, as they over-poached it. There is no photo of this because, by this point, I was so frustrated I stopped taking photos.

Beef chow fun - this dish never came as they forgot about it....","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAr_pt3_8Ng4Hn3iEWhvdY8&fid=0x0:0x5bc0749119118526"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"My Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-o38aNqhmbPRZUZYMfBXJ4xFkgUX4l-cE6T9emtIIZJWEKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We normally come here for their all day dim sum menu but decided on their dinner menu for lunch. It came out to be a very expensive and deceiving meal.

Their portions are huge and price caters to banquet size of a table of 10. The fish maw soup ($27.99) was delicious and had actual crab meat and seafood, herbal, sponge items.

The salted fish fried rice was not overly salted. Had plenty of fish and chicken ($24.99).

Our third and final item was the steam whole fish ($58.88). The menu was deceiving when it listed items under live seafood with market value price when in reality, they do not carry live seafood. Their tank was empty. The server told us it's frozen fish shipped from Vietnam!

Why am I paying $60 for a dead frozen fish! Even the receipt was rang up as daily catch market price. The fish was good and we would have never guessed that it was frozen.

They need to be transparent and list the previously frozen price just like crab boil places that use frozen crawfish during off season. We felt blinded sided and cheated.

A cup of tea is charged at $2.88 per person so decline if you don’t drink tea.

4/5 for food taste but 1/5 for charging market price on a frozen item and marketing as live seafood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDri2hU8W7uR4u7yOkIRHT_&fid=0x0:0x5bc0749119118526"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Eder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9uEI70d-oKbQw-O5H1UVgCf4EkIszI2SwlCoTQLCd9VPmRWmD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you know what you're doing here then this review is not for you, this is for the First timers.

They will roll carts near you and as you if you want anything.
Many dishes.
Once you decide, they will check the paper to track what you ordered.

You will have a piece of paper on your table to check ✔️ off what you order. So you can order exactly what you like, whether its a soup, dumplings or anything else etc.

They have many dishes that doesn't contain meats. And others do.
So if you're fasting, this place will have what you like.

Delicious food.
Its comes in 4 pieces per order, so I found out to be 2 or more people its cheaper and better for tasting different types of dishes/dumplings.
There will be someone with wheeled crate with hot or warm food freshly delivered every few minutes.

For 2 persons its was a little over $50 pre-tax pre-tip.
The only thing was, it was a little pricey but for the taste and the service, it Worth it.

The place is nice and clean. The service is very good, its also a good place for a large groups of people.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC25enyxQE&fid=0x0:0x5bc0749119118526"],"When":"2022-4-26"},{"Name":"Jack Monaco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQJPJuEbsL-5cqqQ7qYfWxythCuVTKLCI-KJZwAfqcDmTDiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Debated whether or not to post this as a review, since I never had the food ordered online for pickup. It’s downright aggravating to go to the trouble of ordering in advance for pickup to insure getting to a commitment on time. Sunday at 2:30PM, arrived expecting my food to be bagged and ready. No one at reception so I flagged down a waitress and gave her my order confirmation. She then proceeded to cruise tables in the dining room and left me standing in the lobby. After about 5 minutes she went to service area and conferred with several others. Then as an afterthought she came back to inform me the order “wasn’t ready” and invited me to be seated and wait. When I asked how long, she said it would be a while. I can only assume they don’t prepare to go pick orders until the guest arrives, which defeats the purpose of ordering in advance. Bottom line, this practice is not unique to them. I cancelled the order and left. Be forewarned, if you think you’re saving time by ordering pickup online, you may be disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynn ousley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsr1Kg25rzYTtmupJAHGe78l9XNqM-SjYAFX3ecxPJcdT3tpM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Met up with some long term friends.
Quiet on a Monday night. Although food did not all come out at once, service was efficient.  Always fun to order different small portioned plates.  Had everything from Chinese broccoli, mushu pork, soup dumplings.  I usually love the rice noodles beef, but ordered the rice noodle pork… I think I’ll stick with my rice noodle beef instead.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVw-nspNyOQhW3gj7ht6pp&fid=0x0:0x5bc0749119118526"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Kathleen Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1nl5Lprzp6fUbgD9Iu7u5fXyxBlzep0HhSTpBdA_mww6JnC-B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The dinner menu is quite good. They have a lot of nice banquet style Cantonese dishes that I have not encountered elsewhere in San Diego. It all tastes fresh. Prices are reasonable. The restaurant is huge and has a lot of tables and space for private events. Parking lot is also large.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeKKkCw9JSPDx4OZ2sEVXnuJey3ycW5dMMJhhAlH5AtvQiRg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went for dim sum. The food was great. Lots of dishes being pushed around on the carts and you can from the menu if you want. The service was bad, but that’s to be expected from Chinese restaurants. It’s a good place if you don’t mind flagging down waiters yourself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Sandler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeXZpTWuL4mVma95CuVToAQoIQpvBA8i4kMp64EvyVIALBVhHD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this dim sum place. Overall +++++","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgaRi8VDy0d6r-BhriLi4a&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2025-8-7"},{"Name":"David Butler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_grmljFPq-ruut21xKi2KF6-wLsUl4_KqkC53CsjnYwShRBRn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was delicious, good sized portion and arrived quickly. Highly recommend! Went on a Monday evening and not empty but also not crowded","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMpfCSc3YHqvsFTaVmDcRW&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"James Bray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWs6Jkjc7ff_2qZM3FI0IZsRjxgOUoC0Z5ks_IZExgb90NhJN8Mxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful Pho here! Fast attentive service and did I mention great Pho? They do accept credit cards, the prices are very reasonable and tons of selections. I had the Vegetable Pho with tofu. Delicious! Only issue was the noise level. Several large groups and hard walls and surfaces made it a bit difficult to talk. Your experience may differ. Plentiful free parking lot. They also deliver using Grub Hub. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID1orzGBg&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2024-1-6"},{"Name":"Alrick Courten","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4b_Ydn3O7ljm9gNwjYthaLcnwAWH3ZsKh5bpGR1fPFNLb_cIfKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very disappointed in the P1. That was NOT filet mignon. The meat was tough and chewy like rubber. I could not eat it. It was definitely a different and cheaper cut of beef. The Spring Rolls were very good..that’s it!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Without Limitations","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwokIxJHQmed6ng5JVs6LJoAS3XUerpdt0NSxwMjyvmGrmsuXJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This place has the best Pho 🍲 I’ve had in San Diego. That’s why I ordered the French Beef Stew

Unfortunately it was disappointing on several levels.

They advertise a Baguette 🥖 as an option over rice. I was really looking forward to dipping that crunchy bread into the stew. Instead I got a Mexican roll that’s soft and not very good when you dip it in the sauce.

The portions seem off? Not sure if it’s because I got it to go or if 3 cubes of meat and 5 carrot 🥕 chunks is normal?  It wasn’t worth $13

Flavors in the stew are good and the meat is extra tender.  Think they reheat your portion when you order.  Very good flavor just nothing to the meal??

I’m glad I got the rice 🍚 too or I would still be hungry. I recommend the PHO here don’t go with this stew unless they have a REAL baguette 🥖

3 stars for stew flavor only, the meal was not worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICusejOGQ&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2022-7-30"},{"Name":"Allie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKBDt6drU2R7cHupE2ez7V-GvOUbyORhTMaLvsbJAsFyilouQCmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this food! My favorite dish is the Filet on rice. I usually get it with the broken rice, which is a little extra fried, but the white rice is really good too. The meat is super tender and super flavorful! It’s a great deal too with a generous portion and nice little side salad.

I just tried the egg rolls for the first time tonight and they’re some of the best egg rolls I’ve ever had! I think they have curry spice or something, so delicious! The sauce that comes with the eggs rolls and salad is amazing too. I actually like putting it on my rice and meat for the extra flavor!

The fresh lemonade is also fantastic. It’s got some lime in it too and is so refreshing! Thank you for my delicious meal! 😁","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL1f-9ggE&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Michael Pham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVckHQeOptDmAzc-Bon7WloiRME0LB69kGJipkxZVNtDWPSPM1z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic, been wanting to try this for myself after hearing mixed reviews.  The service and staff we're great.  Friendly and attentive - water was kept topped off without having to ask.

We came mid week at 1130 and we're luckily able to get a table for 5 right away, after that the place started filling up however not to the point that people were waiting outside.

We shared egg rolls and spring rolls, both served with respective dipping sauce (lettuce with the egg rolls).  Great for sharing!  Both traditional and fresh!  Spring rolls were nice and soft, ingredients were all in the right place for a home made taste.

We also tried the Pho (P2) and Pho Bo Kho (P6) - i'm generally picky about the broth needing to be balanced, not to rich and definitely not bland.  For both of them, they were really spot on!  I would recommend this place to friends as i think it was that good and IMO authentic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk2rrUcQ&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2019-4-16"},{"Name":"Zhu Zhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLLb5SK_sVga87vU4QmJSp6ohRCO2sKAiXsR0s3Zkk_CYrtyc4Sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had lunch here many times. Always good. Everything is fresh and the quality of meats have been consistently good. Excellent grilled pork chops, pho and spring rolls.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBstWpqQE&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2023-1-16"}]

Delicious meals. Indoor and outdoor seating available. Good prices. Free parking lot. Heard great things about the place so I tried it. They were all correct. Enjoy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAaixqfzVFORyuZ3oaHjAt-&fid=0x0:0xc1c1410ecc8a566c"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Pelumi Olaleye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAqvqbW7WKYiCmCATjEGasbI16L9vL9cy4v63esTFD-I-6jgm_2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time visiting. There is a yoga house that’s right next door that I’ve been going to for over 5 years but I stepped foot inside Vallarta for the first time today. I was dying of hunger and wanted egg whites and steak specifically. At first the lady up front said they couldn’t make it egg whites but I guess the chefs in the back heard me and made just what I wanted. Food was good and atmosphere was clean and and inviting. I highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAU4Eq1Pgw8m788RREy6_5&fid=0x0:0xc1c1410ecc8a566c"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Jeb Bartolome","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxQlRC8nK_hm1xtXxKnNnM2oJnm7A6CF6GAxI89QV4V1uNjBE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I’ve been going to Vallarta Express in Mira Mesa for over a year now and have always loved this place for its prices and generous portions. The service has consistently been friendly, and it’s been one of my go-to spots for a quick meal.

Unfortunately, today’s visit was by far the worst experience I’ve had here. The staff were friendly as usual, but the issue was with the food itself. I ordered a breakfast burrito with bacon,eggs, no beans, and I asked to substitute the potatoes for fries since the potatoes are usually too soft for my liking. About a quarter of the way through my burrito, I found what appeared to be a metal shaving, likely from a dish-washing bristle scrubber, inside the burrito.

I’m extremely thankful I noticed it before swallowing. Something like that could seriously injure someone or send them to the hospital. This kind of mistake is concerning and shows a lack of attention to food safety.

I’ve always recommended Vallarta Express to friends and family, but after this experience, I’m honestly not sure if I’ll be returning. I hope the restaurant takes this as an opportunity to improve their kitchen safety and quality control.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCm2TDKJcXnX0hvNrnOWgrp&fid=0x0:0xc1c1410ecc8a566c"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"andre mcneil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZRkDsokRKityAL75FDwoOANv7eriACxUSa0IEP_c1Xn7jtFxS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I have Philly chicken burrito and if you got a big appetite then that or any of they burrito will fill you up. I could finish mine. My coworker had a christian fries and it was also a lot that my co-worker couldn't finish it. We both had a small orchard drink and was good as well. The people were friendly and helpful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnEjrDPjjfk_Rc6Q4rBE4t&fid=0x0:0xc1c1410ecc8a566c"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Miroslav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcdyerWOFIL8CTckrf-_vRlImQ0Ix4i-BoB-tPLVBmqMp4Fid6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 start for sure!! Them carne asada burritos and quesadillas are HUGE. The best $/weight of pure meat that you can get in the area (Philly steak on the photo)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7EhZyKtVJhQaeBAjYNGbC&fid=0x0:0xc1c1410ecc8a566c"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"William Vu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6tP7_P6Cg7Q8gYrS7WUSCr22LUi7eDY7B_cAGEv8R8DpQgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was served a meal here that had a foreign object in it. I dont know what was worse the food or the service. Lack of flavor in all the food, the entire enchilada was stuffed with unmelted cheese, and the taco was soft because of all the sauce drenched on top. The "basic" service was no where to be found. Dont wasted time and money here, for that price you can get a even better frozen meal and heat it up in your microwave 😑 not worth 1 star","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlene Hsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYm2AHqPn55t7qWiTX-2jJPaSqRQ1FgAB05oWwYNtsBOfWLFN_Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Christian fries were so good and very filling.
