user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mr. Adam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUR6v21hjkNfVwWAzHWQf34FDsqLeOQ0V64-kuvNcpcjcJdjepmwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We have been here quite a few times to pickup warm and fresh pandesal as well as a few other times for lunch. Service is consistent, energetic, welcoming and always smiling faces to take your order. Depending on the time of day you visit, there could be a short line or none at all.

As for the pandesal, it is good! They’re not the traditional smaller sizes that you would find back home but almost tastes the same and is also packed in brown paper bags. The dough is somewhat airy and not too thick like another local place. As for the dishes, we have tried a few off the regular menu and they’re ok, nothing too fancy, more on the mediocre home cooking side.

What prompted me to give a review today was this was the first time we tried their “silogs”. I’m a big breakfast person and always give credit where credit (and props) are due, so my small amount of criticism is not an attack on any establishment or the cook for that matter. Maybe it was not the regular cook today but breakfast was not enjoyable at all.

You are asked “how do you like your eggs” when placing an order for any silog platter. To my surprise, all of the eggs in our orders were cooked the same, over hard; a far cry from sunny side up or over easy. The tosilog, tapsilog and longanisa were dry and hard with little to  no fats (taba). Not sure if it was old meat, leftovers from the previous day, I don’t know, just speculating. Now one can argue that they were in to go packaging so the steam overcooked everything. But the food was opened and consumed within 5 minutes of leaving Trining’s.

Some in our culture might say that I’m being “maarte” and to be thankful and just eat. But there is a certain expectation that when we eat out, the food will be somewhat better than your own home cooking especially when the prices for eating out have gone up. The sinangag ( garlic fried rice was bland), I did not taste or see any garlic and felt like it was fried in old oil. Although the portions were large but unfortunately, the meats or “ulam” and eggs were too dry and overcooked which made for a disappointing breakfast.

Generous with the 5 Stars for service with a smile and warm greeting and also for the pandesal always being consistent.  But it’s 3 stars for the silogs since it could be better, a lot better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp2Nb_Lw&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2023-8-15"},{"Name":"Marilin Welch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9kd-Ny9iOFyz4E2zczvAhe3aBWuhNKTLZWGnkfTORDl_rR0U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came to try Filipino food for the first time and safe to say it was amazing. Me and my husband had the tapsilog plate. I had a chicken empanada and my husband had a beef empanada. The empanadas were so good and flavorful. We also had a mango juice that came from a pouch that was sooo good. The tapsilog was so flavorful it combines so well with the white rice and the over easy eggs. Staff were super nice and we went when it was not packed so we dined in and it was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjg4vY_QE&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2024-4-25"},{"Name":"Marc P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQ0CyeOQHu0qq1ESYROAfb6JlHNSzOiaz95pphmBZLMQHcOFnz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pretty good breakfast. Got tocino and the longanisa which were both good and the rice was very flavorful, had a nice garlic taste. Lots of depth to the flavor in both dishes. Also got the Ube cheese rolls which were very good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR5JqM3wE&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2023-3-25"},{"Name":"William Bloomberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQydsbmiAUj8jVHWs3ZPkvtF1sA4p_NJz1qW8M2m0Q9ivfg4tn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Trining’s is “in transition” and it shows. The front is a bit disorganized, but well divided into baked goods and ready-made take out products. The menu is hand-written on a wall-mounted white board (see pictures), but is easily understood and clearly legible.

Now, for the food—Very good! Loved the lumpia. The sweet chili sauce had just a hint of heat to it. Perfect!

We also got chicken adobo and pancit. Both were excellent. Since I ordered two combos to go, I was very careful not to tip the containers and tried to avoid contaminating the pancit with adobo sauce. All for naught. I must have leaned on the brakes a bit too heavily because the very fluid adobo sauce obeyed the laws of physics and colored both the pancit and lumpia. With dark, rich, peppery adobo flavoring. But—it was still great! The chicken adobo was tender and tasty, and the pancit was yummy, even though it tasted more like adobo than pancit. The lumpia, as I expected, was to die for. Crisp and crunchy with a hint of heat from the chili sauce. So good!

Well done Trining’s. Get your front together and I’ll be back. Can I bring some friends with me? I’ve got some East coast buddies who think egg rolls are the bomb. Your lumpia can easily blow that theory out of the water…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbo83LEA&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2024-8-12"},{"Name":"Jay Keyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUijA5kb0Aitt_wbwq64TAofv-i0_U5DUEWSih8K3kaz2y0ObIWWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice small bakery and restaurant in Mira Mesa strip mall serving traditional Filipino breakfast, lumpia, among other things. I love their Longsilog (longanisa sausage, garlic fried rice, and fried sunny-side up egg). Low key and unassuming, a great nook for breakfast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDc5P7l-QE&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2020-5-24"},{"Name":"Angie A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgqxLAXUM608LPrKpFt2CNLHkhrm6CRgf9yIR6EBT1b-F821ewvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favorite place to go when I miss my childhood. The food is yummy. Tastes just like home.
My favorite thing to order is the karekare with rice. The portion is large, this can easily be shared or split into two meals.
The silog is also good. I always get longsilog, because it reminds me of childhood.
Every time I go I also get cantaloupe juice!

I've had their pan de sal and desserts as well. Best pan de sal in the area in my opinion. The flan is also very good and flavorful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDt0MC4uwE&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2024-2-2"},{"Name":"E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-75pSxD3lFmwxIUQ1efRkSBKSvB37ig-eYprls7GKM5w4wedf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down good Filipino food, super fresh and tasty!!! So many selections for pastry/dessert too!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6vq2bpQE&fid=0x0:0xcfdd0d8e6e75c203"],"When":"2021-10-1"},{"Name":"Ella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPRs5mHXe_VWQIdrNlIr3AHyULtcx6nwoogX1eIlvwaj18VOP0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Waited for 30 minutes long for food & everything was cold & all bland! It is VERY disappointing! Came all the way here to Temecula from Lake Forest to try Filipino food. Our 1st & last! Never coming back here! I am sure this not the only Filipino eatery in Temecula. I rarely give review but have to.😡","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Flakiss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB09eLnQlNXKltzCfRpChZZYngUUDLwuahQw6SU1WiuMMz-xc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brought my son for his bday very beautiful restaurant many pictures and decorations to look at. Prices are good,but if u order while very hingry prices can be a bit high..but to me it was my sons bday,went there to avoid traffic and has more parking than the one ay DT SD. It wasnt very packed,maybe because it was during the week. Food so deliciously made,we where amazed. Guy who brought the desert to sing happy bday didnt look to happy when I started recording,instead he put down the candle and desert tham everyone sang happy bday. Maybe thats how they do it,to be carful with the candle,but he did gave me an odd look with unsure hi ,weird vibes and made me so uncomfortable. Guy who took our order was very helpful,and older man in the front so sweet. Im not from that area but would def go back to try other delicious food and be able to take more photos if thats possible.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAYNHM4UDikSAM6ZnV5A1z&fid=0x0:0x9d60461300ca385e"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Tam Adventures & More","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl5Jebf_IsD_saqMEyM5KWq1fPUNhbeVCzS8l4NeqRbtshafK2eQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DRY!
Ordered delivery. Spaghetti and chicken parmesan. Again the Spaghetti was soooo dry noodles had faint red and maybe 3 dime size pieces of dried up tomato. This happened once before. 2nd time. Im done. All 5 of my guests were very disappointed.
WHERE'S THE SAUCE!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfDwbvsXkGkJSuVJjma03U&fid=0x0:0x9d60461300ca385e"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"KakuBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWutlKZi6Y01z2Y5IREHHTIWtcCCIaHmbgvMr5DtNejgeQXtjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Italian casual dining restaurant chain focusing on family style meals with large portions. As of 9/2025, prices have escalated, which changes the perceived food / drink value.

The Arrabbiata pizza had a thin crust with delicious spicy Italian sausage, three cheeses, and pizza sauce. The crust had a good flavor and the ingredients were well-cooked and seasoned. Note: The pizza is not necessarily a family-sized serving when compared to the pasta, salad, and dessert dishes.

The spicy chicken rigatoni was piping hot, with a nice rosa sauce (tomato and cream), chunks of chicken, peas, and a touch of crushed red pepper. The rigatoni was al dente with a nice body and slightly chewy texture.

Note: The wait can be quite long for take out and dining in, so calling ahead can be helpful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDuqngc1JVYmtuxNYBPE-I&fid=0x0:0x9d60461300ca385e"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"newportnews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYn6HTXDQXd6gYfDrzy1dpT6GDCiQCnJLSz7PbNszCRYvPNw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Rarely write reviews but had to share.. I don't know where they get off with their prices. $40 for stuffed shells, $30 for calamari appetizer, $50 for seafood entrees. They had one waiter for all the tables, poured wine skimpily. It's a shame because it's a lovely setting. But far from fine dining that warrants those prices. Seems like financially struggling and milking each table. Would be more successful as a comfy Italian place with $25-$30 entrees.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pamela Hardaway","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWvdGnMu3kYGXMhr7vVHV-e2MRLNPkqhIYFMTTKr2NbD8O21pT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was excellent service was a little slow because they had just opened. The meatballs and lasagna was incredible. The fettuccine was also good. The salmon was a 7 out of 10. We would definitely go back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katie Faucher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGi9bz_Wkyqfmiw4A4676T6n3OOurHwmmIS7kcHKxqjVkwVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Never been to this restaurant.  Just kept seeing in from the highway.  It's bigger than it looks.  Photographs of yesteryear are over the restaurant.  Very much an Italian atmosphere.  Family sized portions.  Nobody gets their own plate.  It's all for sharing.  Had the large size ravioli and Caesar salad.  So delish!!! Plus got to snack on the warm Italian loaf with vinager and olive oil.  Very impressive.  Waitress was totally cool.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Te'Anna Merck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAyHaqtcJ6AX2mL6rHrKvFo_QBn8B6qo7Jw-k0MUKh_vr9d5OyYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything was amazing. The food was great. I love the effort they put into the decorations. Beautiful portraits everywhere! They also have photos available, a camera man came and took pictures for us to have a little souvenir to remember the night! They have great pasta here.

side note The Caesar salad was to DIE for! It was seriously the best Caesar salad i've ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICTpLjV5wE&fid=0x0:0x9d60461300ca385e"],"When":"2024-5-11"},{"Name":"Nidhi Boggula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrDJT1_7GT97DxDFxLDBJ6PMbgSw7_buqEsMgqg6P4qKTMsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was great! The portion sizes were pretty big. It could literally feed a whole family. Loved the vibe of this restaurant, will be coming back👍🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCosw2Lt8J97Xt5IkS6PQLl&fid=0x0:0x9d60461300ca385e"],"When":"2025-8-8"}]

[{"Name":"Siddartha Donthula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMSCro94SEWShYUKiGH9wXGy6y3QkuI05wDa8FXZvWQQt8hPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried this restaurant with my work colleagues and we had a great experience. The food choices were elaborate (quite a few vegetarian dishes), ranging from Italian, Indian to Indo Chinese. We tried baby corn manchuria, hakka noodles, burnt garlic fried rice and panneer tikka. All the dishes were delicious, talk to your server about the spice levels though as some dishes can be a bit spicy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmKpn5t3bNvk7j-hPZd8KY&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Brittany Scalise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFdAqqx5C1NZhfuA3Amr5Mtwiigk2lxSDNCxlSmbbvrCprX_0EuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found this place as a happy accident because the kitchen was open late!

The Szechuan curry with baby corn was really great. The bar tender tried to warn me (as I ordered it) that it was spicy, so I clarified “Szechuan spicy not chili spicy, right?”
It had a little kick but not spicy imo!

Wednesday and Friday they have live music, open mic, and karaoke!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuD59YhNMZf1nmKvtddE7Z&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Nicole Pelroy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiKOingfqvvA1KpFFC5xRlZThE-WGoOSKAh4H0_HQDfGVvGd0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sooooo good! Flavors were beyond amazing! Can’t wait to go back! Our bartender Ani was amazing, drinks were strong and the vibes were great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCqW6zDyUeFYUwjre2o5nyO&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Meghana Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVU6w80N-jo8Cqfu3QZReSUAW3PkLL9wGY1R0XPdFrFbbzdVSrZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"District 6 Gastropub and Kitchen in San Diego offers a delightful dining experience with a modern twist on classic dishes. The menu features a variety of flavorful and innovative options, from gourmet burgers to creative small plates. We absolutely loved the Paneer Naan Tacos. The ambiance is stylish and inviting, making it a great spot for both casual outings and special occasions. The craft beer and cocktail selections are impressive, complementing the food perfectly. Friendly and attentive service adds to the overall enjoyable experience. Whether you're a foodie or just looking for a great meal, District 6 Gastropub and Kitchen is a top choice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICribjbMQ&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2024-7-8"},{"Name":"Michelle Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqgh9xSNcyU7roLXj9veLVh8EP_QIoYAWRYS-blFUIy085HVuT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just moved to the area from Northern California and love everything about this place! I had the tikki masala fries and I could not rave about them enough, mouth watering!  So excited to try the rest of the menu! My first time was a Saturday night -cute little outdoor area, ton of tvs and a couple of pool tables. The bartender was amazing (I cannot recall her name but the bartender the next day[yes I went back two days in a row] informed it was probably Sarah). She was so sweet and hospitable, legitimately made my boyfriend and I feel like family. I went back the next day on Sunday to watch a football game. The bartender Raj was super kind and was willing to put on any channel needed for any football game. He was very attentive and kind even though I sat at the bar to watch the whole football game and only ordered a few drinks. As I was getting ready to leave Ani came on shift, I didn’t get a ton of interaction with him but what I had of course wasn’t anything less than amazing like I had with the rest of the staff. You can tell they are selective with their employment and pick the best of applicants!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went there again and it was truly a hidden gem!!! The drinks, the foods and the price are all great! The service is a little bit slow, so please make sure you go there for a no rush meal.
Previous review- It’s a very nice place to have a drink and some Indian inspired pizza dishes. We were really impressed by this place. We ordered an Italian Pav Bhaji pizza, which is super special, and so delicious. It’s still cheesy like a pizza and definitely contains Indian flavor. I love it. There are some other pizzas I would try the next time. The cocktails here are great too. My hubby ordered a smoky Japanese whiskey drink and it comes in a teapot with all smoke inside. It looks amazing and he loves the taste as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID28rqc8QE&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2022-5-11"},{"Name":"Haylee Jane Monteiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4F6GmFKEiNWrzo0vPgBuUR_Cl9LqyfsnuPuZFB3oLMLipcJNuMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for a dinner with some friends after looking at the menu and all being very impressed with it. Definitely love the food here and come again!

D6 Chicken Tikka Fries - So so good!! I was actually surprised but this ended up being my favorite dish of them all. Good amount of fries and the chicken tikka Masala on top had so much flavor. It went really well with the fries as well.

Street Side Chow Mein - really good portion size and the noodles were so good even on their own.

Szechwan Chicken - I asked for no mushrooms and extra vegetables on this but they did not deliver on that aspect. A bit too much gravy and they weren't as many vegetables as expected. Chicken was flavorful though.

Cauliflower Manchurian Wings - And I was surprised by this one as well! So much flavor and it was hard to actually share this one because I could have eaten it all myself, haha.

Butter Makhni Rigatoni - What a funky mashup dish. This actually came through with the Flavor of the butter chicken. And it actually went so well with the pasta!

Italian Pav Bhaji Pizza - A little bit of a disappointment here. I was really expecting so much more in terms of the flavor of the actual bhaji that goes in the pav bhaji, but it just tasted like a bunch of things thrown onto the pizza base.

Veggie California Love - was delicious! Just the right amount of toppings to crust ratio and a good flavor to the droppings and the crust as well.

Everyone loved the drinks too! The mojito and","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpmqSBwQE&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2023-8-20"},{"Name":"Crystal Kamada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvOxOWwnV-_kuEe0x5aacDEyzRdZEIzpeGachS-H_Vy0uAzcg57Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We first met chef Archana Nirwan over a year ago when she opened her first restaurant Naturally Desi in Rancho Bernardo and they've been our go-to ever since.  So when she told us she would be opening another spot in my hometown of Mira Mesa we were excited to check it out!

She aims for this location to be the first Indian-Fusion Gastro Bar of its kind in the area, and trust us when we say everything is so creative and amazing! We tried:

🧉 Nirwana Mule (alcohol) & Cardamom Mule (non-alcoholic)
🍸Bahubali Bubble (bartender got SKILLS! such a cool drink but I didn't capture the smoky bubble topper in a picture, just vid on Instagram)
🧆Golgappa Shots (appetizer - u pour the juice, vodka optional, into the crunchy cracker shell)
🌮Chicken Tikka & Paneer Tikka Tacos
🍕Butter Chicken Pizza
🥗Tandoori Chicken Salad
🍝Tandoori Chicken Spaghetti (so creamy and nicely flavored!)
🍩Gulkand Donut (rose syrup glazed!!!)

HARD to pick a favorite but it might just be that spaghetti.  The owner strives to create fusion flavors that are spicious vs chili heat, so you aren't left with heart burn pain.

The restaurant space is really nice too and great for groups, so we can't wait to go back with some friends and try some more!

📍8242 Mira Mesa Blvd, San Diego, CA 92126
(Old Tapp Pizza/Indochin former Mandarin Garden location inside the Mira Mesa Mall)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-nfXC-wE&fid=0x0:0x5a87c40927bc92a8"],"When":"2022-11-11"}]

[{"Name":"Katherine Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9U40FmfxEAGKEQVCaEK1G6F4mgorNP_dnLDguHzAQ1B5YaXc2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was exceptional. My husband and I went to San Diego for an event called San Diego swap meet and we were very tired. We didn’t know what to eat and on Google the first thing or option that popped on my phone with this and I am so glad that I was able to choose this place because the service was great from the start. We did come with our dog And they were so kind to give us a seat inside and they did have us closer to like the entrance in like a corner, but I was just so glad that we didn’t have to be outside in the dark and they were just really great all the food was so good like if I can go back and have their food I will like I won’t make that drive to San Diego because they were just so kind to my husband myself and our small terrier dog. I did not record what we had but here are the images you can ask because they were all insanely good insanely good. There were some wings there that I guess our mix or cooked with fish some type of fish oil or something like that when they bring the dish it does smell funny where you’re like wait, no I don’t think this is gonna be good but once you try it, you change your mind completely. It’s amazing. Will definitely come again. You guys are the greatest honestly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqhZoz_GGp95qzLg3H7mU4&fid=0x0:0x92965c2439d16914"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Zac Burnside","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOF-2HGEXBC97XWA6gHP2tMewXWXiHCorGdPXAWpJqkKDLk9O_qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a gem. Service was impeccable. Very attentive and plenty of staff.

They have a craft beer menu that exceeds almost any place in this area.

100% recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDW8MbOsqjneMoNSUml9GGf&fid=0x0:0x92965c2439d16914"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"JUSTIN CHING","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyYDHhH69UGypuQbkyk9xCCAHFEY4dPR1X-OJBNJFampZcSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent kid friendly dining experience. Duck noodle soup and egg rolls were excellent. 10/10 experience :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAingI9Wv8UoekiOF78sUwL&fid=0x0:0x92965c2439d16914"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Chu Tang (Mia)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtqNfe-awbnf_O5j46TjIR8AaDdkje-wfE7hZj8T3Z9OEVJ_U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The quail was incredibly delicious, crispy and flavorful! Their quesabirria tacos are some of the most loaded ones l've had. Their quesabirria tacos birria is juicy and flavorful. They have a special where you get 4 quesabirria tacos and the consomé for $20. On Tuesdays they have $1.50 taco specials like Al pastor tacos. The staff is very kind. Pull up to the Best Buy parking lot in Mira Mesa!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrJjV6ZXZGyDKdZl3IMVVH\u0026fid=0x0:0x1650530561676718"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Maria Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpbILgrliM_rCl0qz5QazHOOoBPE2xInxiez9gnlqiUY0SYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food was decent. Not bad, very solid, but there’s a few other places I’d rather spend my money. As someone who has had a lot of birria, the meat just needs more seasonings.  Got the nachos and they probably need a better complimenting cheese. But the tortillas were a huge plus, I liked that they offered a combo 4 quesatacos. We finished it so there that!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gideon Tong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4RPenHE5k2eaWklxhIVZWclrzHWOAj3sn2beWPjeNZVpS67yJbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I drive by this taco truck frequently so I've been meaning to catch it sometime. I finally caught it one of these days and I tried their mini $1.50 tacos which actually ended up being pretty good. The truck itself is located behind the Best Buy in the parking lot and it's tucked away so it's a bit hard to see from the freeway. I think they take credit card but I'm not sure because I paid in cash. The people working there were super friendly and gave me recommendations and so I ended up just taking one of the recommendations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgn8voBg\u0026fid=0x0:0x1650530561676718"],"When":"2025-2-21"},{"Name":"Meli Ba Na","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUR_B63Vk23Z4y14EBZ6wzvso2o1PzBsSwPhMsc-HT7QQOJBDFpmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered birria from this place last night because I didn’t want to go out, and when I checked their Instagram I saw they had delivery options  thank goodness I gave it a try because it was worth every bite.\nI’m from Tijuana, and honestly it’s hard to find good birria here. And you know when you order birria tacos to go, the flavor usually changes  but these tacos were still good even after delivery.\nI can’t wait to try it straight from the food truck; it’s probably bomb too. My kids loved it as well","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniyal Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgXAIllGIr_1GNGukjF1xqP9K3cQUEWHo-e0K_BkGTHadUudfb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best fish tacos for the price I've had in San Diego! The sauce is very tasty, and the fish is nice and crispy. Brandon, the guy working in the front was very helpful with me choosing what to get. I believe this is a family-owned and run business that's why you can see the quality in their food. [{"Name":"fredric reyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjzXjz7jWgaVFFbT2RBRqZSdG7wr0zr_S5yU0QSsDo-FW71A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I dined here the morning after Christmas. We were greeted right away by a friendly server. We were able to sit down very quickly and order quickly too. Very fast service. We ordered 2 appetizers the surf and turf rolls and spring rolls. We also got 2 phos. Very delicious and really hit the spot. Authentic and welcoming!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Holly Ciruzzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKA8eAvYZ0rZNpx99EWQQGVsEoa6jJQ2CrM_X2zAEZra3iHPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Came here with my family. These ladies at the front desk just looked at us and notion toward the table near the front. After we sat down, no one came to take our orders, no menu. After an awkward waiting for 5 minutes. While the ladies at the front just talked among themselves.
I waved a waitress down and asked for a menu. She looked shocked saying. We only take orders from online.
Oh, ok....it would have been nice if they actually mention that when we came in. I mean the restaurant looks like a typical Vietnamese restaurant....as a first timer here. How would people know?? They just assumed we just know?
My phone died unfortunately and so they gave me a iPad with the menu on it. So we ordered. Food came quick but man...the first man that delivered our food doesn't look happy. Actually not many of the staff looks happy. It wasn't until we were halfway through our meals that we got a friendly waitress refilling our waters with a smile. The pho was ok, kinda bland but plenty of meat which my son loves. I got the 4 spring rolls for 14 dollars. It was so staled liked it's been prepared in the morning and was left out all day. I finished 3 because I was hungry but didn't feel like eating the last one because my mouth was tired from all the chewing I had to do to finish one roll.
Overall, it was a awkward experience 😅...but experienced we did and I don't think anyone in my family wanted to go back. We're just going to stick to pho cali...lol","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Chamberlain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd4ptcn7zePOijDPysI1EulJb7XM9BGW_dzlxomTOhKl-B08U4qA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good Vietnamese Cafe. The steak and eggs are a great lunch. The crepe filled with savory meats or tofu is good and impressive looking. The pho is delicious. I usually go for the bun (rice noodles with lettuce and warm meats/egg rolls on top.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hiep Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGSE_EFV6zLnZqhrNj86CE47lsJNADSi320aWPt-4aUqzFFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are a lot of Vietnamese restaurants in San Diego and the quality can vary, but this one is solid. Despite a wide variety of menu items, the food is consistently good. Typical of most Vietnamese restaurants, service is not the best. It's in a big shopping complex so parking is relatively easy. If you're looking for good Vietnamese food, this would be one of my first choices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDuhaDwVQ&fid=0x0:0x67b26a43091d3a6"],"When":"2022-8-25"},{"Name":"Nicole Goebel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlPPLLvmbzDUTRmAkVnS0SN5gg-j6fCcDCTZSVKmJDx4aXbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Waited for 10 minutes. Food was decent. Soups were hot, that's always a plus. Also ordered the stirred fried rice noodles, it's a bit too soupy for my taste. But there is plenty of meat, seafood and veggies. The Egg Crepe with shrimp was good.

The service could be a little bit faster. The best thing for this place is that it opens to 10 pm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3grGGWw&fid=0x0:0x67b26a43091d3a6"],"When":"2024-11-4"},{"Name":"Wendy L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ56s_mbgl3Xqil_2XhIIbSn8a3pU-Mfgm2_N0ZIq5TTSf7wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was visiting my family in San Diego and they wanted to meet up at Pho Ban Mai in Mira Mesa. We usually go to a different Pho place down the road but, to be honest, I wasn’t sure I’d like this place because of the low reviews.

I was quite surprised to find I really enjoyed the food here!

Pho Ban Mai is nestled within the same plaza where Rite Aid, Boiling Crab and Seafood City are located. It was a little hard to find because the signage wasn’t as visible.

We were seated quickly but we had about a dozen family members and we were split into separate tables. Note: This restaurant is not made for large groups; however, the staff were accommodating and made it work.

Because of the smaller group seating, the orders were placed by table number. For example, there’s a QR code which launches their menu and you would place your order from there. It’s pretty cool actually. But if you’re someone who does not have a smart phone, you’ll be ordering the traditional way through a server and, from our experience, the language barrier was a challenge.

We ended up placing 3 group orders due to our split tables but we were able to ask to pay on one big check.

A few things we ordered from our table:

* Bun Thit Nuong Cha Gio (Vermicelli with Grilled Pork and Egg Rolls) - This is great for sharing. The dish itself is plentiful and you have your carb, protein, and veggies. This came with an egg roll, which is filling on its own.

* Grilled Pork with Broken Rice - This came with a side of pickled veggies and a perfectly rounded scoop of steamed rice. I believe you get the option of fried rice or steamed rice but we opted for the latter. The taste was delicious!

* Pho #1 - House Special Noodle Soup - It’s just standard that we order the first pho option whenever we go to a Vietnamese restaurant. The broth had a good flavor and it wasn’t oily.

* Beef Steak Cubes with Fried Rice and Salad - Bo Luc Lac is a family favorite. The beef cubes are always tender and juicy and comes on a sizzling hot plate. It’s perfect served over steamed rice. And the nuoc cham (fish sauce) flavors the dish with a sweet and salty umami.

Overall, everyone enjoyed the food. Ordering was a little chaotic but we were able to get that settled quickly. I’m glad we gave this place a shot - the ratings are low but I guarantee you, you’d be surprised how good it is here! You won’t know til you try it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICt-JOowAE&fid=0x0:0x67b26a43091d3a6"],"When":"2024-1-28"},{"Name":"Fay M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVCyHJIVeX-q0Hur2uN6yEBfuWwprjkxx5_KTYg7-DSccxfBDa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We placed an order for pick up, but they also have outdoor dining. The chicken noodle soup is yummy! My husband loved the vegetable tofu soup in chicken broth. Spring rolls were excellent too! We all chose the soft fresh noodle for our soups. Our order was ready in 15 minutes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDikLnj8AE&fid=0x0:0x67b26a43091d3a6"],"When":"2020-11-21"},{"Name":"Tony Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkLeLzSnvSoqFF_ge1ocur8XPgK6zB2xJWj2rqqKJVKkDTGNjuqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Parking: Plenty of Parking in shopping plaza
Ambience: Traditional Vietnamese dine in
Service: The service can definitely be better. I walked in and they asked how many. I said table for two and the guy just said table 7 like I’m suppose to know where their tables are. Only contact with my server was to place order and pay. I think the chef brought our food  and no refills on our drinks
Food: The Phở broth was a bit bland. The calamari was also a bit bland but the crispy garlic, and grilled onion in there was on point served with the dipping sauce all together. The Banh Xeo was great with lots of fresh vegetables.
Military Discount: No
Overall: I always try Phở every time I venture off somewhere new. This place was loaded with meat which I love but wouldn’t go out of my way to revisit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICu7OuWOg&fid=0x0:0x67b26a43091d3a6"],"When":"2022-7-23"}]

[{"Name":"avin smoghaddam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWg3TVkqMjC1ME96zh0a3LAyN_qLPbWt3ZWKxn6I-OEfShaZI9Dqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have been buying from this place for about a year. Since I am not Mexican, I can’t really comment much on Mexican food itself, but I want to draw your attention to a few points:

Unfortunately, the employees at this restaurant have never been trained and they seem to think this is some remote village in Mexico where they can treat customers however they want.

Instead of installing a speaker system or a digital display to notify customers when their order is ready, the management has told the staff to whistle at customers. As if the customers were animals or dogs. Now imagine if the customer were deaf — maybe they would throw a rock at them to let them know their order is ready (lol).

If you take a look at the reviews, you will see the huge number of complaints people have written about the food quality, service, and staff behavior. Interestingly, the management has never even bothered to apologize or respond to any of those comments.

That means here the customer is never right. Now imagine what the situation might be like in the kitchen — where no one can monitor how the food is prepared and cooked!

The decision is up to you, but I’ve shared my opinion. This was the last time I bought food from this place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqTu4U97yU67G_0JKkZwnAJqBwrq3BR2FF9B3qmeVsuoV-7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We love this place.  We have been going there for 30 years.  Whenever my kids come back to Mira Mesa, Cotixan is the first place they go, and they have even brought burritos on the plane to give to their friends overseas.
It’s authentic, local, the staff is always friendly and has a nice vibe inside.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron Jost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlUca1DREbKRpNrh8HNArYvW2o4dp1O8VqDVGYTmAWHoVdPLersg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Largest portions of fried fish, shrimp, steak and quality Salsa Verde, guacamole and other fixings on the soft shell tacos.  Have never seen this particularly at their 6-7 dollar price.  Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Quincy T (Q)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWixyNjHhYitorAWFug8rjFJ0U8zSDUE20G_8pXOx0LmKOaHBBzwg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Awful experience today.

I was really disappointed with my food at Cotixan Mexican food today, and I’m feeling quite frustrated with myself! I could have easily gone to at least two other fantastic Mexican restaurants within a mile, but I was nearby and decided to give this place a chance.

After waiting a few minutes, someone finally took my order at the drive-thru. I asked if they were open, and when I pulled up to the window, I noticed a gentleman who seemed to be a cook had taken my order. He handed the headset to the girl who processed my payment and gave me my food. The service was decent, given our brief interaction, but unfortunately, the food was a letdown.

I ordered three rolled tacos for less than seven dollars and added a side of rice and beans for an extra five dollars. I was really hungry, and rice and beans are my favorites from most places! I placed my order at 10:08 AM, and here’s what I found when I got my food: the rice had clumps, some parts were burned, and it was dry and hard. It was clear that this rice wasn’t made today—I couldn’t finish more than two bites! The beans were also dry, and the cheese on them didn’t look appealing at all.

The rolled tacos were okay, but the guacamole was brown, and there was more cheese than flavor. I ended up eating just two rolled tacos and had to discard the rest of the food in the broken box. I was in a rush and didn’t have time to go back for an exchange, but honestly, I just couldn’t.

Needless to say, I won’t be coming back here to eat if I can help it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv5Kj1vgE&fid=0x0:0xa989d8b902c7a58a"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Govind Kalyankar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzPPkI-ynY0jg60iHmNLqAsfCW0Dq2Y-by_oizno_oYwLzykORsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve been a regular customer here for a long time, and the Supreme (veggie) burrito used to be my favorite. Unfortunately, the quality has really gone downhill. The burrito I had recently was tasteless, and I can’t understand why they started adding cilantro inside—it completely ruined the flavor.

This used to be my go-to spot, but after this experience, I don’t feel like coming back. Really disappointing to see such a drop in quality from a place I once enjoyed so much.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Herrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMUPDRcsMD_r7P6sw4eZ2SxfZEo9eu1On1dT17StEntrsjDyKSXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious by all means.  Best $40.00 bucks for three of us. The food is authentic as it can get. Made fresh, served fresh. Bathrooms clean.  Outside and the floors still in pristine condition.  Bring your appetite, as well as plan for your leftovers for that night or the next day.  Can't wait to go back and try another burrito.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICs64LZ7wE&fid=0x0:0xa989d8b902c7a58a"],"When":"2020-2-14"},{"Name":"Khala Clarke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYrznsEzwCMm2BQAhB1XNaIS84ScgN08v_6TT1elY45YGVIIo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give this place a zero I would and it’s solely based off of customer service. I  Was berated and harassed by staff over their mistake of giving me regular fires and not asada fries. I called ahead before coming back and the guy in the picture below said he’d just swap the order without the receipt. Upon my arrival he yelled at me and lied about the phone call then aggressively threw the fries away. I left with no refund or asada fries so they basically stole my money because they felt as a black woman I couldn’t ask for the correct order. Sad I’ve been coming here for almost 20 years and have never felt so much discrimination and anger for just asking for a correction. This is a racist establishment if you are black save your money! Pictured below with thumbs up is the racist employee who continued to make sure I was not helped, threw away my fries, yelled at me and did not refund me. I basically got scorned and profiled over damn fries.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo-uug_gE&fid=0x0:0xa989d8b902c7a58a"],"When":"2025-4-24"},{"Name":"JWWJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKcgi31yMrTXyZimTwzWm0IGVMBAzLnlSVNe-_OlbJ8f8D_ZvMrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time I ate here was last week when I took a friend there. She strongly recommended it & she was so right. The food was hot, spicy, large portions & very tasty.
I had 2 potato tacos, rice & beans with some fresh warm chips. They have 3 types of freshly made salsas & I enjoyed all 3. Friendly service & fair prices. You can eat inside/outside but we took ours & went home. We'll definitely be back next month & try some more of their vegetarian dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICiu5mG_AE&fid=0x0:0xa989d8b902c7a58a"],"When":"2020-11-17"}]

[{"Name":"David Barksdale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHqdW2run7GyETwOp36PdR80CLWGMhbWYIahxT0Xyw8ZCQYHBl=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"13.99 a pound. Nice atmosphere. DIY hotpot mix and then they cook for you! You just have to eat! Easy choice. They also do military discount. Recommend anytime for cold weather.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBGlS0MUQIlmtK7I0qyDrQ&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I've written about another branch before, and this time I visited the Mira Mesa location. The interior decoration is very Chinese and beautiful, and the store is extremely clean. I once again chose the ox bone soup as the base, which was very flavorful. There is a wide variety of ingredients to choose from, with meat and vegetables priced the same and weighed by the pound. They also have a self-service condiment station. I picked one pound of vegetables and also ordered some Kuafu fried skewers. The meal was very satisfying and offered great value for money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjnIX8bb8_7rKH007jS5wF&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Kha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUpzTQ96B0nS-8c_q3Z92prqhojy9fpRnE90T6pZCiyfQ-9LFP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ying Tang Hot Pot in Mira Mesa is a great value with an impressive variety of options. The selection stands out—tendon, fish balls, and a wide range of fresh veggies—so it’s easy to customize exactly what you want. Portions are generous for the price. Pro tip: take the leftover broth to go and add more ingredients at home for an easy second meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAr4DLFgaGUFID_wQp48piE&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Ms. Bui-Bernheim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxYk8b4yY9RTCc_TfGjN_hA5FHOtlsqDDfg0tEGAoy0VSUng3y_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Customization is key here . It’s the pump my ride of eateries . As little or as much as you want . Vegan? Gluten free ? Keto? Spicy ? None spicy ? It’ll cover all dietary needs . Want to try frog legs ? Go for it . Love shrimp? It’ll love you back from a piping hot huge bowl of broth . The staff was courteous .
On top of that you can get meat on a stick fried . I cannot wait to come back .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBR8sJ7ytqwg7Dy2Bu4J2om&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Luke Qian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlrgnXnV_r4xeXCS2Y265gb22q3fbZJv5fpzsWn-tXq8zVYeES=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This restaurant combines two familiar concepts under one roof—Yin Tang’s malatang and Kua Fu’s fried skewers—and the crowds suggest a winning formula. We arrived during a peak period and waited about 40 minutes to be seated. Our focus was the fried skewers, though they ultimately proved disappointing.

The vegetable skewers were coated in an overly thick layer of flour and lightly seasoned, leaving them bland on their own. The dry spice mix provided at the table did little to compensate, failing to adhere well enough to bring the flavors into balance. Because all the skewers appear to be fried simultaneously, despite differing ingredient needs, textures varied widely; some arrived noticeably tougher than others. The meat skewers fared better, benefiting from prior marination that gave them more depth and flavor.

We also ordered a bowl of malatang, but the broth was milder than expected—less robust than at other Yin Tang locations. While the concept is appealing and the space clearly popular, execution here felt uneven, making the long wait harder to justify.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNPybF3If1kQ_RE5WvOEEP&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"P P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo6Cu-owH69pfSp6Eok-G1sCA5rWtzKzx9zjTSM4zgDmbGgws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"if you are in SD and want to try Malatang, this is the place. I like the soup, which is very rich in flavor. Also they have fried skewers to add in more flavor and choices. Also I want to shout out to their service, respects to their customers. So would recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0Ur7I3M2peDNKli4o-sWF&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Sue Duong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTU-8Riyfeaa46Yl_IZyAW2P3po_F4-fknk8W6SDtLmUXKoPBsgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"08-02-2025
Happy Saturday! Love love love dining here! I ordered mix dry pot and no extra charge. Plus free drinks for cash payment of $25 or more. What a deal! : )

05-27-2025
I’ve enjoyed yummy noodle soup at the Clairemont location. Having lunch here was my very first time being at this location. Love the decor and spacious dining room. I am adding this place to my favorite Mira Mesa go to restaurant list.

Note:
Cash payment purchases of $25 or more get free drinks, see pic","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJud_vKWnbPL1gE&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2025-6-7"},{"Name":"Terry Ta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmx467GR_lH3r-VcP-URrFXTGJjS62Eego-elQ5uwbU8w6kbNt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My most favorite place in california!  Great skewers! Great malatang! Their broth is flavorful and robust!  Their skewers are delicious times 10!

The workers are fast and helpful! Its always crowded but everything flows so well.  Its laid back here and always tons of customers!

Can't beat this hot pot bowl place! Its too awesome!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTeg9OVqbqIrf_YMWssl0O&fid=0x0:0x3eae14beb7a7bd27"],"When":"2025-8-2"}]

Always a good time here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICugqbiEw&fid=0x0:0x4bf137b86b7f3eed"],"When":"2022-7-24"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Erin Hsiao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqFnMKzh88tDAVgiKT5WZOx8-1VmnPld5joWdl_WdYDAs1Vg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"summary: good food, great service, reasonable prices, good portions, support local businesses!

decided to come here on a whim with some friends as a post finals mini adventure and boy did we make the right choice
there was not a customer in sight but we made our way to the ordering counter and were met with the most personable server we’ve ever had at a poke place, or any restaurant for that matter! he was so nice, offering samples (which i’ve never experienced at a poke place) and suggestions, and would throw in some fun comments to our choices (often apologizing for talking too much but no worries at all😆)

onto the food, they have a few unique poke marinades here! the standouts for us were the sichuan peppercorn tuna- it was almost candied with an interesting texture, kinda like a gummy or beef tendon in the best possible way- as well as the spicy kimchi salmon and scallops! the coconut curry poke has potential, but it’s not quite there yet (maybe try searing the fish and adding ginger or something acidic/spicy?) he also really loaded up our bowls, even giving my friend an extra scoop of salmon because he thought “it didn’t look large enough” even tho he definitely gave the right amount of protein. all the toppings were included in the base price (good value for any amount of scoops) including avocado and imitation crab which usually costs extra at other places.

we had such a nice experience thanks to the server and the food was delicious- this is our new go to! thanks so much and wish all the best to this place","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9EXISTnutxUDIBUTfnrvd&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Zen Nezha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ14Nv816gGG2sqawxk_ayeyrltBlGdNSwxeVpN-mtwExs28Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is my first actual experience for building my own poke bowel 🙈and luckily it was at @pokelandsd, i loved how generous they are and the combination of all the ingredients that they choose is at its perfection. I wish i had a strong stomach to have all these 4 bowels for me only 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo5NSSEQ&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2025-4-22"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Enjoyed the poke at PokeLand in Mira Mesa! Ordered the regular poke bowl with salmon, spicy tuna, scallops, and many toppings and it was great! If you like it spicy there’s definitely spicy options. Fast, accommodating, and friendly service. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAghUMPIP1Av5-f5YJn7k-g&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Jaydon Guevara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO09Fr0HH2AXqRFplp2w-k5LQgfg2O_pqtHTtmXqO5G45q14MynQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely clean and generous! Came in for the first time for my lunch break and they did not disappoint. The gentleman at the front served me and gave great recommendations. The pic is me half way through the bowl but the presentation was great too. Would come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo6sCgNg&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2025-4-23"},{"Name":"Mari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXC9I83WEgm87U-Bc9JFUdFZKAUZeviv6sAhtnu0QgpHdqdrMfq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"my bowl was fat (complementary)!! there was lots of options from the base to the protein to the toppings to the sauces which i loved!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyJNTQk-IYXoUXp82l9aIK&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Patricia V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5Hn0eKnmeZuAePjGErgcnhyClyvMcBoIHJ6W_HDO3Mz6nomA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You definitely get the most bang for your buck at Pokeland! The service is great, everyone is so nice and welcoming. The portions are unbeatable for the price, the quality has always been fresh, and they have so many different sauces to try. I definitely go out of my way to come here whenever I crave poke :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gus El khoury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMzqfnwCfLuI69Ri88jcCNsjkyXcp9BxHd_Qc7SyeaEptUoEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I could barely eat from the bowl.
The salmon tasted foul. Not sure if they seared it a little or why it would taste like that!
When i eat a good quality raw salmon. It tastes completely different.
I think it’s just poor quality food. Good place if you want to save money on seafood
Some of the tuna was chewy.
I completely lost my appetite as i started eating.
Maybe it’s just the whole poke combination that’s not very good.
Rice was warm tasted ok.
The veggies didn’t look fresh.
The service was ok, but would probably never eat poke again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC97Je5AQ&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2024-3-4"},{"Name":"tes oligo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3minULGplNLckwxy55PwxZZ887ODONd1ndDgoemUYrBrSQ2LCzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our favorite pokeland branch!
Staff are very generous with their servings! Everything is fresh and delicious!
Tables and the whole  area is clean, just like our last visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXmvz2Lg&fid=0x0:0xcee5ac35eb6337cf"],"When":"2024-10-26"}]

[{"Name":"Queenie Quynh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3xrAZZw6Xd3sVxtv_FBivbJeisOV92iHlGgB8UWWf9cjsEKhwHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food is average quality. Ramen is good. The place is very nice, bar and counter is clean and neat. Only one thing, they use one-time chopstick which cant control the quality ( as I got fungus/rotten chopstick in the seal bag).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqqtSBkkO_5hPPeYQKeZHZ&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2025-8-23"},{"Name":"Allie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKBDt6drU2R7cHupE2ez7V-GvOUbyORhTMaLvsbJAsFyilouQCmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is incredible! There are so many Ramen options and each one has such a delicious and unique flavor. At this point I’ve tried almost every kind and have loved each one for different reasons.

If Ramen isn’t your thing (although, that’s what I used to think about myself until becoming obsessed with this place 😂) there are also a lot of other options here! The rice bowls especially are just delicious. The Teriyaki Chicken Bowl and the Pork Chashu Bowl are some definite favorites. The flavor in these is also wonderful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOal7sWMicjUMw&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2025-5-6"},{"Name":"Andy Ibarra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdID1-Xp3YrW-oo3Rim-xIet9ms4GbqS8QDZXaavl9kvaGG9y9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wife loves coming here for their curry, and it never disappoints. Daughter always orders their tonkatsu ramen with yellow chewy noodles. I normally get the black mayo ramen, but this time around I decided to get the squid karage curry and that was delicious as well.
The one thing that always brings us back is the excellent customer service from our waitress. She is usually the only one taking everyone's order, but still manages to be so personable and polite. This time around  she kept refilling our tea with hot water just so it didn't get cold from the AC.
One thing especially I like it here is that she doesn't allow you to pack your leftovers,  but she does it herself ,just so its perfectly placed in your To-Go container.  That extra added touch of customer service is why we are regulars here.
When you do the small stuff to take care of your customers, it goes a long way with us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnQTOJH59-E7JUmFGNzz8r&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Sophia Tsai Neri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXryqKpHExbR28nPnFfGCesHW_c1MaPAZszr_FE2FkoP4cj5qeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food is honestly good. But they had several strikes based on my this visit, my first experience. First, I came bc of a SD restaurant week (SDRW) flyer, which said they had a special for SDRW — vegetarian green curry ramen. When we tried to order, the guy who took our order said that was from several years ago and they are under newer ownership so it’s not available anymore. Second, bc I’m gluten free, the only item they said I could have as a ramen was the vegetarian ramen w gf noodles. I said ok, but then noticed on the menu it said it had teriyaki sauce, which the guy said he’d take off since it’s added just at the end. Then the food arrives from a different person, and it has the teriyaki sauce on top. So I had to wait for them to remake the entire dish, even though I was starving. Yes, it’s the right thing to do if a mistake is made, but nobody seemed sorry about the mistake. And finally, when the bill came, we were charged $2 for gf noodles when the menu said $1. When I pointed it out the guy was surprised and when he verified against the menu (that he handed me), he just said they’d update the price since it’s the “old menu”.

The food itself, again, was very good. Broth tasted delicious and complex, not too salty. I’ll say the gf noodles weren’t fully cooked in the end — some of them were stuck to each other. But overall, food was strong.

I would have appreciated some acknowledgment that what they seemed to offer and what is advertised has some discrepancy. In the end, l’ll probably come again to see if this is consistent or just a one time thing. But I won’t be holding my breath.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKO1Guz9t0blR2AswpnY49NIenM7A71FQKPVLu3RWrBlqxrdEO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food:
Ultimate Chashu Ramen
- delicious. Broth was excellent, the 8 pieces of chashu were delicious, ramen noodles were yummy. No complaints here!
Beef curry *restaurant week deal smaller size
- yummy! well seasoned
Chicken karaage *restaurant week deal smaller size
- can’t go wrong with fried chicken

Location:
In a bustling shopping center. Lots of parking but also lots of people.

Ambiance:
Cute ramen bar styled restaurant. Table and bar seating.

Service:
10/10. Our server was lovely, the food was hot and fresh, and we were waited on immediately.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA3_Cc3gE&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2025-2-5"},{"Name":"AJ C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW05pKxu10O1L9y-URIqe5PWEcot3XlNNZwpAMMhIq0B_nycnTC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Solid Japanese food. The stand out was the black garlic chicken. It was very tender! The dry ramen was great. The curry katsu was legit as well. Fairly priced for Japanese food as well. Service was awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ8amdOA&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2025-3-5"},{"Name":"A.A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1gGs_fCTiv8PUg3ne6lrowx3XGGn1N4CNWqY0N-K1U_cVqIG09g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience at this Ramen spot was a to go order. After visiting for a few minutes & and taking the food home, I absolutely will be coming back to sit down & enjoy the ramen. It was delicious and packaged to travel well. The service over the phone & upon arrival were extremely inviting & friendly! I had the seaweed salad & steak Ramen with thick noodles. Very flavorful & a big serving had enough for the next day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxvcXypQE&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2023-5-24"},{"Name":"Eder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9uEI70d-oKbQw-O5H1UVgCf4EkIszI2SwlCoTQLCd9VPmRWmD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"#deals

I am not a ramen person. I was with a friend and just happened.....

I was surprised at how good the meal was.

The extra noodles when ordering a main dish for 1.5$ is a great deal if you're hungry.

Happy hour is a good deal too.

Update:

Trying more on the menu.
I can say that 5 stars for sure. The service is very good.
Adding more pics.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl-ursfA&fid=0x0:0x5195b6121114e35d"],"When":"2023-11-16"}]

[{"Name":"Christopher Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvB6Mm4QddVkwZiLVQiMCdaMm8YOBQt0ZNeUWTxTrGs8Pqv0JWdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My godson and I tried Baba Kabob yesterday while we were taking a break from playing Magic at At Ease Games near Harbor Freight. Baba Kabob is no-frills, but friendly, down-to-earth, and pretty tasty.

I ordered a chicken shawarma sandwich and my godson ordered the Baba kabob, which is essentially the same but with gyro meat included. Both sandwiches also came with shredded lettuce, tomatoes, and tzatziki.

My favorite thing about these sandwiches was how non-greasy they were. Sometimes halal street food can get greasy or overly oily, but these sandwiches weren’t like that. Also, the meat tasted pretty high quality. The large bottle of sriracha at the table was a nice plus, too.

Overall, pretty tasty, fresh halal street food. Prices are slightly steep, but the quality, atmosphere, and customer service offset that enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyEUfKOmGyN6BjLivl2Vks&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Robert Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuzDyF9fokr0dRRSMd3zjVHZa3v__hMYmvmnHtwI13ecDD7Mfd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Baba the owner is real nice. He comes around to make sure you have everything you need for your meal. The food is very authentic. I had a gyro and it was bomb. The dumplings were amazing as was the potato bread they had. Don't ask me the name of the bread, but ask for it. Don't forget to buy yourself some of the red chili sauce the owner's wife makes. It a vinegar and all natural chillies. It's really good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVl74yBR8tYLceldYyN3046-KYbxj_sGQlIU9jREXexppK3gj7xzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was amazing here. Tried a few Afghan Restaurants in the area and this was by far the best.  If your looking for Afghan Food in the area, would definitely recommend checking this place out as it did not disappoint.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmtmbuiVa0MaLnenX4uK6o&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"bashar mraish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnKPlOuHEXI0_ofbBqwmyb2UFkN-CvcrxZPncxe5BTlF5PPCocEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Baba Kabob in San Diego is an absolute gem for anyone craving delicious and authentic Afghani food. The flavors are rich, the portions generous, and the prices are very reasonable. You can really tell they put care and tradition into every dish.

One item you must try is the Potato Bolani – crispy on the outside, perfectly spiced on the inside, and served with tasty chutney. It’s easily one of the best I’ve had anywhere.

The kebabs are juicy and tender, the rice is fragrant and fluffy, and the sides are always fresh. Whether you’re dining in or taking out, the experience is consistently great.

Plenty of available parking makes it even more convenient, and the staff are warm and welcoming.

Highly recommend for a satisfying and authentic Afghani meal. Definitely going back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsKGjUKbJQKLaSBqLUicjT&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-6-18"},{"Name":"Fereshta Ramsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI8kNXzoz3G6nfwR_9p_Wu7sKAP51lDWl4vTK2pIvWZ6ErqTXS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Afghan food from a family business.  Everything was mouthwatering and authentic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSjg6WgjljvZcMTuLQItg3&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Benjamin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz-uKEQRM4pqoqk-XiPvT4Yx3I_qkbOK61PIio4Hjsu2Jo84c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came for the bolani and was not disappointed. The bolani was amazing, highly addictive and was a huge portion, enough for many to share as an appetizer. I never had bolani before, but I am definitely a fan. I also added the beef kabob to my order for some protein and was blown away by how tender and flavorful it was. Truly the best beef kabob I’ve ever had, cooked to perfection. I want to come back and try the other items on the menu!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo-cWsFQ&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It had been so long since I’d eaten Persian food, so my friend and I decided to try it out. 🥩We ordered a falafel sandwich with fries for my friend (the fries is a bomb), while I had the combo beef and chicken kabob with a yogurt drink. The yogurt drink was an interesting experience, and I’d love for my friends to try it next time. The food was delicious, with generous portions that were perfect for leftovers. The place was nice, the people were friendly, and we had a great dinner overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3r9zwrQE&fid=0x0:0x65df8af920646dbe"],"When":"2024-11-20"},{"Name":"Al-Aqrabi F.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMbFdSORw3LJUJ-_h3Ceg5YqPpTmym5PX56XmI4O0UKqX8EekB3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The absolute Best Afghan food in San Diego....without a doubt.
A must visit if you're in town. Family-owned and operated and it shows with all the quality and love. All the meat is Halal.
Every item is a delicious Afghan masterpiece, carefully prepared to preserve the culture and authentic taste. The place is always clean and neat and the staff is always friendly and welcoming. If you look closely in the kitchen, you'll see mom and pops in action.
We Love this place, my family and I always come here for a culinary experience which has not yet to disappoint...after 6 years.
I would list my "favorite" dishes, but I can honestly say, All of them without exaggeration. So go there and try something new in every visit.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Going off the good reviews I decided to eat here for lunch on Taco Tuesday. I ordered two cheese enchiladas plate $11.75 plus a Carne Asada mini taco for  $2.50. The corn tortillas on the enchiladas and the taco were hard. The enchiladas sauce wasn't a red sauce. It was brownish red and tasted like mole sauce. Which I don't like, because it's sweet and I wasn't expecting that sauce to be on enchiladas. The Carne asada taco the meat was tough and overcooked. However, I did enjoy the beans and rice. There were a few chips stuck in the beans which tasted crispy and fresh. The dining area looked clean and from what I could see through the kitchen door the kitchen looked fairly clean too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOhfmjTA&fid=0x0:0xa3a6b71936c77b6c"],"When":"2022-6-14"},{"Name":"Winnie Tsay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGkiu-2tqkicMJG5oCqX3djE3uprtvxmXZbT-3efy8U4rATW4VBA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Kotija Jr Taco Shop 🌟🌟🌟🌟
📍6695 Mira Mesa Blvd, San Diego, CA 92121
We are a family own business since 2007, dedicated to offering Mexican food with the highest quality and unparalleled flavors, always having in mind the day to day of our customers, as well as for special events in their lives.

Mission
Provide our customers with the best quality food at reasonable prices, offering in the same way a friendly, fast and efficient service, always looking to improve in favor of our customers.

Vision
Being a company recognized for the quality of its products and services, as well as always looking to go hand in hand in caring for our planet, in terms of the products that are used.

Values
Respect, honesty, service, commitment, efficiency.
