[{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s amazing to have shawarma guys in Mira Mesa! I tried their OG truck at South Park before, it was awesome, I remember I loved it so much so I brought my husband back to try their food. And I said it was probably the best falafels I’ve ever eaten. This time they gave Wagyu on their menu! That’s so special. We had a Wagyu beef bowl with Wagyu beef eggroll, we also ordered a bowl of chicken, fries and a beer. Everything is delicious, Wagyu is so flavorful and tender! The chicken is delicious as well, not dry at all. I like the eggroll the most, very crispy outside and soft and flavorful inside, it is just perfect, that’s why Guy Fieri likes and recommends the eggrolls. They are in the Mira Mesa shopping center which is a busy area with a lot of shops around. This is definitely one of the good food places when you look for a nice place to choose.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdDI_2fExUbTlbkX2ZYjDu&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time at the Shawarma Guys location in Mira Mesa and the food was delicious. I'm so glad that they opened another location because that means business is going well.

We went for lunch on a weekday and it was quite busy. Ordering at the counter was quick but seating was limited inside. There were people standing around waiting for tables to open up or for their take outs. We were lucky to grab a table before the lunch rush. There was a long wait for our food after it was ordered too.

Everything was pretty good. The beef eggroll was better than the chicken eggroll. It had more flavor but both were a bit on the greasy side.

We got the chicken and beef shawarma bowl and the beef shawarma bowl. Portion was large and the meats were tender. I end up eating only half and taking the rest home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMWhB1AR6IrBI3K_704ZN7&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"siri gowtham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpSfR4CAcufM3lZdva_V07T4Xs9ctg1XIklspkiZMc9oSqWmbm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went here for lunch on a Friday afternoon — loved that they had plenty of vegan options! It wasn’t too busy, and the food came out quickly with generous portions. Our waiter was friendly but couldn’t recommend a popular vegan dish when asked, which was a bit disappointing. The vegan egg rolls were really good, and the falafel bowl (with falafels, yellow rice, hummus, and tabbouleh) was delicious. The tables were a bit cramped and pushed up against the wall, which made the space feel a little tight. Overall, a good experience — I’d definitely come back to try more of their vegan options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuB1lF6LPwpYZkqL0ypH2x&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Valerie Wan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt3fu8F8FdwrqN7AIqxSLH6FrKsBTBi8vCMiAFF53xibsrQP-oRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So good!!! The store is clean with enough seating. I got takeout and the wagyu egg roll was so delicious I didn't take a photo in time. The wagyu bowl was great, though a tad salty. I could just eat spoonfuls of the hummus. Overall such a filling meal and great option in Mira Mesa!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPStUXBt9b0DofEmKBRrgl&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Imee C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWioeyCgeB4uUWcshPAC2pQIsYfzt_qMb-WRuNjjtwRo95RTH1PfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is located in the west side of Mira Mesa mall.  There was plenty of parking.  Upon entering, we were greeted by a friendly face at the counter.  She was very nice and very helpful considering this was our first time here. I had the wagyu beef & chicken shawarma bowl. The beef was a little salty. But the chicken was excellent.  The tabouli was also excellent.  My order came with egg rolls and I ordered the wagyu bee egg roll.  Aside from the saltiness, it was pretty decent. The baklava was also very good.  My friend bought the california shawarma wrap and liked it.  Would definitely come back here again.  I want to try their falafel next.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMe5Whq_jnwwS-JNxaS9cg&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Dawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCWLTBFiXcJVuoU_JZpUWFTzylTcpSDmvcthmw9mJ0WW3ZmHCm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I like their Falafel better than any I've tried.  It has great flavor and was so crispy.  I also love their Fattoush Salad, Greek Salad, Dolmas, Hummus and Tabouleh.  They have been super fresh and the salad dressings are delicious!

Sadly, I was not a fan of either of the Shawarma meats that they are famous for.  The spices seem a little conflicting and the meat wasn't my thing either.  If I want Shawarma, I am going to still head over to Tahini.  Lots of people seem to enjoy the meat, so it could just be me.

That Falafel makes me very happy.  Maybe it won't be life changing for you, but if you like Falafel or want a delicious salad I would definitely give them a try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3g_WvBjBLVFr3n6HXVQB0&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-7-10"},{"Name":"Eエ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_C6LsQ2A7Km8m39cjz8C5sdB4jjrooZZi9zIhVMGzh0qhemzB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ya’ll, tell me why I haven’t gone to this place sooner. I’m so impressed it’s not even funny. I got the wagyu bowl with french fries and it’s hit all the spots, especially since it included TABOULI!!!! I am a tabouli lover. Yum yum, will come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAtIBh7rDwlRHyFrF0gKTs_&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Prasenjit Saha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfpJciSD72pRu23vFeYP8x6Q2wirVttb3-drBXtcgDKosbAyoefQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tried their California shawarma wrap. It was my first time having a shawarma with rice inside, it felt more like a burrito. The taste was okay, the prices for most items seemed a bit high, and the service was a bit slow.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5zZcfaTOXt_PNTe5MTwBG&fid=0x0:0xbe4ff0d65965df8"],"When":"2025-11-19"}]

Skewers are great not only in price but in quality and amount of meat. I didn't know they have a special on Saturday lamb skewer for $1.50 each! My friend her first time here she said 12/10 and she wants to come back. The scenery is beautiful and yes I said scenery, the vibes are great and staff is awesome!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCj9i-NQiB21WHJO_nf_Mcj\u0026fid=0x0:0x4d1d3d8464a96e6f"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Louis Lau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxg4klUwOokI69Ucqi_xInxpfewxNdugZ5AGgK4CONaD9zZv2B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Highly recommend this location for all your late night cravings. They are opened till past mid night! Hardly any sit down restaurant is even open past 10 pm. Best part is that they have discounts past 8 pm on lamb skewers!?\n\nPlenty of seating and very cool projectors with a light show on the walls","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByxHTvIeicRlDhMNbbhO1P\u0026fid=0x0:0x4d1d3d8464a96e6f"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Bonnie Ye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPMma_MhhRbmmk_eCLt_9ZhOaoAMUkmiW9IaBXVwXz64s3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came by to get some lamb skewers for snack when i was in the area. I liked that it’s spacious and it’s got a cool vibe. It feels like a night club/Chinese KTV place. The lamb skewers were good. I’d live to come back for a dining in experience soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWpPG45gyJoQhSswXzjWw5\u0026fid=0x0:0x4d1d3d8464a96e6f"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A Xinjiang barbecue spot that my friends have been recommending is located to the right of Shunfa Supermarket. The interior is uniquely decorated, resembling both a KTV and an immersive light-dining restaurant. The ceiling is adorned with colorful light fixtures, and the walls feature various scenes projected by projectors. Combined with popular Chinese music playing in the background, enjoying skewers dipped in their special sauce brings an instant wave of happiness—it truly feels like having barbecue on a night out back in China. Ordering is convenient, as you can simply scan a QR code to place your order. Recently, they’ve been running a promotion where lamb skewers are only $1.25 each for orders settled after 10 pm, offering great value for money. The staff also provide excellent service. I’m already planning to go back next time to try their grilled fish!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyXtOZecBFQPkrDBWMnoHg\u0026fid=0x0:0x4d1d3d8464a96e6f"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Felicity","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2p0Le-PMxO5_1GXj3OMalG02p3VFpXnWX7rbNEIG07s_X_7Mc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Karaoke restaurant vibe but apparently they stopped doing karaoke. Food was decent. Skewer meats were tasty from the sauce but meat quality was so so. Fried tofu was good but lacking salt. Sesame cucumber was also good but pretty ordinary dish. Overall, I was there because there was no wait at 6pm on a Friday night. Service was great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCY8s_VRw\u0026fid=0x0:0x4d1d3d8464a96e6f"],"When":"2025-5-3"},{"Name":"Tim Barber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAgmirlJZaRaNXitwJ6gcSzGXDkNIs-5ELXX5gu7y5ow-j3tZ5Dg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food price and selection was great. Vaste menu and good costs. The main issue with the food was EVERYTHING TASTED THE SAME. I ordered shrimp, chicken, veggies, mushrooms, pork belly ect, bunch of stuff. All of it tasted like Cumin, no flavor varieties. Also no sauce? Everything was this Cumin dry rub. It also took an hour when ETA originally was 20 min but they gave 10% because. Atmosphere was awesome though it was cool inside. Prob go again but just for chow mein and chicken wings.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Swain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIu3Z4Lil2c7-UaNp30CaITNoeQykHCbHtAl7UsyxPyPdw2sQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best bbq skewers in SD. I’m so glad this exist. Wonderful lighting. Great music and delicious food. The tongue is tender and juicy. The lamb is tender and cooked with a nice spice. The oysters are a garlic dream with a hint of spice. Everything I tasted was amazing and appreciate its more natural flavors and spices than a sauce.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_mf75vQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x4d1d3d8464a96e6f"],"When":"2025-1-25"}]

[{"Name":"George A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjZTOM3RZI5-ZjQZCocx5Ct3pEmKcZkT51Hw12qqQvuQoAGPh-kg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"My photos will make sense I promise. Story time.
This was one of the most interesting dining experiences ever. This place has plenty of staff, people hustling but it was hard to tell who was being served.
First we got our pitcher of beer but with no cups. After asking for cups we were told they didn’t have any at the moment. That’s the first time I experienced that.
With food orders they were quick to take the order but the food came out slow (some dishes were forgotten) which doesn’t make sense because we the customers cook the meat.  The food itself was good when we got it.
My advice: if you still choose to come here then bring your own cups","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_TnSn-wEGwANLWiZruraZ&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"A A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVRyE70cZ8Rp_vrQ1BsDTIpkocpI9nStfbsXdpq6uPupEsnTd1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Gen Korean BBQ House! The atmosphere was really nice and, unlike many other KBBQ places, the inside wasn't smoky at all - which made it so much more enjoyable. The quality of the meats was excellent, very fresh and delicious. I also want to give a special thank you to Gabriel B, the manager, for being so attentive and making sure everything went smoothly. Definitely a spot I'd recommend and will be coming back to!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBAnthL6tIwXjNeU4jp119&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Paco C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpYPuWqPYCS6a1gUdH1HlCA0lrj8AgQkfpDiiSMsd_EJRgzC_K6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"While the servers were very nice, the service was terrible. It took us a couple of times flagging down servers, managers, or anyone who could take our order or even get us our final check. We had to get up and go to the front to pay. Additionally, the food was not good either. The meat looked old, the Korean fried chicken was cold, and a couple of times, the wrong meats were brought, or multiple orders of one meat came. I would skip this KBBQ until they figure out their issues.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByZk7pbSxpy3fSSZnKk6Qh&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Tony P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfO3meWZ29CW_m4PQY9ZgEO4ESbYlGS65G0OJNzXC8wZOzOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Honestly, this place is a freaking joke. It takes absolutely ages to get Korean BBQ, meat - at least 30 minutes in between orders. However, they're pushing mediocre, filling appetizers and al carte cocktails quickly. Don't come here if you want actual Korean BBQ. Manna down the street is so much more worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDy_9WXAxkZhLZKhYrue5J2&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Angel Morales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzPkU3gJI8uvVRzwGIIibZldSwDPnzn5lDro2A4j98698C0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Happy to enter the restaurant and be seated right away, it wasn’t busy at all for a Saturday afternoon. Our server was Melissa S. and though she promised the “best experience” she oversold her underwhelming service. My table was there for over 3 hours! We asked repeatedly for forgotten drink orders, sauces to go with our meats, and reminders of missing items. Melissa S. talks too much, seems easily distracted, and forgets. Our party waited on her, constantly tried to look for her, we always found her talking. I have been to the Mira Mesa location plenty of times and could not believe how SLOW and forgetful the service was. Whenever we tried to ask another server for help, their response would be “I’ll find your server.” I’m glad someone found her. Very disappointed with the service; the food was fine, the alcohol was okay… we would have drank so much more alcohol if our drink orders would have been remembered the first time. Very hesitant to go back just to waste time and money. The bill also came during our first round of meats, not all were finished cooking because it had just been all delivered. Melissa S may have tried our best but our plans for night had to be delayed due to our dining experience. The music was intermittently on, sometimes it was all the speaker were working and sometimes only half the room got to enjoy music with their meals.

Order: 7339751 on 1/25/26","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joy Hou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKBclpTn6MJUoRzwcJMLosmDRiaaO-51bUNbbeGzwYXg_bZzY-Yw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our favorite Korean BBQ in San Diego.  Food is consistently  great.  Service is phenomenal.  Everyone is so friendly and helpful.  Definitely one of our regular spots and will continue to come back w friends and family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQ0L8PqbZiXmDjO8weI5ba&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Michael Klamerus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMgFj9WJMu1Ku4PxuJzgVWvdpFe9e8mP7olPoQm_mr1PF9xcfx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Let me preface the review, the place is nice, it's clean, they offer a TON of different flavors and sides.

Now onto the actual issues;
First and most importantly, as my picture shows, the grills are ABSOLUTELY HEINOUS. This wasn't a single grill issue, the replacement that was given was just as bad and looking at other tables, they all have this layer on them.  As the grill heated up you could smell the burnt food from this uncleaned grill and that in itself was off putting.  But this gunk literally came off onto the food we grilled and you could TASTE IT.  I'll be honest right now, this ruined everything for us.  Our go-to is Olleh on Convoy and their grills are SPOTLESS every single time. Not sure where the disconnect is on this one but totally ruined the taste of everything.  The sides tasted fine, fish katsu, fried shrimp. Tofu stew was a bit weak but that's fine.  Pork belly cuts had the most fat I've ever seen on a cut.

Really though, the grill thing is the clincher here.  We probably won't be back to Gen because of this, we'll be trying Manna next and if all else fails we'll be sticking with Olleh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARXt6gsPQ1IvacV0ygqNAY&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Elavan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUw4FLlJRqPmXkqk52ASX47PEfYvtfbp4CxY2-ytK1NVc3ofVH0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gen Korean BBQ is an absolutely beautiful restaurant, from the moment you walk in, you’re greeted with great ambiance and top-tier service. As it was our first time there, our server took the time to walk us through the entire process, making sure we understood everything and felt comfortable. Her attention to detail and kindness made a big difference.

The quality of the meat was outstanding. We highly recommend trying the Gen Premium Steak (picanha) and the Hawaiian Bacon, both were incredibly flavorful. Every bite was delicious.

We ended our meal with the Mando Tango, which was a perfect way to close, sweet, tasty, and beautifully presented.

Special shoutout to Xeena, the manager on duty, who personally checked in with us throughout our meal and ensured everything was perfect. Her attentiveness elevated the whole experience.

We had a fantastic time and will definitely be coming back soon! Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBC9nWd6V6kFg5Zrb7SyZ_L&fid=0x0:0x4fcee6b3f1998b1e"],"When":"2025-6-23"}]

[{"Name":"Araceli G.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHNXQnXNmVrybV-TRKZBVyCVevljY_tQjjUTLzqK89RO_WDTx-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overpriced coffee that tastes okay at best. Dont recommend the horchata latte, the mix they use is watered down. The iced latte with the thin liquid mix is just not a good combo. Just taste like watered down coffee
Also, they don’t know what they’re selling, asked about their flavored coffees and staff have no idea what they’re making.

Nothing special about this place, and not worth long wait.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhQgFsLlUIRIHYBhxqKuSL&fid=0x0:0x9a26045efc67fa25"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Adam Ally","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOa3z3dABNiBvouTuXm2vO1AEXD0GpjixrsMMWS08FjEFqEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I've ordered from this location multiple times. Unfortunately, the quality of food here has gone way down in the last several months.

Today I ordered avocado toast and turkey panini. My avocado toast was burnt to the point where the crust was so hard that it was inedible and had to be cut off, and the mashed avocado was not mixed well, with an entire half of the toast coated in a dark, oxygenated avocado that implied it was left for an extended period out in the open before being given to me.

My turkey panini had the turkey cut so that half of the sandwich simply had no turkey at all and was just two bread slices mushed together (photo included). Truly bizarre.

When I ordered here frequently last year, these types of issues did not happen. Now though? That's a strike on both of the food items in my order. While my hazelnut coffee was good, I plan to take my patronage to other businesses in the area that can deliver drinks and food made well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFpcjjHxo8PVAsSMIYMzSn&fid=0x0:0x9a26045efc67fa25"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Emily Cash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpP8eUkIkn2IO4iCQOvjjhHEFf68A-FwKdoQsogqoZ8yWN7KUm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wanted to take a moment to shout out the crew that works here! Happy Saturday betterbuzz crew!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went here for the first time. [{"Name":"KakuBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWutlKZi6Y01z2Y5IREHHTIWtcCCIaHmbgvMr5DtNejgeQXtjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Somisomi is a great spot in a busy Mira Mesa strip mall, known for its smooth soft serve and warm, chewy taiyaki (fish-shaped waffle).

We spent $15 for five flavor-filled taiyaki (Nutella, custard, and sesame) and a cup of their beautiful purple and green ube/matcha soft serve. The taiyaki had a thin, crisp outer crunch and moist inner dough, while the tall swirl of soft serve was smooth and creamy.

The service is friendly and efficient, and they keep the line moving. Note that while there's plenty of free parking, the entire mall is very popular and often busy.

A highly recommended, semi-sweet treat for family and friends!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCffaL_xupLsLfQfBcahIBJ&fid=0x0:0x17492675762c8435"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Nasim Shamsaei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTgYUFWg8Xe1-2zFKlFK2mja4BYrAfzxPacqkGApBWqgVw_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I’m reviewing the location, not the ice cream itself. I’m giving it 3 stars because the ice cream is great.
However, this location serves significantly smaller portions and offers fewer amount of  adds-on compared to other locations in San Diego. The store was not clean, the glasses are usually dirty, and the staff’s attitude felt dismissive.
Overall, the product is good, but the experience at this location needs improvement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ankita Aparajita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIe9dtc_m_Pr4PMNR4e2gsnXPACIDKSRxIx3PapjbGvBq44iJKcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolute favorite icecream in San Diego hands down! Can have this any number of time, especially when I do not even have a sweet tooth..says A lotttt!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCu1vhTiln_qhbZCZMBGr9r&fid=0x0:0x17492675762c8435"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Yachai Reilly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULtzw4baX0lDRhaPD88pOIyuCnKz68JdoEduOV7Vw1mj6PX8o44A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an adorable idea...little fish waffle to go on top of your ice cream. Wish there was one back on the east coast where we are.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0EIh-5KLJdTtnRq7LUFe9&fid=0x0:0x17492675762c8435"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"hAMBurgER","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdkxSlvUHa5f1vNHxZ3b7fTJrUjg86ZiEhV7UeN_TM-QVPuU2u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going here for about 3-5 years maybe, I’m not as sure but my experience is great. They added new flavors on the soft serve, and taiyaki. I love the new combo flavors every week! (I think) It is a great after work snack and affordable price. It’s very quiet inside and some standing tables. I wouldn’t really recommend eating inside, because there’s no chairs, but the food is great. Toppings are optional too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENDH4bLg3rLMUg&fid=0x0:0x17492675762c8435"],"When":"2025-5-8"},{"Name":"Tanya Dantus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5PhkeIfJ4T7n2qFwDY-QQRyToeHxJEQzuDTYhMmxSdMks2bky=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Love their matcha soft serve. Wish the dairy was hormone/ antibiotic free- we’d go more often! My son loves the adzuki or red bean taiyaki and I like the ube one.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan K Baker-Barrett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIR0IiRV7yWVDMKcO-cRfDdaM44zKp5EcrNQwFPo6KWQrkit8Uq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yummy treat! I got the ube/matcha swirl and it was great! My 5 yo tripped and dropped his ice cream. I was going to buy another but they insisted it was no problem. Thank you for your kindness!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shubhangi Priyadarshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbs06ZXnAWZW4tUfVdcvgmSGr9cDrqUCh2vekPrmkkQIviH_vQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Liked the waffle, however not a big fan of its's icecream. No textures in icecream","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZQhvH7ijGb9J3GxU7aGiE&fid=0x0:0x17492675762c8435"],"When":"2025-12-30"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Camille S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkioWafI8kFVU-c2lA_O-KRnO1gg6fqZfcKEYegSZn1Q11Lzbp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sayulitas is literally a drunchies/munchies paradise.

One day I’ll be as buff as this burrito! 🌯 Seriously, if you haven’t been to Sayulitas, they are the spot for incredible Filipino-Mexican fusion, known best for their MASSIVE burritos. I’m talking about a burrito so big that 4-5 people can easily eat just one.

What we ordered:

-Mummy Torta: Would 1000% get this again. The bacon wrapped torta is highkey a game changer and I'd say this was my fav thing.
-Cheese Burrito: This is like a breakfast burrito on steroids—huge and satisfying. It's a LOT so beware...
-Tulog Burrito: This nap-inducing burrito can probably feed 5 people and not even exaggerating. It has ALL the meats! Pro tip: if you can't eat it because of how big it is, just take everything apart and eat it-still just as good!
-Salchichon Fries: A drunchies dream come true, i wouldnt order this allll the time, but if you're ever looking for the ultimate munchie meal...get this
-Horchata: If you love sweet horchata like I do, you’ll love theirs.

Also a BIG fan of their salsas....you can't go wrong with any of them!

Come hungry! You will not be disappointed by the size or the flavor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfyrdvPieNezEXFxENX0Tl&fid=0x0:0x4b4d361deaf8b9b6"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"hughtube88 official","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkXqOKTdYM2jOjqld06eqgG65zxKWmzJaJxqyhHz3IDOgQDcoE3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very good place, they specialize in unique items like Filipino Mexican mixed food, but Lord it's expensive. Their portion sizes are huge tho, so that's a plus. Their burritos are enough for 2 meals at LEAST, and same for their fries. Def worth a try, but I wouldn't recommend their free chips or their regular Horchata unfortunately. The food quality makes up for it tho, like the Lumpia burrito and Mummy Torta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBK_kXJ41J0wUtuZNbkwdvH&fid=0x0:0x4b4d361deaf8b9b6"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Mi Berras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTDHK_TwsZCbgL2XnM6IwjMzW71CRFhI4dYjUdDSrRA-TGd90I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We loved everything we ordered!! but what really stood out for me was how well all the sauces and toppings blended together. The flavors were just right, nothing felt too much of the same taste 🩷","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaJ3ZJZ3b1csTp5a0E9w66&fid=0x0:0x4b4d361deaf8b9b6"],"When":"2025-7-10"},{"Name":"Avi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzA05f_2l7v2xfCU5rqK8_PtWVWrmKlvrjMCBYcEVVOqOJxog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely front lady, huge portion sizes and tastes great. Weirdly amazing amalgamation of Filipino and Mexican food.  Love it.  We share a burrito among 3 people or eat for 2 more meal, I am amazed by the portion.

Pacman burrito or fries are usually my go to order.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nando Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyEI8xWJy5GC3G1jjU5nmGPXY3Gmc1mLSLN3uw85HviD7pIvT-aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I will say, the portions here are humongous. Flavor is off the chart. Im a huge foodie so I can eat and love to eat. Dont let the price discourage you, extremely worth it. These portions are enough to feed 3 people.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zhengran Shang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN-LcxQ3KR4FnV0IFEgLCdLd_tNgaKefDSOQfAoXN1-Bbwkn0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This fast-food restaurant markets itself as a Mexican eatery, selling burritos and fries, but the contents of the burritos are not traditional Mexican cuisine—they’re Filipino-inspired dishes. The burritos aren’t cheap, but they are enormous and incredibly tasty. Unless you’re extremely hungry with a huge appetite, it’s nearly impossible to finish an entire burrito in one sitting. The size and calorie count are simply mind-blowing!

I ordered the Longanisa burrito, which was filled with a savory-sweet mixture of stir-fried eggs and crumbled pork sausage, along with a generous amount of cheese. It’s the perfect indulgence when you’re craving something rich and high in calories!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_5vv7-gE&fid=0x0:0x4b4d361deaf8b9b6"],"When":"2025-1-15"},{"Name":"Chris Yagi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNL5w5Ndw3JjvTKROmVnPE1rudvThB33ztji1SwEY8H3flrbCCSA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This place used to be great.  Service is good, food has gone downhill. Ordered the texas burrito and rolled tacos. Tasted like the end of day scraps of old chicken and the chile relleno in the burrito was thick chewy and hardend like old food being served. There was lettuce in the burrito. ALOT of lettuce. No where in the ingredients states lettuce.  Feels like they cheaped out. The burrito was slop with every bite and a pool of red grease. Chill on the sour cream. The rolled tacos were soggy to the point of mush, not to mention there was a lot of lettuce.  I will be fair in that this was take-out, however, the rolled taco should have taste and not fall apart or in half when picking it up. Again, the amount of sour cream was over kill. Where was the guacamole? Come on, do better Sayulitas. This is San Diego Mexican food, keep the bar high. Give me a reason to come back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgTIGA232UClPfrOBd2UBTeveTS3HXUGbKaRwVW0suxSw2g5M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"unfortunately have to change my review. it seems like 9/10 times my order is wrong and i don’t find out until i’ve gotten home. prices also seem to have gone up. was $50 for 3 burritos with the chile relleno having NO chile at all and my bean burrito tasted like cigarettes because the beans were burnt and flaked with black char probably from scraping the bottom of a pan. they even asked to text photos because “cooks didn’t believe me”. it was inedible. very sad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpJ67IhpcqjqTrZawUz5GR&fid=0x0:0x4b4d361deaf8b9b6"],"When":"2025-6-15"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Utkrisht Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAfnEMHQbl7sRrN1WQuZnE55Fd8XpQf3MK3KwHuAbdvAGGlk22=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was delicious. We ordered two fish taco combo, lobster tacos, cheese quesadillas, 4 rolled tacos potato and everything was top notch. We would definitely be back for more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjy-S9QW8T-RgeE8G3qRMr&fid=0x0:0x7753720064e468cc"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Cindy Chiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBAWOw2m_ZGjutuODBXQ_RsFycFRGjKFtwcZ_E5htrnOR0o8DogQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great family-run restaurant, big portions for reasonable prices. We ate in and were given a complimentary basket of freshly made chips, which were fantastic paired with their four different salsa selections. We split carnitas, fried fish and carne asada tacos. They were generously sized, fish tacos were my favorite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEqXtMxYolnT3CPfcbBBOL&fid=0x0:0x7753720064e468cc"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Alex Zakharov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7nWbn3ZxL5i6z7NJIP9qhPzxZkxDsem5gYKicCIEaykV26g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We were very hungry and decided to stop by for lunch. Based on the Google reviews, this place seemed like a good choice. But when we ordered the Carne Asada burrito and finally received it, we were shocked.

This should NOT be called a Carne Asada burrito — it was basically a guacamole tortilla burrito. There was almost no meat, the burrito was tiny(the price was 16 bucks), and the tortilla was folded over itself six times throughout the whole thing. On top of that, it even gave me heartburn.

I do not recommend this place. This was by far the worst carne asada burrito I’ve ever had in my life.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZMWXYvaC89Gln_7vMgVw0&fid=0x0:0x7753720064e468cc"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Kate Ihnatenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZ16VhQ52fHUHlOr0L9Eoazujhx1JSQP-BajL6Rmhb8RdHXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The burrito was juicy and flavorful, but I felt like it didn’t have enough meat. Overall, it was good, but the price felt a bit high for what you get. For that price, I was also surprised that no salsa was offered. I’ve tried a lot of Mexican food around San Diego and have had much better for a lower price. Additionally, the cashier seemed to have some difficulty understanding me, which made ordering a little awkward. It wasn’t a bad experience, but it didn’t really stand out to me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7l_X-Dh0HlukaNPLaDvxg&fid=0x0:0x7753720064e468cc"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"MizzDR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWic4NbtXhKGhbZbSRGrX_kS_YCIkDeO2jIQa_kmPhdEtKiksRl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Looking for authentic Mexican food without the drive to Mexico? This restaurant has a family like home vibe that immediately makes you feel welcome. My chilaquiles estaban para chuparse los dedos - not only were they delicious, but the portion was incredibly generous! Even the guy at the table next to us was raving about his tacos. And the dessert? Just take a look at our photo…Super recommend! No se lo pierdan!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD84URvBQs_uEIIJGAwp-OE&fid=0x0:0x7753720064e468cc"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"S V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIipbyvHNvHIXuBTgXkHZ5lGlQkIT8hunXC5NMtVyJBX5EtLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was some of the worst food we have had in a very long time. It was so bad that we threw everything away, even though we were starving.

To be clear, the woman who answered the phone was very kind and helpful. This review is strictly about the food.

The fish was a total scam. There was barely any fish at all. It was chopped up into tiny pieces, almost like salsa, and extremely poorly prepared. We paid $55 and did not actually receive fish in our entrees.

We specifically requested no pineapple, yet pineapple was included anyway. I also asked if the tostada was a shell like a taco bowl and was told yes, but it was not. It was a tiny, stale fried tortilla that tasted like it was cooked in very old, unpleasant oil.

The beans were completely unseasoned and bland. After only a few bites, our stomachs started hurting, which was very concerning.

Overall, this food was inedible and not worth the money at all. We will not be returning.
save your money do not eat here . They need to refund our money that is NOT OK","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nathaniel Allenby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtVi4Ex72_6f0sRn4f_Q6bKwQ2j9mYGmaiC2BeQ8JejaWf0WqpeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top 3 Mexican food places in SD county!Amazing service, the owner Mauricio is almost always working, greets people with "Welcome home" and it feels genuinely warm and inviting. The excellent food is consistent and reliable. Salsa bar is great and the atmosphere is chill and unassuming. Portions and quality have stayed consistently reliable. The Seafood burrito is a must-try, and all of 'Los Favoritos' are great. Worth the stop! A+
Highly recommendable. [{"Name":"California Calamansi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAxzD16F9wPW4GKTaQXAd3jOE-_xz7hJYljNX7liPKd93kJgs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Vietnamese coffee! Always on the search for some yummy Vietnamese coffee (Caphe Sua Da)and we found this wonderful place. Their Caphe Sua Da was delicious! The coffee was strong with good flavor and not overly sweet. We also got their Ube Babe which was sweet and delicious. I also came to their cafe during their one year anniversary celebration and got myself a free tumbler. It is so cute! Can’t wait to use it 😊 They had a nice festive backdrop also. We will return soon to try more drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2BAx-2BcMg116ZZuGBP1_&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Trinity Lambiase","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvlrnnQsmVYTiqMwdykSEaCzRSUgfxEg9tA2sdyp5P6BlXvIFn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This coffee was so delicious!!! I got the toasted marshmallow latte with whole milk and it was a 10/10. My cousin got a regular iced latte with oat milk. We also got a yummy chocolate croissant.This place is so cute too! Great place to study with a friend or get some work done!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6QWtLDI9qBiBGZnW3Hpna&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Stacey Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbi0d7GelJXKH56LzKiuE24q-jnRBCDfqDRVOfgZtFigOIPEHzUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly staff. Beautiful interior. The vibes are high here. The seating is comfortable and there are many spots. Great for working or getting coffee with a friend.

Now let’s talk about the coffee. We got the flight to try different types. We got the ube coffee, pandan coffee, Vietnamese coffee, and a strawberry matcha. The ube and pandan was a cold cream on top of the Vietnamese coffee base. The Vietnamese coffee here is out of this world. It’s smooth and strong and delicious. Wow. I could drink this coffee all day. The matcha was also delicious. I love a good strawberry matcha. As soon as we finished, we wanted to order another one. It was that yummy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBf4sIWo52fZKmP6csEYVyw&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Lydia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjhkMBgH8jbcgEe4hkZd5kbOkiKW71xi15TfQjj2_D6sbZ6x4G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really enjoyed spending time with friends today at EM Coffee. Loved their drink flight and desserts, especially the bear-shaped mochi dessert. It’s not overly sweet. The environment is great as well. Highly recommend this spot for studying or chatting with friends.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBiUvZIwSQzwVW5U9390GpJ&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Mary Kang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJw80VRWv0yR3AEIEgIKP-vN1KQFPXfyELL-YKZb5oSpJm3B8BY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful interior. Good vibes. Lots of seating but very full when I visited. Caramel corn latte was to die for. Notes on tables request customers to limit visits to 3 hours. Lovely spot. Would request cup lid to be more secure to cup.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnjzF1auxo1IHjXjcTi8Tc&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Annie T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlMr6B-iQDC5wNPvN7_gauL31OKqCsN2a0YbWFu97-HH8BOUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice place for studying and strong Vietnamese coffee. I love their bear waffle with custard. I tried their egg biscoff brûlée drink today and it was way too sweet. Not sure if I like it. Got a bunch of custard waffle bears though!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCL3C2fnHtarTLuZjM0nA9l&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"Veronika Mazur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVk7ux36ddcAfSumJIPlGbHTCbZ_WVDgcU5F1uB4OzTHYkG8lBLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a delightful experience! So many good options it’s hard to choose. The menu location isn’t the best placement. But the person at the counter recommended the white trufflemisu and it didn’t disappoint!  Cute decor. Spacious and clean indoor seating.  No line when I went Sunday morning @9:30. Ample parking. Definitely worth checking out if you like Vietnamese coffee!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPtp-4dg&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2024-12-2"},{"Name":"Jason","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxOUrXKIbINCf0NSD6U6GWd2UlHYjPPonQVgWmG8120UIWnkoj7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friends got the coffee flight with Viet iced coffee, milk tea, super coconut, and white truffle misu to share. Personal drinks were biscoff egg coffee and pandan cream.

I personally really like the basic ca phe sua da and the super coconut ice cream from em creations; the milk tea was ok and the white truffle misu was too creamy for me. Would probably skip the coffee flight or any creamy drinks and just go for the basics next time. Viet iced coffee is best! ☕️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDondKSBg&fid=0x0:0x1423e3a546f4d7c8"],"When":"2025-4-27"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Valerie Wan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt3fu8F8FdwrqN7AIqxSLH6FrKsBTBi8vCMiAFF53xibsrQP-oRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I’ve given this place three tries, hoping to see why it’s so popular but I’ve decided it’s just not for me. Here are my main reasons:

1. The food is overly sweet. From the curry to the pad see ew, I could taste more sugar than any of the other flavors. It really threw off the balance of the dishes.
2. They charge extra for rice with curry. This one is mind-boggling. A small curry is already around $17, and yet rice isn’t included so you have to pay extra. No one eats curry by itself! Most Thai restaurants I’ve been to include rice in the price but here it ends up being close to $20 for a basic curry dish.
3. Service is hit or miss. Sometimes it’s fine, but during my last visit, my friend and I tried to redeem the free Thai tea promo they were advertising at every table. We both checked in on Yelp, but my friend had some trouble finding it after she checked-in. The server was dismissive and said, “Then just try Instagram.” We eventually did get the tea, but the whole interaction felt awkward…if you’re promoting something, at least be friendly about it.

Overall, I wanted to like this place, but between the overly sweet food, confusing pricing, and inconsistent service, I don’t think I’ll be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDp5uTFtDeAltsc0ui8ONrW&fid=0x0:0x6931eb707b5440bc"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Jason","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxOUrXKIbINCf0NSD6U6GWd2UlHYjPPonQVgWmG8120UIWnkoj7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eaten here multiple times; got pad thai and pad see ew and wanted to try something new this time. Keep in mind their spice levels are adequate so if you dont have a tolerance, get ready to order a thai iced tea and have some napkins to wipe up the sweat.

I tried the beef salad this time and an order of the duck larb out of adventurous curiosity. The larb at level 5 spice was still spicy for me, very good!

10/10 service too, waters always refilled and waiters are attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDolbnntAE&fid=0x0:0x6931eb707b5440bc"],"When":"2025-4-27"},{"Name":"Dominic M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7JUjEG9VAObQ2HHB3mBDgndEiIBCERBMMkuoMhbWRFrg-ew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"with plenty of parking in the plaza, this restaurant has delicious thai food and friendly service. it's nice for a casual stop by, and the prices are by your choice of meat in each dish.

Pad Thai with Shrimp
the noodles were chewy and delicious and the textures of the crunchy bean sprouts and peanuts played together nicely. the flavor was a bit subtle. it was still enjoyable but i would've liked a little more flavor here.

Drunken Noodle with Chicken
we usually order this over pad-see-ew since it has more veggies, but this was the day i learned drunken noodles are also sweeter which i didn't love.

Spicy Basil with Fish Fillets
spicy and refreshing, this dish had a lot of yummy veggies, but for the price the fish was pretty lacking which made me sad.

Pa-nang Curry with Chicken
this curry was smooth and savory with a subtle sweetness. it had plenty of meat and vegetables inside and was very enjoyable, although it didn't come with rice so we had to order that separately.

Mango Sticky Rice with Sesame Seeds
the mangos were soft and sweet and the rice was warm and chewy without being overwhelmingly sweet. the sesame seeds on this dish added a nice new flavor and texture as well!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rotphannee Rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXewkvAyih14VoHkCfLTf8zpK30sPOjRdK6NWQG6SwkXS0xfRwh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I went on Friday, and it wasn't too crowded, which was nice. All of our ordered dishes were authentic, and my favorite is Thai Eastern sausage, which I like to eat with sticky rice, just like when I was young. This place reminds me of Thailand! I would definitely come back again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXyeSAlAE&fid=0x0:0x6931eb707b5440bc"],"When":"2024-10-28"},{"Name":"Weon Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9otBnCdhLM4-75O8MEcbamovuJYPsbWlSIHgpkTBgDGsLRIYNQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Spicy level 3 is middle.
I tried level 4, but it was very spicy.
I ate a Pad Thai, and it was very tasty.

Also, I tasted Crab fried rice.
It had a unique taste, and I enjoyed it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_ycjZTw&fid=0x0:0x6931eb707b5440bc"],"When":"2025-1-17"},{"Name":"Kirsten Goyette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQehcZzbTP_seTAa0XexbvpuIC8Bjb_BcnEVuexO-Dn9Twhr0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can’t say enough good things. Our server was kind, attentive, and repeated our choices back to us for clarity. We had the yellow and green curries, pad see ew, duck larb, pineapple fried rice, Chinese broccoli, eggplant, and spicy basil. Every dish was incredible! We love spice, but a level 3 was plenty of spice, I wouldn’t go higher. Can’t wait to return!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vijay Shankar Balaji","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULL5gjdP679sE77-3MxQXL_dpCrxTEfUzR0yqfooWY-HaNrXzo5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This restaurant shows great potential with flavorful dishes and attentive service. I enjoyed Panang curry, a personal favorite whenever I dine Thai. Our party ordered delightful green curry and drunken noodles. It was a bit disappointing to have to order rice separately from the curries, but overall, I enjoyed.

A noteworthy tip: their spice scale is imbalanced, with 3 being medium on a scale of 0 to 10. However, they do clarify this on the menu. Stick to orders around level 3 or maximum 4; anything higher might be too intense for most.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjiNqasAE&fid=0x0:0x6931eb707b5440bc"],"When":"2024-4-28"},{"Name":"Anita Bath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeOxE4LiLr1s_GmhUeJvniiByXDrdWiW5b3OQiBZrPywYTYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Solid experience every time. Drunken noodles are my go-to. Their spicy scale skews to the spicier side but I like spicy so I don't mind. I really enjoy their larb as well. Parking is super convenient.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I definitely recommend any of the Pho as well as the avacado smoothie. We will definitely be back 🫰🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_lJQVFRK8N6WDg9c8s9nM&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Albert De Alba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6pP023Sln-KcSoh77US_uNhSCsRQnBRlbgR2PknUT9OZHgKc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff was quick and made it easy for me to get my order. I got a beef brisket with meat balls and a chicken bahn mi. Taste of the broth was flavorful. Well prepared and hope to go back soon! Do not miss out on getting to try their food! They didn't disappoint 🙌🏼 👏🏼 👌🏼","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfnVHabPjFfiCtpAeqivTf&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Shondra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlP8-654JlqP9dC91EAB4gK741k6Gfq_y_rxQMR-m6C7KjaSyU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A small restaurant that is located in a strip mall near the 15 freeway. There are a variety of tables for a dine in option, and they offer take out service. It's a good place to grab lunch. The server was friendly and checked on us often. They offer a nice variety of menu options, although we only ordered the Pho.

The Chicken Pho was delightful. It was a substantially sized bowl, and they did not skimp on ingredients. The broth they use is probably one of my new favorites. I'll be sure to visit again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfw8oZ83AV48VQYuUArFmf&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Dulce Starizny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtIvmnHScKE5c_FwLMSf_9ozV8gMD-qwmewi8-Yb_kaXgAp7_H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a delicious experience! The dishes are absolutely delicious, and everything is spotless and well-organized. The food arrives in less than five minutes, and the service is outstanding—friendly and welcoming from start to finish.

On top of that, the prices are budget-friendly, which is almost impossible to find in San Diego right now. A true hidden gem! Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw-e_oFQ&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-3-27"},{"Name":"Arief Ramon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR2ETchaY9IPOmjaUnhWlzngH-SIxvT_Xa7nVlHSPFydCH6jR2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A solid choice for Vietnamese staples in San Diego. The Pho broth is aromatic and clear, while the Banh Mi features crispy baguettes with savory fillings. It's a no-frills establishment that delivers consistent, tasty food at reasonable prices. Great for a quick, satisfying lunch on the go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDevsfVsAE&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2022-10-11"},{"Name":"Anvy N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcglYfltAIj0-hDMVgxHBp1LmSn83hkBzQT3zDdqWXf0hl9MSUUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Classic Vietnamese spot for your Pho, Banh mi and Cafe sua da fix. Generous portions of quality meat in the Pho dac biet and Banh mi dac biet. Both were delicious! The coffee is strong and this place uses the slow drip method like it's supposed to. Prices are extremely reasonable too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKQVzbOQpKoJr9dKbrmnEo&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Eleana May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhjOoRX1Pnkvkd36XxHwm00C6uxdH3-4SZGNwACokZRu0_9J3pFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For Sunday brunch, it’s great to know there’s a Pho place nearby. This spot is conveniently located near several car repair shops, which worked out perfectly since I dropped off my car. I was pleasantly surprised by their delicious pho and tasty banh mi. The place is clean, comfortable, and relaxing, and the service is excellent. A wonderful find!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3vYqimAE&fid=0x0:0xb2005c5a881195e9"],"When":"2024-11-18"}]

[{"Name":"Maxim Volkov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIx_u8awf4b9irVU_AI1DWKXkfTPPqI6GlLsEJ0gmmETP_eCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent cakes — I give them 5/5. You can really tell they use quality ingredients. I’ve bought from them more than once and definitely not for the last time. The last time I purchased a cake, they even treated me to some pastries, which was a very pleasant surprise.

The only thing I’d like to mention — and I hope they fix it after this comment — is the hours of operation. It says they’re open until 9 PM, but in reality they close at 8.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBM-dNXePzJftGzOwUFM88C&fid=0x0:0x52e6a3578e688e3a"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"/","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7vFTqvKH02J1y9rjs177BgZf9Z7FO2JlJIcAiyHFpyzXsz6s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered an iced matcha latte with almond milk and vanilla syrup, and it was the first matcha I truly enjoyed — after trying it here, I actually fell in love with matcha. The almond milk is excellent, with no bitterness or unpleasant aftertaste like I’ve experienced in other cafés. The matcha itself is delicious, smooth, and perfectly balanced.

This was at Paris Baguette, a bakery and take-out café located inside H Mart, Mira Mesa, San Diego, California. The staff are very polite and attentive, always ready to answer questions and help with your order.

I highly recommend trying the matcha here — it’s really tasty and high-quality!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAkSm1ApliRfjts0CyqS28L&fid=0x0:0x52e6a3578e688e3a"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Bonnie Ye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPMma_MhhRbmmk_eCLt_9ZhOaoAMUkmiW9IaBXVwXz64s3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It could be that we came at a wrong time. They didn’t have much left. I got a chocolate croissant. It’s very rich with chocolate custard filling. I wish croissant itself would taste a bit more fresh (buttery and a bit crunchy kind texture). Same with baguettes. I got one and it’s very chewy and soft. It seems like it’s been sitting there for a long time. I remember loving their croissants when they are fresh. It’s too bad that our visit was disappointing this time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCV6xfz687JEzqq71sv1pJu&fid=0x0:0x52e6a3578e688e3a"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Ying Rattapanit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAk202jpmNXjgryFt9LRXm6LdtRwPTuFNOy2a3CowZUIddt37B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my favorite bakery-cafes in San Diego. I bought a Multigrain Bread, Whole Red Bean Bread, and Triple Chocolate Chip Cookie. I love Strawberries Soft Cream Cake. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"LC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcIc4MFugCz3z-xZ283AywwimSCwRK0afI8L7orcXqftKs4Co=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The cakes are delicious, the drinks taste great, and the shop itself is very beautiful.
However, the service today was disappointing.

I ordered four milk tea drinks, two of them with added whipped cream. When the staff finished making the third drink, I noticed that the whipped cream was missing, so I reminded them. For the fourth drink, the whipped cream was missing again, so I went to inform the staff politely.

The staff then showed an unpleasant attitude and said something like, “This cup already has milk foam, why do you still want whipped cream?”
I was confused and had to explain that I had paid extra for whipped cream and asked them to check the receipt.

The food and drinks are great, but I really hope the service attitude can be improved in the future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmQ4m3HnT6yU8ByyF4Kkc7&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Jaja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISLQ8HrkRojLRwtK7DAhF1g0AKxN2z_ThPxgQLo3pX1cJQkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Did an online order here for my birthday cake and we got a full Mango Creme Brulee cake. Nothing about it tastes like mango nor creme brulee. I checked the receipt and they added coconut custard in the cake (with additional fee) without asking us! The whole cake tastes like coconut, might as well call it coconut cake. And it’s way too sweet! They use  artificial flavoring.

The mangoes on top are unripe and hard. Not worth it for 35+ dollars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQ9fKQw29Kil-iI0DAlLcG&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Bo Myint","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCH9fu19C4fyv9ZlL1H7O5rAbQdhOI2aQq78IlPQcBy-KOqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Today, I ordered black lemon tea, and the menu image included fresh sliced lemon. However, I received it without the sliced lemon, so I asked why. They told me that they only serve lemon juice and do not provide lemon slices. This is completely different from the menu image.
FAFO!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-ulJVtYuJhHQhs1Nve-K9&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Mahjabeen Rahman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb2iydH0A1buaE-l71DxllsXgWcemw0tjim6xKQTdsITpF_13B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s a gem for dessert lovers and coffee enthusiasts alike! Their selection of desserts is simply wonderful, with everything from delicate pastries to indulgent cakes, all beautifully crafted and full of flavor. The coffee is equally impressive—rich, smooth, and pairs perfectly with any treat you choose. Prices are reasonable, especially considering the quality and freshness of the items. The atmosphere is cozy, making it a great spot to relax or catch up with friends. Highly recommend for anyone in the area looking for a sweet fix or a fantastic cup of coffee!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXx4qIfA&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2024-10-31"},{"Name":"C F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJslHd5ibizHRgzjEE92XmbGmsMEsCafHaG7fU0CggG6yP72G-d=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I always find something yummy here! And they are having a mango fest right now with lots of tasty mango options. The young man cashiering (Connor?) was super nice and helpful.
It is weird that they have only 2 tables and 8 chairs in a large open space.  Like are they wanting to have a dance floor or something?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCR581k83TljGyV8nS0cvjs&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Eder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9uEI70d-oKbQw-O5H1UVgCf4EkIszI2SwlCoTQLCd9VPmRWmD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely delicious.

Lots of sweets and baked goods, and very tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVm2svhDAsGnYv2Jn9tR2E&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Jen L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1iWgfOiLOnI656a0RFUrlCE2Ej5IU0_Wnqxx1MERGpNG1Aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"85 is re-opened after their refresh. Solid bakery with rotating bakery goods available. Usually they have more sweet breads than savory depending on when you arrive. Their seasonal mango cream roll is so tasty. Egg tarts are tasty. Cakes are great too. Drinks are pretty good and usually only issue I have with their drinks is that the sealing machine doesn't always seal leading to spills. But the staff is very nice and will redo the drink. Great place for a quick snack. Parking is always plentiful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn4IuUCA&fid=0x0:0x13963e94be7fe027"],"When":"2024-9-21"},{"Name":"Julia Tawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBQ7GoqNx48-iVTq2002PuC44uqSQiSi9GYLGYuDUy0VBPcH1KTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pasteries that don't feel too horribly overpriced, and aren't too sweet as well. This is my family's go to for birthday cakes and anytime we are craving a pastry. Just sometimes this location is so busy they don't restock on the little trays to put the pasteries on. But otherwise great service, and great selection. My favorites are Blueberry Tale, Matcha Roll, Taro Bun, and their Strawberry and Mango cakes.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Hilse Juarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9o4YavJSbCz0Bjzlu5-kDmFDmwBVsMtmLvdd-2En9YhE45Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly we stumble upon this spot on instagram.
We love our wing to be extra crispy and with these   Sauces it did not disappoint. No phone orders, so we ordered in person. The waitress was so friendly and had great customer service (wish I remembered her name)

I definitely recommend the lemon pepper wings!
Can’t wait to come back and try different things on their menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFhAQfLixHjkDCw6ZErdwg&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Neighborhood dive bar that's always busy when we've gone there. Seat yourself and best to order at the bar. You can wait for a wait staff to come to your table but they are usually very busy and you might end up waiting for awhile.

It can be hard to find a table available at game time, especially if you have more than 4 people.

The price for drinks and food are still reasonable here so I think that's why it's a popular spot. Plus food aren't bad bar food either. I do like their wings and fries.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCj2z126yboFxfXSH7p5UxU&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Bonnie Ye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPMma_MhhRbmmk_eCLt_9ZhOaoAMUkmiW9IaBXVwXz64s3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"If you’re looking for a hole in the wall dive bar in the area, then this is your place. I ended up here with a group after bar hopping. We ordered some drinks and food. Their chicken wings were soooo tasty! I also had fries and tater tots and they were very good as well. It was close to midnight and the bar was still very full on a Friday night. It’s a very lively bar. I would come back for some more“comfort food” and drinks soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw7qLK6wE&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2025-3-19"},{"Name":"Juiwen Hsu (levenshe)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMx5exnO7sHVQSqmJkTqMNuD2l7VbFoz4_H1c664b4i_Jlt5RugA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered three different steaks here.  My kid ordered the "Country Chicken Fried Stack" and he said it was delicious.  He loved the mashed potatoes and vegetables that came with it.  My wife and I ordered "New York Steak", which I thought was delicious with just the right flavor and doneness.  The salad here is very fresh and has a natural and refreshing taste, I love it!  The service staff remained very friendly despite being busy, and came to ask about our needs from time to time. I am not a local, but I like this kind of local experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA-NfnLw&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2025-1-29"},{"Name":"Nancy Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnLLy6P8f-22bF6Gg0ScCgOBmRJQpzjEwT3box7HY_xnPgSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"1st time trying, ordered to go. It was the closest wings place to where I was that was open. Did not disappoint.  Very good.  Though Buffalo mild was definitely buffalo hot for me. Still had me salivating🤤","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDogdX-ZQ&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2025-4-25"},{"Name":"Tonio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSWVkw0YE9aF_Hqac3jWuDBkQX2A1siaQCNmNdypfHe8DcHXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here just for the lemon pepper wings. Lived up to the hype. Must try if you're in the area and crave some wings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4Wlday_y9D0fg9hY00fQ1&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Cheyenne Isom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO2NYeJ_9T0TJw6AZlYia77e_J9sB8qjzjXeUDtYZHLOYOmsEy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The bartenders were busy but attentive, every pass they made they checked in to see how we liked our nachos and how we were on drinks. We were definitely reminded how old we were by the music from our generation played which made it easy to feel right at home and relaxed","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Sitterly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxKNkV6x9bkZVxT84kn5mMBnakel4hxc8GzequQ9PIeWpKc1k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time at tomcats- great crowd and the five bar feels welcoming. We ordered several types of wings that were delicious.  My buddy and I had a great time and you never would know about this place unless you are from the area.

I will def be back, it would be a lot of fun to watch a game there !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_5-DHOw&fid=0x0:0xde6e548a10d0a22e"],"When":"2025-1-19"}]

[{"Name":"Dean Phung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4S5SBw_VQv9WzJUwAV4_nQUlAdcxjfEjLVBKMvtfu1TLJGYKt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really cool spot.  Well decorated for Lunar New Year!  We got two drinks, Milk Tea with Boba and Kumquat and Mango Jelly.  The Milk Tea flavor tasted more like tea if that makes sense.  So if you like the strong tea flavor, this place is for you.  The Kumquat was refreshing.  Service is extremely friendly here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICtkLWI7wE&fid=0x0:0x7a7639ec2a9b16ce"],"When":"2024-1-28"},{"Name":"Christine Hummell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfZSJAc6PpJNrE2kTRJdEKCjlu8l_GVzXqYoGOxxC4yMPUS0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the Wintermelon Milk Tea, and it was amazing! Super refreshing, perfectly balanced flavor, and not overly sweet. You can tell they use quality ingredients. Definitely my new go-to spot for a cold drink!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blair Rohring","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9vRmxyGfNF7dOMuQRImpMFnGnV1b2nXj8sPI57-Me-2bOzunIlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"So sad! This place was my favorite boba spot for years. However, recently, they changed their boba to boba pearls that are smaller and softer. The new boba isn't as satisfying as the old boba. :( I hope they decide to switch back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amit Mahajan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5f5Bhq6Ri_azCdXRSVWhYOwWIZs81QemnMRHbARUjERNd1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The boba tea has many options for flavors and taste good. The staff is really nice too. I prefer the creme brulee tiger milk brown sugar flavor","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manjushree Shetty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj2IayokpEl_wICmNgIQzvbdsGmZpiaGZ0Rkt9-0-vBw3h21x7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Best out of lot!!

Editing my review again because I felt I hadn’t done enough justice just saying best the best. It’s been 2 years I have tried a lot of Boba teas in San Diego and vouch this is the besssttt natural flavour drink you could ever get. Now they have added a lot of new flavours!! Must visit place!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDn3e7DRQ&fid=0x0:0x7a7639ec2a9b16ce"],"When":"2024-10-9"},{"Name":"Brian Dallas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOnIEuQuppBF_9k2BEP7v1lB3LJSLvHswKw92uUf-nXBmKOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a Hawaiian-born local, I love my fair share of boba drinks, and appreciate how Boba unites people. Jungle Tea raises expectations; not just on the quality of ingredients, but the cleanliness of the establishment, and friendliness and attentiveness of the staff. Tony and Monica helped inspire our first ever Jungle Tea. We learned that their most popular flavor is their Dragon Fruit Tea with Green Tea & Dragon Fruit Bursting Boba. It is absolutely delicious; very pure flavors with a distinct Dragon Fruit flavor. Flavors are nicely balanced, and the popping Boba is sensational. There is also a seasonal (limited time only) flavor called "The Perfect Rose", perfect for the upcoming Valentines Day. If you like nuanced, delicate floral notes, you need to get it while they have it. Their location is easy to find, and full of parking, and inside is very well decorated with a clear and concise theme. This is my new favorite Boba place, and I hope it becomes yours too. While writing this, my best friend finished the rose tea, and I already want more.

***Spoiler Alert: We tried a new menu addition that implements their House-Made Brown Sugar Boba (Pictured below)***","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmh5nJBA&fid=0x0:0x7a7639ec2a9b16ce"],"When":"2022-2-11"},{"Name":"Angelie Villaver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2AZeJLfDuOaY5-9uucDCo2reJ1lol3JExMBNLCwRXxnyHcpvwMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best tea in town. The place it's so welcoming. Everything they have super delicious. My family's come over here all the time. This is our newest favorite place to be everyday and night. I recommend this place to everyone. You guys must try the dragon fruits Bursting Boba .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICmk6jC6wE&fid=0x0:0x7a7639ec2a9b16ce"],"When":"2022-1-8"},{"Name":"Kristina Bolt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMFsniVvsxegEVukJoMzDMBXXEkHny1tjfusXrmSxsYsSgtc1tSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh my gosh, their panDan milk tea was so good. Did not need any more sweetener. Really cute atmosphere very clean. The people that work. There were very nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDM3Y6wazfZqu0vQrsNfsb8&fid=0x0:0x7a7639ec2a9b16ce"],"When":"2025-11-3"}]
