user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gabriella Rocha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUe2GTgYd4r3SsdidbL53XHqMghuwaIjva3EUoaH-GzQZTObR8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We love visiting Manna BBQ! This time we went for lunch, and I really appreciate that they offer a $26.99 lunch menu option. The food is always delicious, and I especially enjoy the starters and appetizers they bring out before the steak. The service is typically very efficient, but we were surprised to see only three servers on the floor during a busy Friday lunch rush. Our food took a bit longer than usual, which was understandable given the limited staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8EIeDIEbnBZG5ha5ksUHL&fid=0x0:0x4e5935d0762eb2b7"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"King Reviewer!","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTxgDeCWb-RlbTHPE8TMLv7XGZCYb3mYWE1bwSH1p719YZZOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First of all I must tell you that I typically do not like Korean barbecue. That being said, this place is excellent. The food is really good. The service was also really good. The atmosphere was good it's going to be a loud place because there's a lot of people and that's okay. I took my daughter here for her birthday. We had a great time and I highly recommend that if you want to go to a good barbecue place to go here. The ratings were high so we drove 35 minutes to get there and it was worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDcc0YOtJdVeIEAvfrGobO&fid=0x0:0x4e5935d0762eb2b7"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Lili G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9Uiojudq-gSHi89WTatoVFO2drCWbw7aPZrnNNES2j8i5aTU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is good - they have legit banchan and 6 of them as soon as you sit down. I liked the options for wraps (rice paper, radish and lettuce.) The meat tasted good, we ordered rosemary pork, brisket, beef belly, pork belly. Probably should have tried the LA galbi some time.

Service was good.

The vibe is good and they don’t have hoods at every table so the space looks more open. Ventilation was good regardless, I didn’t smell more than a normal kbbq meal. My only complaint is condensation that was dropping  from the exposed pipes and landed on my shoulder.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwySh-e65AWcBDPxuJHJNT&fid=0x0:0x4e5935d0762eb2b7"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"Lauren Dang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfPgFeJfWb6VL-QPrlPO2N_JlCFrL3XbNix-cAefxHJhPbB38=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good! 🥩

The menu here is crazy wide and their options seem endless. I usually just eat the basics like bulgogi, brisket, and pork belly so I'm glad they offered different variations of each. They have a very efficient ordering system where you order through the tablet at your table and your meat would arrive within 3 minutes.

*Pork Belly: 8/10 - not too fatty
* Bulgogi: 9/10 - tasty and glad that they offered it on their basic menu
* Brisket: 9/10 - better quality than the other locations that I've been to

The service was good and they were consistently changing our grill without us having to ask. The only thing I didn't like was that they don't offer refills on soda and I couldn't ask for water refills through the tablet. So when I wanted more water, I had to get the attention of the server.

Nevertheless, the meat quality was there and we enjoyed our meal! 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDovLCYIw&fid=0x0:0x4e5935d0762eb2b7"],"When":"2025-4-22"},{"Name":"Albert Babisha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJKpLW1JpP5Xyoi_nHgtFEj7N5gfozrcHALobzf71TlFvKSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The rib eye was the star of the show. Beef belly was good but not the best I have had. Same with the octopus. The meat is previously frozen and the texture is not perfect. I would like if they had minced garlic available not just the cloves.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3x8indA&fid=0x0:0x4e5935d0762eb2b7"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"Craig Wear","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMOBs6_g0u8QFytsAymfHsn3H5uYNxi-opDmKMJ3juBkywYthj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very good KBBQ place in San Diego. You know we had to try out one while we were here. Very good food. Had our favorite Steamed Egg. $30-35 per person for All-you-can-eat is a very good deal. Loads of options on either menu choice. We had the LA YangNyum Galbi, very yummy. The Hawaiian Pork Belly is huge and very tasty. It takes a while to cook it, but it's very yummy once you get a but of a char on it. This place is definitely worth checking out. You won't regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_6-nQMw&fid=0x0:0x4e5935d0762eb2b7"],"When":"2025-1-19"},{"Name":"Charlie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPYBIoExJflA3H8JSScXUJ64hAffYthSy730O-nyG7Qwxf8JE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty food, but service is a bit slow at this location in my experience. I did have better service at the other location.

Food is good, price is fair, service maybe could be better if unless the time I went was an anomaly","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace Navarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEid6jNgUrk8aRz_v6AoQggrmc51StU19ixddNvnGgpefi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was excellent and the atmosphere was kid friendly. The best I have ever had at kbbq. They took our order at the beginning, and then we could order anything we wanted from the touch screens after that, which came quickly. They also checked on us throughout the meal to see if we needed anything. They were very patient and accommodating to our group with very young children, finding us a better table to fit all the high chairs, stroller etc. The food and meat was also great quality. Would recommend!","Images":null,"When":""}]
